authors_text: Shanshan Lao,Yuan Gong,Shuwei Shi,Sidi Yang,Tianhe Wu,Jiahao Wang,Weihao Xia,Yujiu Yang
title: Attentions Help CNNs See Better: Attention-based Hybrid Image Quality Assessment Network
title_zh: 注意力帮助 CNN 看得更清楚：基于注意力的混合图像质量评估网络
abstract: Image quality assessment (IQA) algorithm aims to quantify the human perception of image quality. Unfortunately, there is a performance drop when assessing the distortion images generated by generative adversarial network (GAN) with seemingly realistic texture. In this work, we conjecture that this maladaptation lies in the backbone of IQA models, where patch-level prediction methods use independent image patches as input to calculate their scores separately, but lack spatial relationship modeling among image patches. Therefore, we propose an Attention-based Hybrid Image Quality Assessment Network (AHIQ) to deal with the challenge and get better performance on the GAN-based IQA task. Firstly, we adopt a two-branch architecture, including a vision transformer (ViT) branch and a convolutional neural network (CNN) branch for feature extraction. The hybrid architecture combines interaction information among image patches captured by ViT and local texture details from CNN. To make the features from shallow CNN more focused on the visually salient region, a deformable convolution is applied with the help of semantic information from the ViT branch. Finally, we use a patch-wise score prediction module to obtain the final score. The experiments show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on four standard IQA datasets and AHIQ ranked first on the Full Reference (FR) track of the NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge.
summary: Image quality assessment (IQA) algorithm aims to quantify the human perception of image quality. Unfortunately, there is a performance drop when assessing the distortion images generated by generative adversarial network (GAN) with seemingly realistic texture. In this work, we conjecture that this maladaptation lies in the backbone of IQA models, where patch-level prediction methods use independent image patches as input to calculate their scores separately, but lack spatial relationship modeling among image patches. Therefore, we propose an Attention-based Hybrid Image Quality Assessment Network (AHIQ) to deal with the challenge and get better performance on the GAN-based IQA task. Firstly, we adopt a two-branch architecture, including a vision transformer (ViT) branch and a convolutional neural network (CNN) branch for feature extraction. The hybrid architecture combines interaction information among image patches captured by ViT and local texture details from CNN. To make the features from shallow CNN more focused on the visually salient region, a deformable convolution is applied with the help of semantic information from the ViT branch. Finally, we use a patch-wise score prediction module to obtain the final score. The experiments show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on four standard IQA datasets and AHIQ ranked first on the Full Reference (FR) track of the NTIRE 2022 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge.
abstract_zh: 图像质量评估（IQA）算法旨在量化人类对图像质量的感知。不幸的是，在评估由生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的具有看似真实纹理的失真图像时，性能会下降。在这项工作中，我们推测这种适应不良存在于 IQA 模型的骨干中，其中块级预测方法使用独立的图像块作为输入来分别计算它们的分数，但缺乏图像块之间的空间关系建模。因此，我们提出了一种基于注意力的混合图像质量评估网络（AHIQ）来应对挑战并在基于 GAN 的 IQA 任务上获得更好的性能。首先，我们采用两分支架构，包括视觉变换器（ViT）分支和用于特征提取的卷积神经网络（CNN）分支。该混合架构结合了 ViT 捕获的图像块之间的交互信息和 CNN 的局部纹理细节。为了使浅层 CNN 的特征更加集中在视觉显着区域，在 ViT 分支的语义信息的帮助下应用了可变形卷积。最后，我们使用 patch-wise 分数预测模块来获得最终分数。实验表明，我们的模型在四个标准 IQA 数据集上的表现优于最先进的方法，并且 AHIQ 在 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战赛的完整参考 (FR) 赛道上排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的混合图像质量评估网络（AHIQ），旨在提升对生成对抗网络（GAN）生成图像的质量评估性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估模型在处理GAN生成的具有逼真纹理的图像时表现不佳，主要原因是传统方法未建模图像块间的空间关系。
AI.method: 设计双分支架构（ViT与CNN），结合ViT对图像块交互信息的捕捉能力和CNN对局部纹理的提取能力，并通过ViT引导的可变形卷积增强浅层CNN对视觉显著区域的关注，最终通过块级评分模块输出结果。
AI.result: AHIQ在四个标准IQA数据集及NTIRE 2022挑战赛FR赛道中均优于现有最佳方法，取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效结合了Transformer与CNN的优势，通过注意力机制建模空间关系，显著提升了GAN图像质量评估性能。

authors_text: Shaozu Yuan,Ruixue Liu,Meng Chen,Baoyang Chen,Zhijie Qiu,Xiaodong He
title: SE-GAN: Skeleton Enhanced GAN-based Model for Brush Handwriting Font Generation
title_zh: SE-GAN：基于骨架增强 GAN 的毛笔手写字体生成模型
abstract: Previous works on font generation mainly focus on the standard print fonts where character's shape is stable and strokes are clearly separated. There is rare research on brush handwriting font generation, which involves holistic structure changes and complex strokes transfer. To address this issue, we propose a novel GAN-based image translation model by integrating the skeleton information. We first extract the skeleton from training images, then design an image encoder and a skeleton encoder to extract corresponding features. A self-attentive refined attention module is devised to guide the model to learn distinctive features between different domains. A skeleton discriminator is involved to first synthesize the skeleton image from the generated image with a pre-trained generator, then to judge its realness to the target one. We also contribute a large-scale brush handwriting font image dataset with six styles and 15,000 high-resolution images. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results demonstrate the competitiveness of our proposed model.
summary: Previous works on font generation mainly focus on the standard print fonts where character's shape is stable and strokes are clearly separated. There is rare research on brush handwriting font generation, which involves holistic structure changes and complex strokes transfer. To address this issue, we propose a novel GAN-based image translation model by integrating the skeleton information. We first extract the skeleton from training images, then design an image encoder and a skeleton encoder to extract corresponding features. A self-attentive refined attention module is devised to guide the model to learn distinctive features between different domains. A skeleton discriminator is involved to first synthesize the skeleton image from the generated image with a pre-trained generator, then to judge its realness to the target one. We also contribute a large-scale brush handwriting font image dataset with six styles and 15,000 high-resolution images. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results demonstrate the competitiveness of our proposed model.
abstract_zh: 以前的字体生成工作主要集中在标准打印字体上，其中字符形状稳定且笔画分离清晰。对于毛笔字体生成的研究很少，涉及整体结构变化和复杂笔画转移。为了解决这个问题，我们通过整合骨架信息提出了一种新颖的基于 GAN 的图像翻译模型。我们首先从训练图像中提取骨架，然后设计图像编码器和骨架编码器来提取相应的特征。设计了一个自我关注的精细注意力模块来指导模型学习不同领域之间的独特特征。骨架鉴别器首先使用预先训练的生成器从生成的图像中合成骨架图像，然后判断其与目标图像的真实性。我们还贡献了一个包含六种风格和 15,000 张高分辨率图像的大规模毛笔手写字体图像数据集。定量和定性实验结果都证明了我们提出的模型的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于骨架增强的生成对抗网络（SE-GAN）模型，用于生成毛笔手写字体。
AI.motivation: 现有字体生成研究主要针对印刷字体，而毛笔手写体因结构变化大、笔画复杂，缺乏有效生成方法。
AI.method: 通过提取训练图像的骨架信息，设计图像编码器与骨架编码器提取特征，并引入自注意力模块和骨架判别器，结合预训练生成器合成骨架图像进行判别。
AI.result: 实验结果表明模型在定量和定性评估中均表现优异，同时贡献了一个包含六种风格、15000张高分辨率图像的毛笔手写字体数据集。
AI.conclusion: SE-GAN通过整合骨架信息有效解决了毛笔手写体生成难题，验证了方法的有效性并推动了相关研究发展。

authors_text: Senmao Ye,Fei Liu,Minkui Tan
title: Recurrent Affine Transformation for Text-to-image Synthesis
title_zh: 用于文本到图像合成的循环仿射变换
abstract: Text-to-image synthesis aims to generate natural images conditioned on text descriptions. The main difficulty of this task lies in effectively fusing text information into the image synthesis process. Existing methods usually adaptively fuse suitable text information into the synthesis process with multiple isolated fusion blocks (e.g., Conditional Batch Normalization and Instance Normalization). However, isolated fusion blocks not only conflict with each other but also increase the difficulty of training (see first page of the supplementary). To address these issues, we propose a Recurrent Affine Transformation (RAT) for Generative Adversarial Networks that connects all the fusion blocks with a recurrent neural network to model their long-term dependency. Besides, to improve semantic consistency between texts and synthesized images, we incorporate a spatial attention model in the discriminator. Being aware of matching image regions, text descriptions supervise the generator to synthesize more relevant image contents. Extensive experiments on the CUB, Oxford-102 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in comparison to state-of-the-art models \footnote{https://github.com/senmaoy/Recurrent-Affine-Transformation-for-Text-to-image-Synthesis.git}
summary: Text-to-image synthesis aims to generate natural images conditioned on text descriptions. The main difficulty of this task lies in effectively fusing text information into the image synthesis process. Existing methods usually adaptively fuse suitable text information into the synthesis process with multiple isolated fusion blocks (e.g., Conditional Batch Normalization and Instance Normalization). However, isolated fusion blocks not only conflict with each other but also increase the difficulty of training (see first page of the supplementary). To address these issues, we propose a Recurrent Affine Transformation (RAT) for Generative Adversarial Networks that connects all the fusion blocks with a recurrent neural network to model their long-term dependency. Besides, to improve semantic consistency between texts and synthesized images, we incorporate a spatial attention model in the discriminator. Being aware of matching image regions, text descriptions supervise the generator to synthesize more relevant image contents. Extensive experiments on the CUB, Oxford-102 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in comparison to state-of-the-art models \footnote{https://github.com/senmaoy/Recurrent-Affine-Transformation-for-Text-to-image-Synthesis.git}
abstract_zh: 文本到图像的合成旨在生成以文本描述为条件的自然图像。该任务的主要难点在于如何将文本信息有效地融合到图像合成过程中。现有方法通常通过多个孤立的融合块（例如条件批量归一化和实例归一化）自适应地将合适的文本信息融合到合成过程中。然而，孤立的融合块不仅相互冲突，而且增加了训练难度（参见补充材料第一页）。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于生成对抗网络的循环仿射变换（RAT），它将所有融合块与循环神经网络连接起来，以对其长期依赖性进行建模。此外，为了提高文本和合成图像之间的语义一致性，我们在鉴别器中引入了空间注意模型。意识到匹配的图像区域，文本描述监督生成器合成更多相关的图像内容。对 CUB、Oxford-102 和 COCO 数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的模型与最先进的模型相比的优越性 \footnote{https://github.com/senmaoy/Recurrent-Affine-Transformation-for-Text-to-image-Synthesis.git}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于文本到图像合成的递归仿射变换方法，旨在更有效地融合文本信息以生成自然图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过多个孤立的融合模块（如条件批量归一化和实例归一化）来适应性地融合文本信息，但这些模块之间存在冲突，增加了训练难度。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种递归仿射变换（RAT）方法，通过递归神经网络连接所有融合模块以建模其长期依赖关系，并在判别器中引入空间注意力模型以提高文本与生成图像之间的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在CUB、Oxford-102和COCO数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出模型在与最先进模型的比较中表现优越。
AI.conclusion: 递归仿射变换方法通过连接融合模块并引入空间注意力模型，有效提高了文本到图像合成的性能。

search_text: Recurrent Affine Transformation for Text-to-image Synthesis 用于文本到图像合成的循环仿射变换 Text-to-image synthesis aims to generate natural images conditioned on text descriptions. The main difficulty of this task lies in effectively fusing text information into the image synthesis process. Existing methods usually adaptively fuse suitable text information into the synthesis process with multiple isolated fusion blocks (e.g., Conditional Batch Normalization and Instance Normalization). However, isolated fusion blocks not only conflict with each other but also increase the difficulty of training (see first page of the supplementary). To address these issues, we propose a Recurrent Affine Transformation (RAT) for Generative Adversarial Networks that connects all the fusion blocks with a recurrent neural network to model their long-term dependency. Besides, to improve semantic consistency between texts and synthesized images, we incorporate a spatial attention model in the discriminator. Being aware of matching image regions, text descriptions supervise the generator to synthesize more relevant image contents. Extensive experiments on the CUB, Oxford-102 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in comparison to state-of-the-art models \footnote{https://github.com/senmaoy/Recurrent-Affine-Transformation-for-Text-to-image-Synthesis.git} 文本到图像的合成旨在生成以文本描述为条件的自然图像。该任务的主要难点在于如何将文本信息有效地融合到图像合成过程中。现有方法通常通过多个孤立的融合块（例如条件批量归一化和实例归一化）自适应地将合适的文本信息融合到合成过程中。然而，孤立的融合块不仅相互冲突，而且增加了训练难度（参见补充材料第一页）。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于生成对抗网络的循环仿射变换（RAT），它将所有融合块与循环神经网络连接起来，以对其长期依赖性进行建模。此外，为了提高文本和合成图像之间的语义一致性，我们在鉴别器中引入了空间注意模型。意识到匹配的图像区域，文本描述监督生成器合成更多相关的图像内容。对 CUB、Oxford-102 和 COCO 数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的模型与最先进的模型相比的优越性 \footnote{https://github.com/senmaoy/Recurrent-Affine-Transformation-for-Text-to-image-Synthesis.git} 本文提出了一种用于文本到图像合成的递归仿射变换方法，旨在更有效地融合文本信息以生成自然图像。 Senmao Ye,Fei Liu,Minkui Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Shengze Wang,YoungJoong Kwon,Yuan Shen,Qian Zhang,Andrei State,Jia-Bin Huang,Henry Fuchs
title: Learning Dynamic View Synthesis With Few RGBD Cameras
title_zh: 使用少量 RGBD 相机学习动态视图合成
comment: One of the coauthors believes that this work should be improved more before releasing it on arXiv, and thus suggested withdrawing this paper. There will not be a replacement for this paper
comments: One of the coauthors believes that this work should be improved more before releasing it on arXiv, and thus suggested withdrawing this paper. There will not be a replacement for this paper
abstract: There have been significant advancements in dynamic novel view synthesis in recent years. However, current deep learning models often require (1) prior models (e.g., SMPL human models), (2) heavy pre-processing, or (3) per-scene optimization. We propose to utilize RGBD cameras to remove these limitations and synthesize free-viewpoint videos of dynamic indoor scenes. We generate feature point clouds from RGBD frames and then render them into free-viewpoint videos via a neural renderer. However, the inaccurate, unstable, and incomplete depth measurements induce severe distortions, flickering, and ghosting artifacts. We enforce spatial-temporal consistency via the proposed Cycle Reconstruction Consistency and Temporal Stabilization module to reduce these artifacts. We introduce a simple Regional Depth-Inpainting module that adaptively inpaints missing depth values to render complete novel views. Additionally, we present a Human-Things Interactions dataset to validate our approach and facilitate future research. The dataset consists of 43 multi-view RGBD video sequences of everyday activities, capturing complex interactions between human subjects and their surroundings. Experiments on the HTI dataset show that our method outperforms the baseline per-frame image fidelity and spatial-temporal consistency. We will release our code, and the dataset on the website soon.
summary: There have been significant advancements in dynamic novel view synthesis in recent years. However, current deep learning models often require (1) prior models (e.g., SMPL human models), (2) heavy pre-processing, or (3) per-scene optimization. We propose to utilize RGBD cameras to remove these limitations and synthesize free-viewpoint videos of dynamic indoor scenes. We generate feature point clouds from RGBD frames and then render them into free-viewpoint videos via a neural renderer. However, the inaccurate, unstable, and incomplete depth measurements induce severe distortions, flickering, and ghosting artifacts. We enforce spatial-temporal consistency via the proposed Cycle Reconstruction Consistency and Temporal Stabilization module to reduce these artifacts. We introduce a simple Regional Depth-Inpainting module that adaptively inpaints missing depth values to render complete novel views. Additionally, we present a Human-Things Interactions dataset to validate our approach and facilitate future research. The dataset consists of 43 multi-view RGBD video sequences of everyday activities, capturing complex interactions between human subjects and their surroundings. Experiments on the HTI dataset show that our method outperforms the baseline per-frame image fidelity and spatial-temporal consistency. We will release our code, and the dataset on the website soon.
abstract_zh: 近年来，动态小说视图合成取得了重大进展。然而，当前的深度学习模型通常需要（1）先验模型（例如 SMPL 人类模型），（2）大量预处理，或（3）每个场景优化。我们建议利用 RGBD 相机来消除这些限制并合成动态室内场景的自由视点视频。我们从 RGBD 帧生成特征点云，然后通过神经渲染器将它们渲染成自由视点视频。然而，不准确、不稳定和不完整的深度测量会导致严重的失真、闪烁和重影伪影。我们通过提出的循环重建一致性和时间稳定模块来强制执行时空一致性，以减少这些伪影。我们引入了一个简单的区域深度修复模块，该模块可以自适应地修复缺失的深度值以呈现完整的新颖视图。此外，我们还提供了人与物交互数据集来验证我们的方法并促进未来的研究。该数据集由 43 个日常活动的多视图 RGBD 视频序列组成，捕捉人类主体与其周围环境之间的复杂交互。 HTI 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法优于基线每帧图像保真度和时空一致性。我们将很快在网站上发布我们的代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用少量RGBD摄像头生成动态室内场景自由视角视频的方法，解决现有深度学习模型依赖先验模型、预处理或场景优化的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态新视角合成方法存在依赖先验模型（如SMPL人体模型）、需要复杂预处理或逐场景优化等局限性，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 通过RGBD帧生成特征点云并使用神经渲染器生成视频，结合时空一致性模块（Cycle Reconstruction Consistency和Temporal Stabilization）及区域深度补全模块减少伪影。
AI.result: 在自建的Human-Things Interactions数据集（含43个RGBD视频序列）上，该方法在图像保真度和时空一致性指标上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RGBD驱动方法有效克服了传统方法的局限性，通过开源代码和数据集推动相关研究发展。

We propose to utilize RGBD cameras to remove these limitations and synthesize free-viewpoint videos of dynamic indoor scenes. authors_text: Amir Abboud,Karl Bringmann,Seri Khoury,Or Zamir
title: Hardness of Approximation in P via Short Cycle Removal: Cycle Detection, Distance Oracles, and Beyond
title_zh: 通过短周期去除实现 P 近似的难度：周期检测、距离预言等
comment: The abstract was slightly shortened to meet arXiv requirements. Appears in STOC 2022
comments: The abstract was slightly shortened to meet arXiv requirements. Appears in STOC 2022
abstract: We present a new technique for efficiently removing almost all short cycles in a graph without unintentionally removing its triangles. Consequently, triangle finding problems do not become easy even in almost $k$-cycle free graphs, for any constant $k\geq 4$. Triangle finding is at the base of many conditional lower bounds in P, mainly for distance computation problems, and the existence of many $4$- or $5$-cycles in a worst-case instance had been the obstacle towards resolving major open questions. Hardness of approximation: Are there distance oracles with $m^{1+o(1)}$ preprocessing time and $m^{o(1)}$ query time that achieve a constant approximation? Existing algorithms with such desirable time bounds only achieve super-constant approximation factors, while only $3-ε$ factors were conditionally ruled out (Pătraşcu, Roditty, and Thorup; FOCS 2012). We prove that no $O(1)$ approximations are possible, assuming the $3$-SUM or APSP conjectures. In particular, we prove that $k$-approximations require $Ω(m^{1+1/ck})$ time, which is tight up to the constant $c$. The lower bound holds even for the offline version where we are given the queries in advance, and extends to other problems such as dynamic shortest paths. The $4$-Cycle problem: An infamous open question in fine-grained complexity is to establish any surprising consequences from a subquadratic or even linear-time algorithm for detecting a $4$-cycle in a graph. We prove that $Ω(m^{1.1194})$ time is needed for $k$-cycle detection for all $k\geq 4$, unless we can detect a triangle in $\sqrt{n}$-degree graphs in $O(n^{2-δ})$ time; a breakthrough that is not known to follow even from optimal matrix multiplication algorithms.
summary: We present a new technique for efficiently removing almost all short cycles in a graph without unintentionally removing its triangles. Consequently, triangle finding problems do not become easy even in almost $k$-cycle free graphs, for any constant $k\geq 4$. Triangle finding is at the base of many conditional lower bounds in P, mainly for distance computation problems, and the existence of many $4$- or $5$-cycles in a worst-case instance had been the obstacle towards resolving major open questions. Hardness of approximation: Are there distance oracles with $m^{1+o(1)}$ preprocessing time and $m^{o(1)}$ query time that achieve a constant approximation? Existing algorithms with such desirable time bounds only achieve super-constant approximation factors, while only $3-ε$ factors were conditionally ruled out (Pătraşcu, Roditty, and Thorup; FOCS 2012). We prove that no $O(1)$ approximations are possible, assuming the $3$-SUM or APSP conjectures. In particular, we prove that $k$-approximations require $Ω(m^{1+1/ck})$ time, which is tight up to the constant $c$. The lower bound holds even for the offline version where we are given the queries in advance, and extends to other problems such as dynamic shortest paths. The $4$-Cycle problem: An infamous open question in fine-grained complexity is to establish any surprising consequences from a subquadratic or even linear-time algorithm for detecting a $4$-cycle in a graph. We prove that $Ω(m^{1.1194})$ time is needed for $k$-cycle detection for all $k\geq 4$, unless we can detect a triangle in $\sqrt{n}$-degree graphs in $O(n^{2-δ})$ time; a breakthrough that is not known to follow even from optimal matrix multiplication algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新技术，可以有效地删除图中几乎所有的短周期，而不会无意中删除其三角形。因此，对于任何常数 $k\geq 4$，即使在几乎 $k$ 周期的自由图中，三角形查找问题也不会变得容易。三角形发现是 P 中许多条件下界的基础，主要用于距离计算问题，并且在最坏情况下存在许多 4 美元或 5 美元循环一直是解决主要开放问题的障碍。近似难度：是否存在具有 $m^{1+o(1)}$ 预处理时间和 $m^{o(1)}$ 查询时间的距离预言机可以实现恒定的近似？具有如此理想时间范围的现有算法只能实现超常数近似因子，而只有 $3-ε$ 因子被有条件地排除（Pătraşcu、Rodtty 和 Thorup；FOCS 2012）。假设 $3$-SUM 或 APSP 猜想，我们证明不可能有 $O(1)$ 近似。特别是，我们证明 $k$ 近似需要 $Ω(m^{1+1/ck})$ 时间，这与常数 $c$ 紧密相关。即使对于我们提前给出查询的离线版本，下限也成立，并扩展到其他问题，例如动态最短路径。 4 美元循环问题：细粒度复杂性中一个臭名昭著的开放问题是，通过次二次甚至线性时间算法来检测图中的 4 美元循环，从而确定任何令人惊讶的结果。我们证明，对于所有 $k\geq 4$ 的 $k$ 周期检测需要 $Ω(m^{1.1194})$ 时间，除非我们可以在 $O(n^{2-δ})$ 时间内检测到 $\sqrt{n}$ 度图中的三角形；即使是最优矩阵乘法算法也无法实现这一突破。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效去除图中短环的新技术，用于解决距离计算问题的近似硬度，并证明了在特定假设下无法实现常数近似比，同时分析了4-环检测的复杂度下界。
AI.motivation: 现有距离预言机算法在预处理和查询时间上无法达到常数近似比，且4-环检测的复杂度下界问题长期未解，需通过理论分析明确其计算难度。
AI.method: 通过设计去除短环而不破坏三角形的算法，结合3-SUM和APSP猜想，建立近似硬度的条件性下界，并分析4-环检测与三角形检测的复杂度关系。
AI.result: 证明了常数近似比的距离预言机不可能存在，k-近似需Ω(m^{1+1/ck})时间；4-环检测需Ω(m^{1.1194})时间，除非三角形检测取得突破性进展。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了P类问题近似硬度的理解，为距离计算和动态最短路径问题提供了理论限制，并推动了细粒度复杂度理论的发展。

search_text: Hardness of Approximation in P via Short Cycle Removal: Cycle Detection, Distance Oracles, and Beyond 通过短周期去除实现 P 近似的难度：周期检测、距离预言等 We present a new technique for efficiently removing almost all short cycles in a graph without unintentionally removing its triangles. Consequently, triangle finding problems do not become easy even in almost $k$-cycle free graphs, for any constant $k\geq 4$. Triangle finding is at the base of many conditional lower bounds in P, mainly for distance computation problems, and the existence of many $4$- or $5$-cycles in a worst-case instance had been the obstacle towards resolving major open questions. Hardness of approximation: Are there distance oracles with $m^{1+o(1)}$ preprocessing time and $m^{o(1)}$ query time that achieve a constant approximation? Existing algorithms with such desirable time bounds only achieve super-constant approximation factors, while only $3-ε$ factors were conditionally ruled out (Pătraşcu, Roditty, and Thorup; FOCS 2012). We prove that no $O(1)$ approximations are possible, assuming the $3$-SUM or APSP conjectures. In particular, we prove that $k$-approximations require $Ω(m^{1+1/ck})$ time, which is tight up to the constant $c$. The lower bound holds even for the offline version where we are given the queries in advance, and extends to other problems such as dynamic shortest paths. The $4$-Cycle problem: An infamous open question in fine-grained complexity is to establish any surprising consequences from a subquadratic or even linear-time algorithm for detecting a $4$-cycle in a graph. We prove that $Ω(m^{1.1194})$ time is needed for $k$-cycle detection for all $k\geq 4$, unless we can detect a triangle in $\sqrt{n}$-degree graphs in $O(n^{2-δ})$ time; a breakthrough that is not known to follow even from optimal matrix multiplication algorithms. 我们提出了一种新技术，可以有效地删除图中几乎所有的短周期，而不会无意中删除其三角形。因此，对于任何常数 $k\geq 4$，即使在几乎 $k$ 周期的自由图中，三角形查找问题也不会变得容易。三角形发现是 P 中许多条件下界的基础，主要用于距离计算问题，并且在最坏情况下存在许多 4 美元或 5 美元循环一直是解决主要开放问题的障碍。近似难度：是否存在具有 $m^{1+o(1)}$ 预处理时间和 $m^{o(1)}$ 查询时间的距离预言机可以实现恒定的近似？具有如此理想时间范围的现有算法只能实现超常数近似因子，而只有 $3-ε$ 因子被有条件地排除（Pătraşcu、Rodtty 和 Thorup；FOCS 2012）。假设 $3$-SUM 或 APSP 猜想，我们证明不可能有 $O(1)$ 近似。特别是，我们证明 $k$ 近似需要 $Ω(m^{1+1/ck})$ 时间，这与常数 $c$ 紧密相关。即使对于我们提前给出查询的离线版本，下限也成立，并扩展到其他问题，例如动态最短路径。 4 美元循环问题：细粒度复杂性中一个臭名昭著的开放问题是，通过次二次甚至线性时间算法来检测图中的 4 美元循环，从而确定任何令人惊讶的结果。我们证明，对于所有 $k\geq 4$ 的 $k$ 周期检测需要 $Ω(m^{1.1194})$ 时间，除非我们可以在 $O(n^{2-δ})$ 时间内检测到 $\sqrt{n}$ 度图中的三角形；即使是最优矩阵乘法算法也无法实现这一突破。 本文提出了一种高效去除图中短环的新技术，用于解决距离计算问题的近似硬度，并证明了在特定假设下无法实现常数近似比，同时分析了4-环检测的复杂度下界。 Amir Abboud,Karl Bringmann,Seri Khoury,Or Zamir cs.DS

authors_text: Yuri Nakao,Simone Stumpf,Subeida Ahmed,Aisha Naseer,Lorenzo Strappelli
title: Towards Involving End-users in Interactive Human-in-the-loop AI Fairness
title_zh: 让最终用户参与交互式人机交互人工智能公平性
abstract: Ensuring fairness in artificial intelligence (AI) is important to counteract bias and discrimination in far-reaching applications. Recent work has started to investigate how humans judge fairness and how to support machine learning (ML) experts in making their AI models fairer. Drawing inspiration from an Explainable AI (XAI) approach called \emph{explanatory debugging} used in interactive machine learning, our work explores designing interpretable and interactive human-in-the-loop interfaces that allow ordinary end-users without any technical or domain background to identify potential fairness issues and possibly fix them in the context of loan decisions. Through workshops with end-users, we co-designed and implemented a prototype system that allowed end-users to see why predictions were made, and then to change weights on features to "debug" fairness issues. We evaluated the use of this prototype system through an online study. To investigate the implications of diverse human values about fairness around the globe, we also explored how cultural dimensions might play a role in using this prototype. Our results contribute to the design of interfaces to allow end-users to be involved in judging and addressing AI fairness through a human-in-the-loop approach.
summary: Ensuring fairness in artificial intelligence (AI) is important to counteract bias and discrimination in far-reaching applications. Recent work has started to investigate how humans judge fairness and how to support machine learning (ML) experts in making their AI models fairer. Drawing inspiration from an Explainable AI (XAI) approach called \emph{explanatory debugging} used in interactive machine learning, our work explores designing interpretable and interactive human-in-the-loop interfaces that allow ordinary end-users without any technical or domain background to identify potential fairness issues and possibly fix them in the context of loan decisions. Through workshops with end-users, we co-designed and implemented a prototype system that allowed end-users to see why predictions were made, and then to change weights on features to "debug" fairness issues. We evaluated the use of this prototype system through an online study. To investigate the implications of diverse human values about fairness around the globe, we also explored how cultural dimensions might play a role in using this prototype. Our results contribute to the design of interfaces to allow end-users to be involved in judging and addressing AI fairness through a human-in-the-loop approach.
abstract_zh: 确保人工智能 (AI) 的公平性对于消除影响深远的应用中的偏见和歧视非常重要。最近的工作已经开始调查人类如何判断公平性以及如何支持机器学习 (ML) 专家使他们的人工智能模型更加公平。我们的工作从交互式机器学习中使用的一种名为“emph{解释性调试””的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 方法中汲取灵感，探索设计可解释和交互式人机交互界面，使没有任何技术或领域背景的普通最终用户能够识别潜在的公平性问题，并可能在贷款决策的背景下解决这些问题。通过与最终用户的研讨会，我们共同设计并实现了一个原型系统，使最终用户能够了解做出预测的原因，然后更改特征的权重以“调试”公平性问题。我们通过在线研究评估了该原型系统的使用情况。为了研究不同人类价值观对全球公平的影响，我们还探讨了文化维度如何在使用这个原型时发挥作用。我们的结果有助于界面设计，使最终用户能够通过人机交互的方式参与判断和解决人工智能公平性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种交互式人类在环（human-in-the-loop）接口，使普通终端用户能够参与识别和修正AI模型中的公平性问题，特别是在贷款决策场景中。
AI.motivation: 人工智能的公平性对减少偏见和歧视至关重要，但现有研究多聚焦于专家群体，缺乏对非技术背景终端用户参与公平性判断的支持。
AI.method: 受可解释AI的'解释性调试'方法启发，通过工作坊与终端用户协作设计原型系统，允许用户查看预测依据并调整特征权重以修正公平性问题，并通过在线研究评估系统效果及文化维度的影响。
AI.result: 原型系统使终端用户能有效识别公平性问题，且不同文化背景用户的公平性判断存在显著差异，验证了文化维度对系统使用的影响。
AI.conclusion: 交互式接口可赋能终端用户参与AI公平性治理，未来需进一步考虑文化多样性对公平性标准的影响以优化系统设计。

authors_text: Lin Yao,Jianfei Song,Ruizhuo Xu,Yingfang Yang,Zijian Chen,Yafeng Deng
title: WaBERT: A Low-resource End-to-end Model for Spoken Language Understanding and Speech-to-BERT Alignment
title_zh: WaBERT：一种用于口语理解和语音与 BERT 对齐的低资源端到端模型
abstract: Historically lower-level tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speaker identification are the main focus in the speech field. Interest has been growing in higher-level spoken language understanding (SLU) tasks recently, like sentiment analysis (SA). However, improving performances on SLU tasks remains a big challenge. Basically, there are two main methods for SLU tasks: (1) Two-stage method, which uses a speech model to transfer speech to text, then uses a language model to get the results of downstream tasks; (2) One-stage method, which just fine-tunes a pre-trained speech model to fit in the downstream tasks. The first method loses emotional cues such as intonation, and causes recognition errors during ASR process, and the second one lacks necessary language knowledge. In this paper, we propose the Wave BERT (WaBERT), a novel end-to-end model combining the speech model and the language model for SLU tasks. WaBERT is based on the pre-trained speech and language model, hence training from scratch is not needed. We also set most parameters of WaBERT frozen during training. By introducing WaBERT, audio-specific information and language knowledge are integrated in the short-time and low-resource training process to improve results on the dev dataset of SLUE SA tasks by 1.15% of recall score and 0.82% of F1 score. Additionally, we modify the serial Continuous Integrate-and-Fire (CIF) mechanism to achieve the monotonic alignment between the speech and text modalities.
summary: Historically lower-level tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speaker identification are the main focus in the speech field. Interest has been growing in higher-level spoken language understanding (SLU) tasks recently, like sentiment analysis (SA). However, improving performances on SLU tasks remains a big challenge. Basically, there are two main methods for SLU tasks: (1) Two-stage method, which uses a speech model to transfer speech to text, then uses a language model to get the results of downstream tasks; (2) One-stage method, which just fine-tunes a pre-trained speech model to fit in the downstream tasks. The first method loses emotional cues such as intonation, and causes recognition errors during ASR process, and the second one lacks necessary language knowledge. In this paper, we propose the Wave BERT (WaBERT), a novel end-to-end model combining the speech model and the language model for SLU tasks. WaBERT is based on the pre-trained speech and language model, hence training from scratch is not needed. We also set most parameters of WaBERT frozen during training. By introducing WaBERT, audio-specific information and language knowledge are integrated in the short-time and low-resource training process to improve results on the dev dataset of SLUE SA tasks by 1.15% of recall score and 0.82% of F1 score. Additionally, we modify the serial Continuous Integrate-and-Fire (CIF) mechanism to achieve the monotonic alignment between the speech and text modalities.
abstract_zh: 历史上，自动语音识别（ASR）和说话人识别等较低级别的任务是语音领域的主要焦点。最近，人们对更高级别的口语理解 (SLU) 任务越来越感兴趣，例如情感分析 (SA)。然而，提高 SLU 任务的性能仍然是一个巨大的挑战。基本上，SLU任务主要有两种方法：（1）两阶段方法，使用语音模型将语音转换为文本，然后使用语言模型得到下游任务的结果； （2）一阶段方法，仅微调预训练的语音模型以适应下游任务。第一种方法丢失了语调等情感线索，导致 ASR 过程中的识别错误；第二种方法缺乏必要的语言知识。在本文中，我们提出了 Wave BERT (WaBERT)，这是一种结合了 SLU 任务的语音模型和语言模型的新型端到端模型。 WaBERT 基于预先训练的语音和语言模型，因此不需要从头开始训练。我们还在训练期间冻结了 WaBERT 的大部分参数。通过引入WaBERT，将音频特定信息和语言知识集成到短时间、低资源的训练过程中，将SLUE SA任务的开发数据集结果提高了1.15%的召回分数和0.82%的F1分数。此外，我们修改了串行连续集成和触发（CIF）机制，以实现语音和文本模态之间的单调对齐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WaBERT模型，结合语音和语言模型，解决低资源环境下的口语理解任务。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段方法丢失情感线索且存在ASR错误，单阶段方法缺乏语言知识，需开发整合语音与语言信息的端到端模型。
AI.method: 基于预训练语音和语言模型，冻结大部分参数，引入修改后的CIF机制实现语音与文本模态的单调对齐。
AI.result: 在SLUE SA任务验证集上，召回率提升1.15%，F1分数提升0.82%。
AI.conclusion: WaBERT通过整合音频信息与语言知识，在低资源训练下有效提升口语理解性能并实现跨模态对齐。

authors_text: Xinran Wang,Nicolas Rojas
title: A Data-Efficient Model-Based Learning Framework for the Closed-Loop Control of Continuum Robots
title_zh: 用于连续体机器人闭环控制的基于数据高效模型的学习框架
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) on Feb 7th 2022
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) on Feb 7th 2022
abstract: Traditional dynamic models of continuum robots are in general computationally expensive and not suitable for real-time control. Recent approaches using learning-based methods to approximate the dynamic model of continuum robots for control have been promising, although real data hungry -- which may cause potential damage to robots and be time consuming -- and getting poorer performance when trained with simulation data only. This paper presents a model-based learning framework for continuum robot closed-loop control that, by combining simulation and real data, shows to require only 100 real data to outperform a real-data-only controller trained using up to 10000 points. The introduced data-efficient framework with three control policies has utilized a Gaussian process regression (GPR) and a recurrent neural network (RNN). Control policy A uses a GPR model and a RNN trained in simulation to optimize control outputs for simulated targets; control policy B retrains the RNN in policy A with data generated from the GPR model to adapt to real robot physics; control policy C utilizes policy A and B to form a hybrid policy. Using a continuum robot with soft spines, we show that our approach provides an efficient framework to bridge the sim-to-real gap in model-based learning for continuum robots.
summary: Traditional dynamic models of continuum robots are in general computationally expensive and not suitable for real-time control. Recent approaches using learning-based methods to approximate the dynamic model of continuum robots for control have been promising, although real data hungry -- which may cause potential damage to robots and be time consuming -- and getting poorer performance when trained with simulation data only. This paper presents a model-based learning framework for continuum robot closed-loop control that, by combining simulation and real data, shows to require only 100 real data to outperform a real-data-only controller trained using up to 10000 points. The introduced data-efficient framework with three control policies has utilized a Gaussian process regression (GPR) and a recurrent neural network (RNN). Control policy A uses a GPR model and a RNN trained in simulation to optimize control outputs for simulated targets; control policy B retrains the RNN in policy A with data generated from the GPR model to adapt to real robot physics; control policy C utilizes policy A and B to form a hybrid policy. Using a continuum robot with soft spines, we show that our approach provides an efficient framework to bridge the sim-to-real gap in model-based learning for continuum robots.
abstract_zh: 连续体机器人的传统动态模型通常计算量大且不适合实时控制。最近使用基于学习的方法来近似连续体机器人的动态模型以进行控制的方法一直很有前景，尽管真实数据匮乏（这可能会对机器人造成潜在损坏并且耗时）并且仅使用模拟数据进行训练时性能较差。本文提出了一种基于模型的连续机器人闭环控制学习框架，通过将仿真与真实数据相结合，该框架表明仅需要 100 个真实数据即可优于使用多达 10000 个点进行训练的纯真实数据控制器。引入的具有三种控制策略的数据高效框架利用了高斯过程回归（GPR）和循环神经网络（RNN）。控制策略A使用GPR模型和经过模拟训练的RNN来优化模拟目标的控制输出；控制策略 B 使用 GPR 模型生成的数据重新训练策略 A 中的 RNN，以适应真实的机器人物理；控制策略C利用策略A和B形成混合策略。使用具有软脊柱的连续体机器人，我们表明我们的方法提供了一个有效的框架来弥合连续体机器人基于模型的学习中的模拟与真实之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的学习框架，通过结合仿真与真实数据，实现对连续体机器人的闭环控制，显著减少真实数据需求。
AI.motivation: 传统连续体机器人动态模型计算成本高且不适用于实时控制，现有基于学习的方法依赖大量真实数据，存在损伤风险且效率低下。
AI.method: 融合高斯过程回归（GPR）与循环神经网络（RNN），设计三种控制策略：策略A基于仿真数据优化控制输出，策略B用GPR生成数据重新训练RNN以适应真实物理特性，策略C融合A与B形成混合策略。
AI.result: 仅需100个真实数据点即可超越使用最多10000个真实数据点的纯真实数据控制器，有效弥合仿真与现实间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过高效利用仿真与真实数据，为连续体机器人的模型基学习控制提供了减少真实数据依赖的解决方案。

authors_text: Yu-Jung Heo,Eun-Sol Kim,Woo Suk Choi,Byoung-Tak Zhang
title: Hypergraph Transformer: Weakly-supervised Multi-hop Reasoning for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering
title_zh: Hypergraph Transformer：基于知识的视觉问答的弱监督多跳推理
abstract: Knowledge-based visual question answering (QA) aims to answer a question which requires visually-grounded external knowledge beyond image content itself. Answering complex questions that require multi-hop reasoning under weak supervision is considered as a challenging problem since i) no supervision is given to the reasoning process and ii) high-order semantics of multi-hop knowledge facts need to be captured. In this paper, we introduce a concept of hypergraph to encode high-level semantics of a question and a knowledge base, and to learn high-order associations between them. The proposed model, Hypergraph Transformer, constructs a question hypergraph and a query-aware knowledge hypergraph, and infers an answer by encoding inter-associations between two hypergraphs and intra-associations in both hypergraph itself. Extensive experiments on two knowledge-based visual QA and two knowledge-based textual QA demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially for multi-hop reasoning problem. Our source code is available at https://github.com/yujungheo/kbvqa-public.
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (QA) aims to answer a question which requires visually-grounded external knowledge beyond image content itself. Answering complex questions that require multi-hop reasoning under weak supervision is considered as a challenging problem since i) no supervision is given to the reasoning process and ii) high-order semantics of multi-hop knowledge facts need to be captured. In this paper, we introduce a concept of hypergraph to encode high-level semantics of a question and a knowledge base, and to learn high-order associations between them. The proposed model, Hypergraph Transformer, constructs a question hypergraph and a query-aware knowledge hypergraph, and infers an answer by encoding inter-associations between two hypergraphs and intra-associations in both hypergraph itself. Extensive experiments on two knowledge-based visual QA and two knowledge-based textual QA demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially for multi-hop reasoning problem. Our source code is available at https://github.com/yujungheo/kbvqa-public.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答（QA）旨在回答需要图像内容本身之外的基于视觉的外部知识的问题。在弱监督下回答需要多跳推理的复杂问题被认为是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为i）推理过程没有监督，ii）需要捕获多跳知识事实的高阶语义。在本文中，我们引入了超图的概念来编码问题和知识库的高级语义，并学习它们之间的高阶关联。所提出的模型 Hypergraph Transformer 构建了一个问题超图和一个查询感知知识超图，并通过编码两个超图之间的相互关联以及两个超图本身的内部关联来推断答案。对两个基于知识的视觉 QA 和两个基于知识的文本 QA 的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，特别是对于多跳推理问题。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/yujungheo/kbvqa-public 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hypergraph Transformer模型，用于在弱监督条件下解决基于知识的视觉问答中的多跳推理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在无监督的多跳推理过程中捕捉知识库中的高阶语义关联，且无法有效建模复杂问题与知识间的高阶交互。
AI.method: 通过引入超图结构编码问题与知识库的高层语义，构建问题超图和查询感知的知识超图，利用Hypergraph Transformer学习超图间的跨关联及超图内部的关联。
AI.result: 在两个视觉问答和两个文本问答数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在多跳推理任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 超图结构能有效建模高阶语义关联，Hypergraph Transformer为弱监督下的多跳知识推理提供了新思路。

search_text: Hypergraph Transformer: Weakly-supervised Multi-hop Reasoning for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering Hypergraph Transformer：基于知识的视觉问答的弱监督多跳推理 Knowledge-based visual question answering (QA) aims to answer a question which requires visually-grounded external knowledge beyond image content itself. Answering complex questions that require multi-hop reasoning under weak supervision is considered as a challenging problem since i) no supervision is given to the reasoning process and ii) high-order semantics of multi-hop knowledge facts need to be captured. In this paper, we introduce a concept of hypergraph to encode high-level semantics of a question and a knowledge base, and to learn high-order associations between them. The proposed model, Hypergraph Transformer, constructs a question hypergraph and a query-aware knowledge hypergraph, and infers an answer by encoding inter-associations between two hypergraphs and intra-associations in both hypergraph itself. Extensive experiments on two knowledge-based visual QA and two knowledge-based textual QA demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially for multi-hop reasoning problem. Our source code is available at https://github.com/yujungheo/kbvqa-public. 基于知识的视觉问答（QA）旨在回答需要图像内容本身之外的基于视觉的外部知识的问题。在弱监督下回答需要多跳推理的复杂问题被认为是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为i）推理过程没有监督，ii）需要捕获多跳知识事实的高阶语义。在本文中，我们引入了超图的概念来编码问题和知识库的高级语义，并学习它们之间的高阶关联。所提出的模型 Hypergraph Transformer 构建了一个问题超图和一个查询感知知识超图，并通过编码两个超图之间的相互关联以及两个超图本身的内部关联来推断答案。对两个基于知识的视觉 QA 和两个基于知识的文本 QA 的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，特别是对于多跳推理问题。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/yujungheo/kbvqa-public 获取。 本文提出Hypergraph Transformer模型，用于在弱监督条件下解决基于知识的视觉问答中的多跳推理问题。 Yu-Jung Heo,Eun-Sol Kim,Woo Suk Choi,Byoung-Tak Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Devesh K. Jha,Diego Romeres,Siddarth Jain,William Yerazunis,Daniel Nikovski
title: Design of Adaptive Compliance Controllers for Safe Robotic Assembly
title_zh: 用于安全机器人装配的自适应顺应控制器设计
abstract: Insertion operations are a critical element of most robotic assembly operation, and peg-in-hole (PiH) insertion is one of the most widely studied tasks in the industrial and academic manipulation communities. PiH insertion is in fact an entire class of problems, where the complexity of the problem can depend on the type of misalignment and contact formation during an insertion attempt. In this paper, we present the design and analysis of adaptive compliance controllers which can be used in insertion-type assembly tasks, including learning-based compliance controllers which can be used for insertion problems in the presence of uncertainty in the goal location during robotic assembly. We first present the design of compliance controllers which can ensure safe operation of the robot by limiting experienced contact forces during contact formation. Consequently, we present analysis of the force signature obtained during the contact formation to learn the corrective action needed to perform insertion. Finally, we use the proposed compliance controllers and learned models to design a policy that can successfully perform insertion in novel test conditions with almost perfect success rate. We validate the proposed approach on a physical robotic test-bed using a 6-DoF manipulator arm.
summary: Insertion operations are a critical element of most robotic assembly operation, and peg-in-hole (PiH) insertion is one of the most widely studied tasks in the industrial and academic manipulation communities. PiH insertion is in fact an entire class of problems, where the complexity of the problem can depend on the type of misalignment and contact formation during an insertion attempt. In this paper, we present the design and analysis of adaptive compliance controllers which can be used in insertion-type assembly tasks, including learning-based compliance controllers which can be used for insertion problems in the presence of uncertainty in the goal location during robotic assembly. We first present the design of compliance controllers which can ensure safe operation of the robot by limiting experienced contact forces during contact formation. Consequently, we present analysis of the force signature obtained during the contact formation to learn the corrective action needed to perform insertion. Finally, we use the proposed compliance controllers and learned models to design a policy that can successfully perform insertion in novel test conditions with almost perfect success rate. We validate the proposed approach on a physical robotic test-bed using a 6-DoF manipulator arm.
abstract_zh: 插入操作是大多数机器人装配操作的关键要素，而孔中钉 (PiH) 插入是工业和学术操作界研究最广泛的任务之一。 PiH 插入实际上是一整类问题，其中问题的复杂性可能取决于插入尝试期间未对准和接触形成的类型。在本文中，我们提出了可用于插入型装配任务的自适应顺应控制器的设计和分析，包括基于学习的顺应控制器，可用于机器人装配过程中目标位置存在不确定性的插入问题。我们首先提出了顺从控制器的设计，它可以通过限制接触形成过程中的接触力来确保机器人的安全运行。因此，我们对接触形成过程中获得的力特征进行分析，以了解执行插入所需的纠正措施。最后，我们使用所提出的合规控制器和学习模型来设计一种策略，该策略可以在新颖的测试条件下成功执行插入，并且成功率几乎完美。我们使用 6-DoF 机械臂在物理机器人测试台上验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种自适应顺应性控制器，用于在存在不确定性的机器人装配任务中实现安全的插孔操作。
AI.motivation: 插孔装配是机器人操作中的关键任务，但因对准误差和接触力不确定性易导致失败或损坏，需提升控制器的适应性与安全性。
AI.method: 提出基于力反馈的顺应性控制器，通过限制接触力确保安全，并利用接触力特征学习校正动作；结合学习模型设计适应新工况的控制策略。
AI.result: 在六自由度机械臂物理实验平台上验证，新型控制器在多种未知场景下实现接近完美的装配成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应控制与力特征学习，有效解决了装配过程中的不确定性问题，提升了机器人装配的安全性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hormoz Shahrzad,Babak Hodjat,Risto Miikkulainen
title: EVOTER: Evolution of Transparent Explainable Rule-sets
title_zh: EVOTER：透明可解释规则集的演变
abstract: Most AI systems are black boxes generating reasonable outputs for given inputs. Some domains, however, have explainability and trustworthiness requirements that cannot be directly met by these approaches. Various methods have therefore been developed to interpret black-box models after training. This paper advocates an alternative approach where the models are transparent and explainable to begin with. This approach, EVOTER, evolves rule-sets based on simple logical expressions. The approach is evaluated in several prediction/classification and prescription/policy search domains with and without a surrogate. It is shown to discover meaningful rule sets that perform similarly to black-box models. The rules can provide insight into the domain, and make biases hidden in the data explicit. It may also be possible to edit them directly to remove biases and add constraints. EVOTER thus forms a promising foundation for building trustworthy AI systems for real-world applications in the future.
summary: Most AI systems are black boxes generating reasonable outputs for given inputs. Some domains, however, have explainability and trustworthiness requirements that cannot be directly met by these approaches. Various methods have therefore been developed to interpret black-box models after training. This paper advocates an alternative approach where the models are transparent and explainable to begin with. This approach, EVOTER, evolves rule-sets based on simple logical expressions. The approach is evaluated in several prediction/classification and prescription/policy search domains with and without a surrogate. It is shown to discover meaningful rule sets that perform similarly to black-box models. The rules can provide insight into the domain, and make biases hidden in the data explicit. It may also be possible to edit them directly to remove biases and add constraints. EVOTER thus forms a promising foundation for building trustworthy AI systems for real-world applications in the future.
abstract_zh: 大多数人工智能系统都是黑匣子，为给定的输入生成合理的输出。然而，某些领域具有这些方法无法直接满足的可解释性和可信度要求。因此，人们开发了各种方法来解释训练后的黑盒模型。本文提倡一种替代方法，其中模型从一开始就是透明且可解释的。这种方法 EVOTER 基于简单的逻辑表达式演化规则集。该方法在多个预测/分类和处方/政​​策搜索领域（有或没有代理）进行评估。它被证明可以发现有意义的规则集，其表现与黑盒模型类似。这些规则可以提供对领域的洞察，并使隐藏在数据中的偏见变得明确。也可以直接编辑它们以消除偏差并添加约束。因此，EVOTER 为未来为实际应用构建值得信赖的人工智能系统奠定了良好的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVOTER方法，通过进化透明可解释的规则集来构建可信AI系统。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统多为黑箱模型，难以满足医疗、司法等领域的可解释性要求，且后验解释方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 基于进化算法生成简单逻辑表达式构成的规则集，在预测/分类和政策搜索任务中进行评估，支持有无代理模型两种模式。
AI.result: 规则集性能与黑箱模型相当，可揭示数据偏见并允许直接编辑规则修正偏差，提升模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: EVOTER为构建可解释、可干预的可信AI系统提供了有效方法论，具有现实应用潜力。

Some domains, however, have explainability and trustworthiness requirements that cannot be directly met by these approaches. Various methods have therefore been developed to interpret black-box models after training. This paper advocates an alternative approach where the models are transparent and explainable to begin with. This approach, EVOTER, evolves rule-sets based on simple logical expressions. The approach is evaluated in several prediction/classification and prescription/policy search domains with and without a surrogate. It is shown to discover meaningful rule sets that perform similarly to black-box models. The rules can provide insight into the domain, and make biases hidden in the data explicit. It may also be possible to edit them directly to remove biases and add constraints. EVOTER thus forms a promising foundation for building trustworthy AI systems for real-world applications in the future. 大多数人工智能系统都是黑匣子，为给定的输入生成合理的输出。然而，某些领域具有这些方法无法直接满足的可解释性和可信度要求。因此，人们开发了各种方法来解释训练后的黑盒模型。本文提倡一种替代方法，其中模型从一开始就是透明且可解释的。这种方法 EVOTER 基于简单的逻辑表达式演化规则集。该方法在多个预测/分类和处方/政​​策搜索领域（有或没有代理）进行评估。它被证明可以发现有意义的规则集，其表现与黑盒模型类似。这些规则可以提供对领域的洞察，并使隐藏在数据中的偏见变得明确。也可以直接编辑它们以消除偏差并添加约束。因此，EVOTER 为未来为实际应用构建值得信赖的人工智能系统奠定了良好的基础。 本文提出EVOTER方法，通过进化透明可解释的规则集来构建可信AI系统。 Hormoz Shahrzad,Babak Hodjat,Risto Miikkulainen cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Fatemeh Haghighi,Mohammad Reza Hosseinzadeh Taher,Michael B. Gotway,Jianming Liang
title: DiRA: Discriminative, Restorative, and Adversarial Learning for Self-supervised Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: DiRA：用于自监督医学图像分析的判别性、恢复性和对抗性学习
abstract: Discriminative learning, restorative learning, and adversarial learning have proven beneficial for self-supervised learning schemes in computer vision and medical imaging. Existing efforts, however, omit their synergistic effects on each other in a ternary setup, which, we envision, can significantly benefit deep semantic representation learning. To realize this vision, we have developed DiRA, the first framework that unites discriminative, restorative, and adversarial learning in a unified manner to collaboratively glean complementary visual information from unlabeled medical images for fine-grained semantic representation learning. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that DiRA (1) encourages collaborative learning among three learning ingredients, resulting in more generalizable representation across organs, diseases, and modalities; (2) outperforms fully supervised ImageNet models and increases robustness in small data regimes, reducing annotation cost across multiple medical imaging applications; (3) learns fine-grained semantic representation, facilitating accurate lesion localization with only image-level annotation; and (4) enhances state-of-the-art restorative approaches, revealing that DiRA is a general mechanism for united representation learning. All code and pre-trained models are available at https: //github.com/JLiangLab/DiRA.
summary: Discriminative learning, restorative learning, and adversarial learning have proven beneficial for self-supervised learning schemes in computer vision and medical imaging. Existing efforts, however, omit their synergistic effects on each other in a ternary setup, which, we envision, can significantly benefit deep semantic representation learning. To realize this vision, we have developed DiRA, the first framework that unites discriminative, restorative, and adversarial learning in a unified manner to collaboratively glean complementary visual information from unlabeled medical images for fine-grained semantic representation learning. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that DiRA (1) encourages collaborative learning among three learning ingredients, resulting in more generalizable representation across organs, diseases, and modalities; (2) outperforms fully supervised ImageNet models and increases robustness in small data regimes, reducing annotation cost across multiple medical imaging applications; (3) learns fine-grained semantic representation, facilitating accurate lesion localization with only image-level annotation; and (4) enhances state-of-the-art restorative approaches, revealing that DiRA is a general mechanism for united representation learning. All code and pre-trained models are available at https: //github.com/JLiangLab/DiRA.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，判别性学习、恢复性学习和对抗性学习对于计算机视觉和医学成像领域的自我监督学习方案是有益的。然而，现有的努力忽略了它们在三元设置中相互之间的协同效应，我们认为这可以显着有利于深度语义表示学习。为了实现这一愿景，我们开发了 DiRA，这是第一个以统一方式将判别性学习、恢复性学习和对抗性学习结合在一起的框架，以协作从未标记的医学图像中收集互补的视觉信息，以进行细粒度的语义表示学习。我们广泛的实验表明，DiRA (1) 鼓励三种学习成分之间的协作学习，从而产生跨器官、疾病和模式的更普遍的表征； (2) 优于完全监督的 ImageNet 模型，并提高了小数据体系的鲁棒性，从而降低了多个医学成像应用程序的注释成本； （3）学习细粒度的语义表示，仅通过图像级注释即可实现准确的病变定位； (4) 增强最先进的恢复方法，揭示 DiRA 是联合表征学习的通用机制。所有代码和预训练模型均可在 https://github.com/JLiangLab/DiRA 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出DiRA框架，结合判别、修复和对抗学习，用于自监督医学图像分析以学习细粒度语义表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分利用三种学习方式的协同效应，而这种协同可能显著提升深度语义表示学习。
AI.method: 开发DiRA框架，统一判别、修复和对抗学习，协作从未标记医学图像中提取互补信息。
AI.result: 实验显示DiRA提升泛化能力，优于监督模型，减少标注成本，准确定位病变，并增强修复方法。
AI.conclusion: DiRA作为通用机制，适用于多种医学影像应用，提升自监督学习效果。

authors_text: Beliz Gunel,Arda Sahiner,Arjun D. Desai,Akshay S. Chaudhari,Shreyas Vasanawala,Mert Pilanci,John Pauly
title: Scale-Equivariant Unrolled Neural Networks for Data-Efficient Accelerated MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于数据高效加速 MRI 重建的尺度等变展开神经网络
abstract: Unrolled neural networks have enabled state-of-the-art reconstruction performance and fast inference times for the accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction task. However, these approaches depend on fully-sampled scans as ground truth data which is either costly or not possible to acquire in many clinical medical imaging applications; hence, reducing dependence on data is desirable. In this work, we propose modeling the proximal operators of unrolled neural networks with scale-equivariant convolutional neural networks in order to improve the data-efficiency and robustness to drifts in scale of the images that might stem from the variability of patient anatomies or change in field-of-view across different MRI scanners. Our approach demonstrates strong improvements over the state-of-the-art unrolled neural networks under the same memory constraints both with and without data augmentations on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scaled images without significantly increasing the train or inference time.
summary: Unrolled neural networks have enabled state-of-the-art reconstruction performance and fast inference times for the accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction task. However, these approaches depend on fully-sampled scans as ground truth data which is either costly or not possible to acquire in many clinical medical imaging applications; hence, reducing dependence on data is desirable. In this work, we propose modeling the proximal operators of unrolled neural networks with scale-equivariant convolutional neural networks in order to improve the data-efficiency and robustness to drifts in scale of the images that might stem from the variability of patient anatomies or change in field-of-view across different MRI scanners. Our approach demonstrates strong improvements over the state-of-the-art unrolled neural networks under the same memory constraints both with and without data augmentations on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scaled images without significantly increasing the train or inference time.
abstract_zh: 展开的神经网络为加速磁共振成像 (MRI) 重建任务提供了最先进的重建性能和快速的推理时间。然而，这些方法依赖于完全采样的扫描作为真实数据，在许多临床医学成像应用中获取这些数据要么成本高昂，要么不可能获取；因此，减少对数据的依赖是可取的。在这项工作中，我们建议使用尺度等变卷积神经网络对展开神经网络的近端算子进行建模，以提高数据效率和对图像尺度漂移的稳健性，这些漂移可能源于患者解剖结构的可变性或不同 MRI 扫描仪的视野变化。我们的方法在相同的内存约束下，在分布内和分布外缩放图像上有或没有数据增强的情况下，比最先进的展开神经网络有了很大的改进，而不会显着增加训练或推理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于尺度等变卷积神经网络的展开神经网络，用于提高加速MRI重建的数据效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI重建方法依赖昂贵的全采样数据，且对图像尺度变化敏感，导致临床应用受限。
AI.method: 通过将展开网络的近端算子替换为尺度等变卷积网络，增强模型对尺度变化的适应性并减少数据依赖。
AI.result: 在相同内存约束下，该方法在分布内/外测试中均优于现有方法，且训练/推理时间无显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 尺度等变性设计有效提升了MRI重建的数据效率和跨设备适应性，为低数据场景提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Chenfeng Xu,Tian Li,Chen Tang,Lingfeng Sun,Kurt Keutzer,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Alireza Fathi,Wei Zhan
title: PreTraM: Self-Supervised Pre-training via Connecting Trajectory and Map
title_zh: PreTraM：通过连接轨迹和地图进行自我监督预训练
abstract: Deep learning has recently achieved significant progress in trajectory forecasting. However, the scarcity of trajectory data inhibits the data-hungry deep-learning models from learning good representations. While mature representation learning methods exist in computer vision and natural language processing, these pre-training methods require large-scale data. It is hard to replicate these approaches in trajectory forecasting due to the lack of adequate trajectory data (e.g., 34K samples in the nuScenes dataset). To work around the scarcity of trajectory data, we resort to another data modality closely related to trajectories-HD-maps, which is abundantly provided in existing datasets. In this paper, we propose PreTraM, a self-supervised pre-training scheme via connecting trajectories and maps for trajectory forecasting. Specifically, PreTraM consists of two parts: 1) Trajectory-Map Contrastive Learning, where we project trajectories and maps to a shared embedding space with cross-modal contrastive learning, and 2) Map Contrastive Learning, where we enhance map representation with contrastive learning on large quantities of HD-maps. On top of popular baselines such as AgentFormer and Trajectron++, PreTraM boosts their performance by 5.5% and 6.9% relatively in FDE-10 on the challenging nuScenes dataset. We show that PreTraM improves data efficiency and scales well with model size.
summary: Deep learning has recently achieved significant progress in trajectory forecasting. However, the scarcity of trajectory data inhibits the data-hungry deep-learning models from learning good representations. While mature representation learning methods exist in computer vision and natural language processing, these pre-training methods require large-scale data. It is hard to replicate these approaches in trajectory forecasting due to the lack of adequate trajectory data (e.g., 34K samples in the nuScenes dataset). To work around the scarcity of trajectory data, we resort to another data modality closely related to trajectories-HD-maps, which is abundantly provided in existing datasets. In this paper, we propose PreTraM, a self-supervised pre-training scheme via connecting trajectories and maps for trajectory forecasting. Specifically, PreTraM consists of two parts: 1) Trajectory-Map Contrastive Learning, where we project trajectories and maps to a shared embedding space with cross-modal contrastive learning, and 2) Map Contrastive Learning, where we enhance map representation with contrastive learning on large quantities of HD-maps. On top of popular baselines such as AgentFormer and Trajectron++, PreTraM boosts their performance by 5.5% and 6.9% relatively in FDE-10 on the challenging nuScenes dataset. We show that PreTraM improves data efficiency and scales well with model size.
abstract_zh: 深度学习最近在轨迹预测方面取得了重大进展。然而，轨迹数据的稀缺阻碍了需要大量数据的深度学习模型学习良好的表示。虽然计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域存在成熟的表示学习方法，但这些预训练方法需要大规模数据。由于缺乏足够的轨迹数据（例如 nuScenes 数据集中的 34K 样本），很难在轨迹预测中复制这些方法。为了解决轨迹数据的稀缺问题，我们采用了另一种与轨迹密切相关的数据模式——高清地图，现有数据集中大量提供了这种数据模式。在本文中，我们提出了 PreTraM，一种通过连接轨迹和地图进行轨迹预测的自监督预训练方案。具体来说，PreTraM 由两部分组成：1）轨迹地图对比学习，我们通过跨模态对比学习将轨迹和地图投影到共享嵌入空间；2）地图对比学习，我们通过大量高清地图的对比学习来增强地图表示。在 AgentFormer 和 Trajectron++ 等流行基线的基础上，PreTraM 在 FDE-10 中在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 数据集上的性能相对提高了 5.5% 和 6.9%。我们证明 PreTraM 提高了数据效率，并且可以很好地适应模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PreTraM方法，通过连接轨迹与地图的自监督预训练提升轨迹预测性能。
AI.motivation: 轨迹预测模型因数据稀缺难以学习有效表示，而HD地图数据丰富但未被充分利用。
AI.method: PreTraM包含两部分：1) 轨迹-地图跨模态对比学习，将轨迹与地图映射到共享嵌入空间；2) 地图对比学习，通过大量HD地图增强表示。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，PreTraM使AgentFormer和Trajectron++的FDE-10指标分别提升5.5%和6.9%。
AI.conclusion: PreTraM通过有效利用地图数据提升数据效率，且性能随模型规模扩展而增强。

search_text: PreTraM: Self-Supervised Pre-training via Connecting Trajectory and Map PreTraM：通过连接轨迹和地图进行自我监督预训练 Deep learning has recently achieved significant progress in trajectory forecasting. However, the scarcity of trajectory data inhibits the data-hungry deep-learning models from learning good representations. While mature representation learning methods exist in computer vision and natural language processing, these pre-training methods require large-scale data. It is hard to replicate these approaches in trajectory forecasting due to the lack of adequate trajectory data (e.g., 34K samples in the nuScenes dataset). To work around the scarcity of trajectory data, we resort to another data modality closely related to trajectories-HD-maps, which is abundantly provided in existing datasets. In this paper, we propose PreTraM, a self-supervised pre-training scheme via connecting trajectories and maps for trajectory forecasting. Specifically, PreTraM consists of two parts: 1) Trajectory-Map Contrastive Learning, where we project trajectories and maps to a shared embedding space with cross-modal contrastive learning, and 2) Map Contrastive Learning, where we enhance map representation with contrastive learning on large quantities of HD-maps. On top of popular baselines such as AgentFormer and Trajectron++, PreTraM boosts their performance by 5.5% and 6.9% relatively in FDE-10 on the challenging nuScenes dataset. We show that PreTraM improves data efficiency and scales well with model size. 深度学习最近在轨迹预测方面取得了重大进展。然而，轨迹数据的稀缺阻碍了需要大量数据的深度学习模型学习良好的表示。虽然计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域存在成熟的表示学习方法，但这些预训练方法需要大规模数据。由于缺乏足够的轨迹数据（例如 nuScenes 数据集中的 34K 样本），很难在轨迹预测中复制这些方法。为了解决轨迹数据的稀缺问题，我们采用了另一种与轨迹密切相关的数据模式——高清地图，现有数据集中大量提供了这种数据模式。在本文中，我们提出了 PreTraM，一种通过连接轨迹和地图进行轨迹预测的自监督预训练方案。具体来说，PreTraM 由两部分组成：1）轨迹地图对比学习，我们通过跨模态对比学习将轨迹和地图投影到共享嵌入空间；2）地图对比学习，我们通过大量高清地图的对比学习来增强地图表示。在 AgentFormer 和 Trajectron++ 等流行基线的基础上，PreTraM 在 FDE-10 中在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 数据集上的性能相对提高了 5.5% 和 6.9%。我们证明 PreTraM 提高了数据效率，并且可以很好地适应模型大小。 本文提出PreTraM方法，通过连接轨迹与地图的自监督预训练提升轨迹预测性能。 Chenfeng Xu,Tian Li,Chen Tang,Lingfeng Sun,Kurt Keutzer,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Alireza Fathi,Wei Zhan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tobias Friedrich,Hans Gawendowicz,Pascal Lenzner,Anna Melnichenko
title: Social Distancing Network Creation
title_zh: 创建社交距离网络
abstract: During a pandemic people have to find a trade-off between meeting others and staying safely at home. While meeting others is pleasant, it also increases the risk of infection. We consider this dilemma by introducing a game-theoretic network creation model in which selfish agents can form bilateral connections. They benefit from network neighbors, but at the same time, they want to maximize their distance to all other agents. This models the inherent conflict that social distancing rules impose on the behavior of selfish agents in a social network. Besides addressing this familiar issue, our model can be seen as the inverse to the well-studied Network Creation Game by Fabrikant et al. [PODC 2003] where agents aim at being as central as possible in the created network. Thus, our work is in-line with studies that compare minimization problems with their maximization versions. We look at two variants of network creation governed by social distancing. In the first variant, there are no restrictions on the connections being formed. We characterize optimal and equilibrium networks, and we derive asymptotically tight bounds on the Price of Anarchy and Price of Stability. The second variant is the model's generalization that allows restrictions on the connections that can be formed. As our main result, we prove that Swap-Maximal Routing-Cost Spanning Trees, an efficiently computable weaker variant of Maximum Routing-Cost Spanning Trees, actually resemble equilibria for a significant range of the parameter space. Moreover, we give almost tight bounds on the Price of Anarchy and Price of Stability. These results imply that, compared the well-studied inverse models, under social distancing the agents' selfish behavior has a significantly stronger impact on the quality of the equilibria, i.e., allowing socially much worse stable states.

We look at two variants of network creation governed by social distancing. In the first variant, there are no restrictions on the connections being formed. abstract_zh: 在大流行期间，人们必须在与他人会面和安全呆在家里之间找到权衡。与他人见面虽然令人愉快，但也会增加感染的风险。我们通过引入博弈论网络创建模型来考虑这一困境，在该模型中，自私的代理可以形成双边连接。他们从网络邻居中受益，但同时，他们希望最大化与所有其他代理的距离。这模拟了社交距离规则对社交网络中自私主体的行为施加的固有冲突。除了解决这个熟悉的问题之外，我们的模型可以被视为 Fabrikant 等人深入研究的网络创建游戏的反面。 [PODC 2003] 代理的目标是在所创建的网络中尽可能成为中心。因此，我们的工作与将最小化问题与其最大化版本进行比较的研究是一致的。我们研究了受社交距离控制的网络创建的两种变体。在第一个变体中，对所形成的连接没有限制。我们描述了最优网络和均衡网络的特征，并推导出无政府状态价格和稳定价格的渐近严格界限。第二个变体是模型的泛化，允许对可以形成的连接进行限制。作为我们的主要结果，我们证明交换最大路由成本生成树（最大路由成本生成树的一种有效可计算的较弱变体）实际上类似于参数空间的重要范围的均衡。此外，我们对无政府状态的代价和稳定的代价给出了几乎严格的界限。这些结果意味着，与经过充分研究的逆模型相比，在社会疏远的情况下，代理人的自私行为对均衡的质量有显着更强的影响，即，允许社会上更糟糕的稳定状态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了疫情期间社交距离规则下自私代理的网络创建博弈模型，分析其均衡特性及社会成本。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间人们面临社交需求与安全距离的矛盾，传统网络创建模型侧重中心化，而本文首次研究最大化距离的逆向模型，填补社交距离场景下的理论空白。
AI.method: 构建博弈论模型，分析两种变体：无连接限制的网络及受限连接网络，通过数学证明与算法分析推导价格指标的紧界，并比较均衡特性。
AI.result: 表征了两种变体的最优网络与均衡网络，证明Swap-Maximal树在参数范围内近似均衡，给出价格指标的渐进紧界，显示社交距离下自私行为导致更差的均衡质量。
AI.conclusion: 社交距离规则显著放大自私行为对网络均衡质量的负面影响，相较传统模型，社会成本更高，需更谨慎设计激励机制以优化稳定状态。

authors_text: Ryan Yang,Tom Silver,Aidan Curtis,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling
title: PG3: Policy-Guided Planning for Generalized Policy Generation
title_zh: PG3：广义政策生成的政策引导规划
abstract: A longstanding objective in classical planning is to synthesize policies that generalize across multiple problems from the same domain. In this work, we study generalized policy search-based methods with a focus on the score function used to guide the search over policies. We demonstrate limitations of two score functions and propose a new approach that overcomes these limitations. The main idea behind our approach, Policy-Guided Planning for Generalized Policy Generation (PG3), is that a candidate policy should be used to guide planning on training problems as a mechanism for evaluating that candidate. Theoretical results in a simplified setting give conditions under which PG3 is optimal or admissible. We then study a specific instantiation of policy search where planning problems are PDDL-based and policies are lifted decision lists. Empirical results in six domains confirm that PG3 learns generalized policies more efficiently and effectively than several baselines. Code: https://github.com/ryangpeixu/pg3
summary: A longstanding objective in classical planning is to synthesize policies that generalize across multiple problems from the same domain. In this work, we study generalized policy search-based methods with a focus on the score function used to guide the search over policies. We demonstrate limitations of two score functions and propose a new approach that overcomes these limitations. The main idea behind our approach, Policy-Guided Planning for Generalized Policy Generation (PG3), is that a candidate policy should be used to guide planning on training problems as a mechanism for evaluating that candidate. Theoretical results in a simplified setting give conditions under which PG3 is optimal or admissible. We then study a specific instantiation of policy search where planning problems are PDDL-based and policies are lifted decision lists. Empirical results in six domains confirm that PG3 learns generalized policies more efficiently and effectively than several baselines. Code: https://github.com/ryangpeixu/pg3
abstract_zh: 经典规划的一个长期目标是综合泛化同一领域多个问题的政策。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于广义策略搜索的方法，重点关注用于指导策略搜索的评分函数。我们证明了两个评分函数的局限性，并提出了一种克服这些局限性的新方法。我们的方法“广义策略生成的策略引导规划”(PG3) 背后的主要思想是，应使用候选策略来指导培训问题的规划，作为评估该候选策略的机制。简化设置中的理论结果给出了 PG3 最佳或可接受的条件。然后，我们研究政策搜索的具体实例，其中规划问题是基于 PDDL 的，政策是提升决策列表的。六个领域的实证结果证实，PG3 比几个基线更有效地学习广义策略。代码：https://github.com/ryangpeixu/pg3

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PG3的策略引导规划方法，旨在生成能够跨多个问题泛化的策略。
AI.motivation: 经典规划领域长期致力于合成跨问题泛化的策略，但现有基于策略搜索的方法在评分函数设计上存在局限性，需改进以提高泛化能力。
AI.method: PG3通过让候选策略指导训练问题的规划过程来评估策略有效性，结合简化设置的理论分析与PDDL规划问题及提升决策列表的实例化方法。
AI.result: 在六个不同领域的实验表明，PG3相比多个基线方法更高效且更有效地学习到泛化策略。
AI.conclusion: PG3在理论分析和实验验证中均表现出优越性，为跨问题泛化策略生成提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PG3的策略引导规划方法，旨在生成能够跨多个问题泛化的策略。
ai_content.motivation: 经典规划领域长期致力于合成跨问题泛化的策略，但现有基于策略搜索的方法在评分函数设计上存在局限性，需改进以提高泛化能力。
ai_content.method: PG3通过让候选策略指导训练问题的规划过程来评估策略有效性，结合简化设置的理论分析与PDDL规划问题及提升决策列表的实例化方法。
ai_content.result: 在六个不同领域的实验表明，PG3相比多个基线方法更高效且更有效地学习到泛化策略。
ai_content.conclusion: PG3在理论分析和实验验证中均表现出优越性，为跨问题泛化策略生成提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: PG3: Policy-Guided Planning for Generalized Policy Generation PG3：广义政策生成的政策引导规划 A longstanding objective in classical planning is to synthesize policies that generalize across multiple problems from the same domain. In this work, we study generalized policy search-based methods with a focus on the score function used to guide the search over policies. We demonstrate limitations of two score functions and propose a new approach that overcomes these limitations. The main idea behind our approach, Policy-Guided Planning for Generalized Policy Generation (PG3), is that a candidate policy should be used to guide planning on training problems as a mechanism for evaluating that candidate. Theoretical results in a simplified setting give conditions under which PG3 is optimal or admissible. We then study a specific instantiation of policy search where planning problems are PDDL-based and policies are lifted decision lists. Empirical results in six domains confirm that PG3 learns generalized policies more efficiently and effectively than several baselines. Code: https://github.com/ryangpeixu/pg3 经典规划的一个长期目标是综合泛化同一领域多个问题的政策。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于广义策略搜索的方法，重点关注用于指导策略搜索的评分函数。我们证明了两个评分函数的局限性，并提出了一种克服这些局限性的新方法。我们的方法“广义策略生成的策略引导规划”(PG3) 背后的主要思想是，应使用候选策略来指导培训问题的规划，作为评估该候选策略的机制。简化设置中的理论结果给出了 PG3 最佳或可接受的条件。然后，我们研究政策搜索的具体实例，其中规划问题是基于 PDDL 的，政策是提升决策列表的。六个领域的实证结果证实，PG3 比几个基线更有效地学习广义策略。代码：https://github.com/ryangpeixu/pg3 本文提出了一种名为PG3的策略引导规划方法，旨在生成能够跨多个问题泛化的策略。 Ryan Yang,Tom Silver,Aidan Curtis,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling cs.AI

authors_text: Oliver Limoyo,Trevor Ablett,Jonathan Kelly
title: Learning Sequential Latent Variable Models from Multimodal Time Series Data
title_zh: 从多模态时间序列数据学习序列潜变量模型
comment: In: Petrovic, I., Menegatti, E., Marković, I. (eds) Intelligent Autonomous Systems 17. IAS 2022. Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems, vol 577. Springer, Cham
comments: In: Petrovic, I., Menegatti, E., Marković, I. (eds) Intelligent Autonomous Systems 17. IAS 2022. Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems, vol 577. Springer, Cham
abstract: Sequential modelling of high-dimensional data is an important problem that appears in many domains including model-based reinforcement learning and dynamics identification for control. Latent variable models applied to sequential data (i.e., latent dynamics models) have been shown to be a particularly effective probabilistic approach to solve this problem, especially when dealing with images. However, in many application areas (e.g., robotics), information from multiple sensing modalities is available -- existing latent dynamics methods have not yet been extended to effectively make use of such multimodal sequential data. Multimodal sensor streams can be correlated in a useful manner and often contain complementary information across modalities. In this work, we present a self-supervised generative modelling framework to jointly learn a probabilistic latent state representation of multimodal data and the respective dynamics. Using synthetic and real-world datasets from a multimodal robotic planar pushing task, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significant improvements in prediction and representation quality. Furthermore, we compare to the common learning baseline of concatenating each modality in the latent space and show that our principled probabilistic formulation performs better. Finally, despite being fully self-supervised, we demonstrate that our method is nearly as effective as an existing supervised approach that relies on ground truth labels.
summary: Sequential modelling of high-dimensional data is an important problem that appears in many domains including model-based reinforcement learning and dynamics identification for control. Latent variable models applied to sequential data (i.e., latent dynamics models) have been shown to be a particularly effective probabilistic approach to solve this problem, especially when dealing with images. However, in many application areas (e.g., robotics), information from multiple sensing modalities is available -- existing latent dynamics methods have not yet been extended to effectively make use of such multimodal sequential data. Multimodal sensor streams can be correlated in a useful manner and often contain complementary information across modalities. In this work, we present a self-supervised generative modelling framework to jointly learn a probabilistic latent state representation of multimodal data and the respective dynamics. Using synthetic and real-world datasets from a multimodal robotic planar pushing task, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significant improvements in prediction and representation quality. Furthermore, we compare to the common learning baseline of concatenating each modality in the latent space and show that our principled probabilistic formulation performs better. Finally, despite being fully self-supervised, we demonstrate that our method is nearly as effective as an existing supervised approach that relies on ground truth labels.
abstract_zh: 高维数据的序列建模是许多领域中出现的一个重要问题，包括基于模型的强化学习和控制动态识别。应用于序列数据的潜在变量模型（即潜在动态模型）已被证明是解决此问题的特别有效的概率方法，特别是在处理图像时。然而，在许多应用领域（例如机器人技术），来自多种传感模式的信息是可用的——现有的潜在动力学方法尚未扩展以有效地利用这种多模式序列数据。多模式传感器流可以以有用的方式关联，并且通常包含跨模式的补充信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个自监督的生成建模框架，以共同学习多模态数据的概率潜在状态表示和各自的动态。使用来自多模式机器人平面推动任务的合成数据集和真实世界数据集，我们证明了我们的方法可以显着提高预测和表示质量。此外，我们与潜在空间中连接每种模态的通用学习基线进行比较，并表明我们的原则概率公式表现更好。最后，尽管是完全自我监督的，但我们证明我们的方法几乎与依赖真实标签的现有监督方法一样有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督生成模型框架，用于联合学习多模态时序数据的潜在状态表示及动态模型。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在动态模型难以有效利用多模态传感器数据（如机器人任务中的多源信息），而多模态数据常包含互补信息。
AI.method: 设计自监督生成模型，联合建模多模态数据的概率潜在状态表示与动态关系，无需依赖监督标签。
AI.result: 在合成及真实机器人推移任务数据集上，预测与表征质量显著优于模态拼接基线，接近监督方法效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率建模有效融合多模态时序数据，在无监督条件下达到接近监督学习的性能，为多模态动态建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Aparajita Dey-Plissonneau,Hyowon Lee,Mingming Liu,Vyoma Patel,Michael Scriney,Alan F. Smeaton
title: An Analysis of Conversational Volatility During Telecollaboration Sessions for Second Language Learning
title_zh: 第二语言学习远程协作会议期间对话波动性分析
abstract: Tandem telecollaboration is a pedagogy used in second language learning where mixed groups of students meet online in videoconferencing sessions to practice their conversational skills in their target language. We have built and deployed a system called L2 Learning to support post-session review and self-reflection on students participation in such meetings. We automatically compute a metric called Conversational Volatility which quantifies the amount of interaction among participants, indicating how dynamic or flat the conversations were. Our analysis on more than 100 hours of video recordings involving 28 of our students indicates that conversations do not get more dynamic as meetings progress, that there is a wide variety of levels of interaction across students and student groups, and the speaking in French appears to have more animated conversations than speaking in English, though the reasons for that are not clear.
summary: Tandem telecollaboration is a pedagogy used in second language learning where mixed groups of students meet online in videoconferencing sessions to practice their conversational skills in their target language. We have built and deployed a system called L2 Learning to support post-session review and self-reflection on students participation in such meetings. We automatically compute a metric called Conversational Volatility which quantifies the amount of interaction among participants, indicating how dynamic or flat the conversations were. Our analysis on more than 100 hours of video recordings involving 28 of our students indicates that conversations do not get more dynamic as meetings progress, that there is a wide variety of levels of interaction across students and student groups, and the speaking in French appears to have more animated conversations than speaking in English, though the reasons for that are not clear.
abstract_zh: 串联远程协作是一种用于第二语言学习的教学法，混合的学生小组在视频会议中在线见面，练习用目标语言进行对话的技能。我们构建并部署了一个名为 L2 Learning 的系统，以支持学生参与此类会议的课后回顾和自我反思。我们自动计算一个称为“对话波动性”的指标，该指标量化参与者之间的互动量，表明对话的动态或平坦程度。我们对涉及 28 名学生的 100 多个小时的视频进行了分析，结果表明，随着会议的进展，对话并没有变得更加活跃，学生和学生团体之间的互动程度也多种多样，而且用法语说话似乎比用英语说话更生动，尽管其原因尚不清楚。

AI.tldr: 开发系统分析远程协作会话中的对话波动性，以支持第二语言学习者的复习与反思
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效评估学生在远程协作中的参与度，需自动化工具量化互动以促进语言学习
AI.method: 构建L2 Learning系统，自动计算会话波动性指标，并分析28名学生100多小时的视频数据
AI.result: 对话动态性未随会议时间增加，学生间互动差异显著，法语会话比英语更活跃，但原因未明
AI.conclusion: 系统有效量化互动水平，揭示学生参与模式差异，但需进一步研究语言差异对对话动态性的影响

authors_text: Hongyu Guo,Sun Sun
title: SoftEdge: Regularizing Graph Classification with Random Soft Edges
title_zh: SoftEdge：使用随机软边正则化图分类
abstract: Augmented graphs play a vital role in regularizing Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), which leverage information exchange along edges in graphs, in the form of message passing, for learning. Due to their effectiveness, simple edge and node manipulations (e.g., addition and deletion) have been widely used in graph augmentation. Nevertheless, such common augmentation techniques can dramatically change the semantics of the original graph, causing overaggressive augmentation and thus under-fitting in the GNN learning. To address this problem arising from dropping or adding graph edges and nodes, we propose SoftEdge, which assigns random weights to a portion of the edges of a given graph for augmentation. The synthetic graph generated by SoftEdge maintains the same nodes and their connectivities as the original graph, thus mitigating the semantic changes of the original graph. We empirically show that this simple method obtains superior accuracy to popular node and edge manipulation approaches and notable resilience to the accuracy degradation with the GNN depth.
summary: Augmented graphs play a vital role in regularizing Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), which leverage information exchange along edges in graphs, in the form of message passing, for learning. Due to their effectiveness, simple edge and node manipulations (e.g., addition and deletion) have been widely used in graph augmentation. Nevertheless, such common augmentation techniques can dramatically change the semantics of the original graph, causing overaggressive augmentation and thus under-fitting in the GNN learning. To address this problem arising from dropping or adding graph edges and nodes, we propose SoftEdge, which assigns random weights to a portion of the edges of a given graph for augmentation. The synthetic graph generated by SoftEdge maintains the same nodes and their connectivities as the original graph, thus mitigating the semantic changes of the original graph. We empirically show that this simple method obtains superior accuracy to popular node and edge manipulation approaches and notable resilience to the accuracy degradation with the GNN depth.
abstract_zh: 增强图在规范图神经网络 (GNN) 方面发挥着至关重要的作用，图神经网络利用图边缘的信息交换，以消息传递的形式进行学习。由于其有效性，简单的边和节点操作（例如添加和删除）已广泛用于图增强。然而，这种常见的增强技术可以极大地改变原始图的语义，导致过度增强，从而导致 GNN 学习的拟合不足。为了解决因删除或添加图边和节点而产生的问题，我们提出了 SoftEdge，它将随机权重分配给给定图的边的一部分以进行增强。 SoftEdge生成的合成图保持与原始图相同的节点及其连接性，从而减轻了原始图的语义变化。我们的经验表明，这种简单的方法比流行的节点和边缘操作方法具有更高的精度，并且对 GNN 深度导致的精度下降具有显着的恢复能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoftEdge方法，通过为图中部分边分配随机权重进行正则化，解决图分类任务中传统增强方法导致的语义变化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图增强方法（如边/节点增删）会显著改变原图语义，导致过拟合或欠拟合，需更温和的增强策略。
AI.method: 在保持原图节点和连接结构不变的前提下，为部分边赋予随机权重生成合成图，实现温和的正则化增强。
AI.result: 实验表明SoftEdge在准确率上优于主流增强方法，且对GNN深度增加导致的精度下降具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SoftEdge通过保留图结构同时引入随机性，有效平衡了正则化与语义保真，是图分类任务的高效正则化方案。

Due to their effectiveness, simple edge and node manipulations (e.g., addition and deletion) have been widely used in graph augmentation. Nevertheless, such common augmentation techniques can dramatically change the semantics of the original graph, causing overaggressive augmentation and thus under-fitting in the GNN learning. To address this problem arising from dropping or adding graph edges and nodes, we propose SoftEdge, which assigns random weights to a portion of the edges of a given graph for augmentation. The synthetic graph generated by SoftEdge maintains the same nodes and their connectivities as the original graph, thus mitigating the semantic changes of the original graph.
