search_text: Unsupervised Human Action Recognition with Skeletal Graph Laplacian and Self-Supervised Viewpoints Invariance 具有骨骼图拉普拉斯和自监督视点不变性的无监督人类行为识别 This paper presents a novel end-to-end method for the problem of skeleton-based unsupervised human action recognition. We propose a new architecture with a convolutional autoencoder that uses graph Laplacian regularization to model the skeletal geometry across the temporal dynamics of actions. Our approach is robust towards viewpoint variations by including a self-supervised gradient reverse layer that ensures generalization across camera views. The proposed method is validated on NTU-60 and NTU-120 large-scale datasets in which it outperforms all prior unsupervised skeleton-based approaches on the cross-subject, cross-view, and cross-setup protocols. Although unsupervised, our learnable representation allows our method even to surpass a few supervised skeleton-based action recognition methods. The code is available in: www.github.com/IIT-PAVIS/UHAR_Skeletal_Laplacian 本文针对基于骨架的无监督人体动作识别问题提出了一种新颖的端到端方法。我们提出了一种带有卷积自动编码器的新架构，该架构使用图拉普拉斯正则化来对动作的时间动态中的骨骼几何进行建模。我们的方法通过包含一个自我监督的梯度反向层来确保跨摄像机视图的泛化，从而对视点变化具有鲁棒性。所提出的方法在 NTU-60 和 NTU-120 大规模数据集上进行了验证，在跨主题、跨视图和跨设置协议上，它优于所有先前的无监督基于骨架的方法。尽管不受监督，但我们的可学习表示使我们的方法甚至超越了一些基于监督骨架的动作识别方法。代码位于：www.github.com/IIT-PAVIS/UHAR_Skeletal_Laplacian 本文提出一种基于骨骼的无监督人类动作识别方法，通过图拉普拉斯正则化和自监督视角不变性技术建模动作时空特征。 Giancarlo Paoletti,Jacopo Cavazza,Cigdem Beyan,Alessio Del Bue cs.CV

authors_text: Tom Monnier,Matthew Fisher,Alexei A. Efros,Mathieu Aubry
title: Share With Thy Neighbors: Single-View Reconstruction by Cross-Instance Consistency
title_zh: 与邻居分享：通过跨实例一致性进行单视图重建
comment: ECCV 2022. Project webpage with code and videos: http://imagine.enpc.fr/~monniert/UNICORN/
comments: ECCV 2022. Project webpage with code and videos: http://imagine.enpc.fr/~monniert/UNICORN/
abstract: Approaches for single-view reconstruction typically rely on viewpoint annotations, silhouettes, the absence of background, multiple views of the same instance, a template shape, or symmetry. We avoid all such supervision and assumptions by explicitly leveraging the consistency between images of different object instances. As a result, our method can learn from large collections of unlabelled images depicting the same object category. Our main contributions are two ways for leveraging cross-instance consistency: (i) progressive conditioning, a training strategy to gradually specialize the model from category to instances in a curriculum learning fashion; and (ii) neighbor reconstruction, a loss enforcing consistency between instances having similar shape or texture. Also critical to the success of our method are: our structured autoencoding architecture decomposing an image into explicit shape, texture, pose, and background; an adapted formulation of differential rendering; and a new optimization scheme alternating between 3D and pose learning. We compare our approach, UNICORN, both on the diverse synthetic ShapeNet dataset - the classical benchmark for methods requiring multiple views as supervision - and on standard real-image benchmarks (Pascal3D+ Car, CUB) for which most methods require known templates and silhouette annotations. We also showcase applicability to more challenging real-world collections (CompCars, LSUN), where silhouettes are not available and images are not cropped around the object.
summary: Approaches for single-view reconstruction typically rely on viewpoint annotations, silhouettes, the absence of background, multiple views of the same instance, a template shape, or symmetry. We avoid all such supervision and assumptions by explicitly leveraging the consistency between images of different object instances. As a result, our method can learn from large collections of unlabelled images depicting the same object category. Our main contributions are two ways for leveraging cross-instance consistency: (i) progressive conditioning, a training strategy to gradually specialize the model from category to instances in a curriculum learning fashion; and (ii) neighbor reconstruction, a loss enforcing consistency between instances having similar shape or texture. Also critical to the success of our method are: our structured autoencoding architecture decomposing an image into explicit shape, texture, pose, and background; an adapted formulation of differential rendering; and a new optimization scheme alternating between 3D and pose learning. We compare our approach, UNICORN, both on the diverse synthetic ShapeNet dataset - the classical benchmark for methods requiring multiple views as supervision - and on standard real-image benchmarks (Pascal3D+ Car, CUB) for which most methods require known templates and silhouette annotations. We also showcase applicability to more challenging real-world collections (CompCars, LSUN), where silhouettes are not available and images are not cropped around the object.
abstract_zh: 单视图重建方法通常依赖于视点注释、轮廓、背景的缺失、同一实例的多个视图、模板形状或对称性。我们通过明确利用不同对象实例的图像之间的一致性来避免所有此类监督和假设。因此，我们的方法可以从描述相同对象类别的大量未标记图像中进行学习。我们的主要贡献是利用跨实例一致性的两种方式：（i）渐进调节，一种以课程学习方式逐渐将模型从类别到实例专业化的培训策略； (ii) 邻居重建，一种在具有相似形状或纹理的实例之间强制一致性的损失。对于我们的方法的成功也至关重要的是：我们的结构化自动编码架构将图像分解为明确的形状、纹理、姿势和背景；差分渲染的适应公式；以及在 3D 和姿势学习之间交替的新优化方案。我们在不同的合成 ShapeNet 数据集（需要多个视图作为监督的方法的经典基准）和标准真实图像基准（Pascal3D+ Car、CUB）上比较我们的方法 UNICORN，其中大多数方法需要已知的模板和轮廓注释。我们还展示了对更具挑战性的现实世界集合（CompCars、LSUN）的适用性，其中轮廓不可用，并且图像不会在对象周围裁剪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需视角标注、轮廓或模板的单视角三维重建方法，通过跨实例一致性实现无监督学习。
AI.motivation: 传统单视角重建方法依赖标注数据或先验假设（如对称性、多视角等），限制了其在真实场景中的应用。本文旨在通过跨实例一致性消除这些依赖。
AI.method: 提出两种核心方法：(i) 进阶条件训练策略（从类别到实例的渐进式学习）；(ii) 邻域重建损失（强制形状/纹理相似实例间一致性）。结合结构化编码架构、微分渲染和3D-姿态交替优化方案。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet（合成数据）和Pascal3D+/CUB（真实数据）基准测试中优于现有方法，且在无轮廓标注的CompCars/LSUN数据集上展现鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 跨实例一致性为单视角重建提供了新范式，无需传统监督即可实现高质量重建，适用于复杂真实场景。

authors_text: Joao Basso,David Gamarnik,Song Mei,Leo Zhou
title: Performance and limitations of the QAOA at constant levels on large sparse hypergraphs and spin glass models
title_zh: QAOA 在大型稀疏超图和自旋玻璃模型上恒定水平的性能和局限性
abstract: The Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) is a general purpose quantum algorithm designed for combinatorial optimization. We analyze its expected performance and prove concentration properties at any constant level (number of layers) on ensembles of random combinatorial optimization problems in the infinite size limit. These ensembles include mixed spin models and Max-$q$-XORSAT on sparse random hypergraphs. Our analysis can be understood via a saddle-point approximation of a sum-over-paths integral. This is made rigorous by proving a generalization of the multinomial theorem, which is a technical result of independent interest. We then show that the performance of the QAOA at constant levels for the pure $q$-spin model matches asymptotically the ones for Max-$q$-XORSAT on random sparse Erdős-Rényi hypergraphs and every large-girth regular hypergraph. Through this correspondence, we establish that the average-case value produced by the QAOA at constant levels is bounded away from optimality for pure $q$-spin models when $q\ge 4$ and is even. This limitation gives a hardness of approximation result for quantum algorithms in a new regime where the whole graph is seen.
summary: The Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) is a general purpose quantum algorithm designed for combinatorial optimization. We analyze its expected performance and prove concentration properties at any constant level (number of layers) on ensembles of random combinatorial optimization problems in the infinite size limit. These ensembles include mixed spin models and Max-$q$-XORSAT on sparse random hypergraphs. Our analysis can be understood via a saddle-point approximation of a sum-over-paths integral. This is made rigorous by proving a generalization of the multinomial theorem, which is a technical result of independent interest. We then show that the performance of the QAOA at constant levels for the pure $q$-spin model matches asymptotically the ones for Max-$q$-XORSAT on random sparse Erdős-Rényi hypergraphs and every large-girth regular hypergraph. Through this correspondence, we establish that the average-case value produced by the QAOA at constant levels is bounded away from optimality for pure $q$-spin models when $q\ge 4$ and is even. This limitation gives a hardness of approximation result for quantum algorithms in a new regime where the whole graph is seen.
abstract_zh: 量子近似优化算法 (QAOA) 是一种专为组合优化而设计的通用量子算法。我们分析了其预期性能，并证明了无限大小限制下的随机组合优化问题集合在任何恒定水平（层数）下的浓度特性。这些集成包括混合自旋模型和稀疏随机超图上的 Max-$q$-XORSAT。我们的分析可以通过路径总和积分的鞍点近似来理解。这是通过证明多项式定理的推广而变得严格的，这是独立利益的技术结果。然后，我们证明纯 $q$-spin 模型在恒定水平下的 QAOA 性能与随机稀疏 Erdős-Rényi 超图和每个大周长正则超图上的 Max-$q$-XORSAT 的性能渐近匹配。通过这种对应关系，我们确定，当 $q\ge 4$ 且为偶数时，QAOA 在恒定水平下产生的平均情况值与纯 $q$-spin 模型的最优性有一定的界限。这种限制为量子算法在可以看到整个图的新机制中提供了近似结果的难度。

AI.tldr: 分析QAOA在常数层数下对大规模稀疏超图和自旋玻璃模型的性能及局限性。
AI.motivation: 研究量子近似优化算法(QAOA)在解决组合优化问题时的性能边界，特别是在稀疏随机超图和自旋模型中的表现。
AI.method: 通过路径求和积分的鞍点近似及多項式定理推广，结合随机超图与自旋模型的对应关系进行理论分析。
AI.result: 证明常数层数QAOA在纯q-自旋模型中的平均性能与Max-q-XORSAT存在差距，且当q≥4时无法达到最优解。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了QAOA在特定问题规模下的近似硬度，为量子算法的适用范围提供了新限制条件。

search_text: Performance and limitations of the QAOA at constant levels on large sparse hypergraphs and spin glass models QAOA 在大型稀疏超图和自旋玻璃模型上恒定水平的性能和局限性 The Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) is a general purpose quantum algorithm designed for combinatorial optimization. We analyze its expected performance and prove concentration properties at any constant level (number of layers) on ensembles of random combinatorial optimization problems in the infinite size limit. These ensembles include mixed spin models and Max-$q$-XORSAT on sparse random hypergraphs. Our analysis can be understood via a saddle-point approximation of a sum-over-paths integral. This is made rigorous by proving a generalization of the multinomial theorem, which is a technical result of independent interest. We then show that the performance of the QAOA at constant levels for the pure $q$-spin model matches asymptotically the ones for Max-$q$-XORSAT on random sparse Erdős-Rényi hypergraphs and every large-girth regular hypergraph. Through this correspondence, we establish that the average-case value produced by the QAOA at constant levels is bounded away from optimality for pure $q$-spin models when $q\ge 4$ and is even. This limitation gives a hardness of approximation result for quantum algorithms in a new regime where the whole graph is seen. 量子近似优化算法 (QAOA) 是一种专为组合优化而设计的通用量子算法。我们分析了其预期性能，并证明了无限大小限制下的随机组合优化问题集合在任何恒定水平（层数）下的浓度特性。这些集成包括混合自旋模型和稀疏随机超图上的 Max-$q$-XORSAT。我们的分析可以通过路径总和积分的鞍点近似来理解。这是通过证明多项式定理的推广而变得严格的，这是独立利益的技术结果。然后，我们证明纯 $q$-spin 模型在恒定水平下的 QAOA 性能与随机稀疏 Erdős-Rényi 超图和每个大周长正则超图上的 Max-$q$-XORSAT 的性能渐近匹配。通过这种对应关系，我们确定，当 $q\ge 4$ 且为偶数时，QAOA 在恒定水平下产生的平均情况值与纯 $q$-spin 模型的最优性有一定的界限。这种限制为量子算法在可以看到整个图的新机制中提供了近似结果的难度。 分析QAOA在常数层数下对大规模稀疏超图和自旋玻璃模型的性能及局限性。 Joao Basso,David Gamarnik,Song Mei,Leo Zhou quant-ph,cond-mat.stat-mech,cs.CC,cs.DS,math-ph

authors_text: Ryan Hoque,Kaushik Shivakumar,Shrey Aeron,Gabriel Deza,Aditya Ganapathi,Adrian Wong,Johnny Lee,Andy Zeng,Vincent Vanhoucke,Ken Goldberg
title: Learning to Fold Real Garments with One Arm: A Case Study in Cloud-Based Robotics Research
title_zh: 学习用一只手臂折叠真正的衣服：基于云的机器人研究案例研究
abstract: Autonomous fabric manipulation is a longstanding challenge in robotics, but evaluating progress is difficult due to the cost and diversity of robot hardware. Using Reach, a cloud robotics platform that enables low-latency remote execution of control policies on physical robots, we present the first systematic benchmarking of fabric manipulation algorithms on physical hardware. We develop 4 novel learning-based algorithms that model expert actions, keypoints, reward functions, and dynamic motions, and we compare these against 4 learning-free and inverse dynamics algorithms on the task of folding a crumpled T-shirt with a single robot arm. The entire lifecycle of data collection, model training, and policy evaluation is performed remotely without physical access to the robot workcell. Results suggest a new algorithm combining imitation learning with analytic methods achieves 84% of human-level performance on the folding task. See https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/cloudfolding for all data, code, models, and supplemental material.
summary: Autonomous fabric manipulation is a longstanding challenge in robotics, but evaluating progress is difficult due to the cost and diversity of robot hardware. Using Reach, a cloud robotics platform that enables low-latency remote execution of control policies on physical robots, we present the first systematic benchmarking of fabric manipulation algorithms on physical hardware. We develop 4 novel learning-based algorithms that model expert actions, keypoints, reward functions, and dynamic motions, and we compare these against 4 learning-free and inverse dynamics algorithms on the task of folding a crumpled T-shirt with a single robot arm. The entire lifecycle of data collection, model training, and policy evaluation is performed remotely without physical access to the robot workcell. Results suggest a new algorithm combining imitation learning with analytic methods achieves 84% of human-level performance on the folding task. See https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/cloudfolding for all data, code, models, and supplemental material.
abstract_zh: 自主织物操纵是机器人技术中长期存在的挑战，但由于机器人硬件的成本和多样性，评估进展很困难。使用 Reach（一个云机器人平台，可以在物理机器人上低延迟远程执行控制策略），我们提出了物理硬件上织物操纵算法的第一个系统基准测试。我们开发了 4 种新颖的基于学习的算法，对专家动作、关键点、奖励函数和动态运动进行建模，并在用单个机器人手臂折叠皱巴巴的 T 恤的任务中将它们与 4 种免学习和逆动态算法进行比较。数据收集、模型训练和策略评估的整个生命周期都是远程执行的，无需物理访问机器人工作单元。结果表明，一种将模仿学习与分析方法相结合的新算法在折叠任务中实现了人类水平 84% 的表现。请参阅 https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/cloudfolding 了解所有数据、代码、模型和补充材料。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过云机器人平台实现单臂机器人折叠真实衣物的任务，并进行算法基准测试。
AI.motivation: 自主织物操作是机器人领域长期挑战，但硬件成本高且多样性大导致评估困难，需通过云平台实现远程高效测试。
AI.method: 基于Reach云平台，开发4种学习型算法（建模专家动作、关键点等）并与4种无学习算法对比，远程完成数据收集、训练及评估。
AI.result: 结合模仿学习与分析方法的新型算法在折叠任务中达到人类水平84%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 云平台有效支持远程机器人研究，融合学习与分析方法可显著提升织物操作任务性能。

authors_text: Mingchen Li,Junfan Chen,Samuel Mensah,Nikolaos Aletras,Xiulong Yang,Yang Ye
title: A Hierarchical N-Gram Framework for Zero-Shot Link Prediction
title_zh: 用于零样本链接预测的分层 N-Gram 框架
comment: Published as a conference paper at EMNLP Findings 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at EMNLP Findings 2022
abstract: Due to the incompleteness of knowledge graphs (KGs), zero-shot link prediction (ZSLP) which aims to predict unobserved relations in KGs has attracted recent interest from researchers. A common solution is to use textual features of relations (e.g., surface name or textual descriptions) as auxiliary information to bridge the gap between seen and unseen relations. Current approaches learn an embedding for each word token in the text. These methods lack robustness as they suffer from the out-of-vocabulary (OOV) problem. Meanwhile, models built on character n-grams have the capability of generating expressive representations for OOV words. Thus, in this paper, we propose a Hierarchical N-Gram framework for Zero-Shot Link Prediction (HNZSLP), which considers the dependencies among character n-grams of the relation surface name for ZSLP. Our approach works by first constructing a hierarchical n-gram graph on the surface name to model the organizational structure of n-grams that leads to the surface name. A GramTransformer, based on the Transformer is then presented to model the hierarchical n-gram graph to construct the relation embedding for ZSLP. Experimental results show the proposed HNZSLP achieved state-of-the-art performance on two ZSLP datasets.
summary: Due to the incompleteness of knowledge graphs (KGs), zero-shot link prediction (ZSLP) which aims to predict unobserved relations in KGs has attracted recent interest from researchers. A common solution is to use textual features of relations (e.g., surface name or textual descriptions) as auxiliary information to bridge the gap between seen and unseen relations. Current approaches learn an embedding for each word token in the text. These methods lack robustness as they suffer from the out-of-vocabulary (OOV) problem. Meanwhile, models built on character n-grams have the capability of generating expressive representations for OOV words. Thus, in this paper, we propose a Hierarchical N-Gram framework for Zero-Shot Link Prediction (HNZSLP), which considers the dependencies among character n-grams of the relation surface name for ZSLP. Our approach works by first constructing a hierarchical n-gram graph on the surface name to model the organizational structure of n-grams that leads to the surface name. A GramTransformer, based on the Transformer is then presented to model the hierarchical n-gram graph to construct the relation embedding for ZSLP. Experimental results show the proposed HNZSLP achieved state-of-the-art performance on two ZSLP datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于知识图（KG）的不完整性，旨在预测知识图谱中未观察到的关系的零样本链接预测（ZSLP）最近引起了研究人员的兴趣。一种常见的解决方案是使用关系的文本特征（例如，表面名称或文本描述）作为辅助信息来弥合可见关系和不可见关系之间的差距。当前的方法学习文本中每个单词标记的嵌入。这些方法缺乏稳健性，因为它们存在词汇外（OOV）问题。同时，基于字符 n-gram 构建的模型能够生成 OOV 单词的表达表示。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于零样本链接预测（HNZSLP）的分层 N-Gram 框架，该框架考虑了 ZSLP 关系表面名称的字符 n-gram 之间的依赖关系。我们的方法首先在表面名称上构建一个分层 n 元图，以对导致表面名称的 n 元模型的组织结构进行建模。然后提出基于 Transformer 的 GramTransformer 对分层 n 元图进行建模，以构建 ZSLP 的关系嵌入。实验结果表明，所提出的 HNZSLP 在两个 ZSLP 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层N-gram框架（HNZSLP），用于解决知识图谱中零样本链接预测问题，通过利用关系表面名称的字符N-gram依赖性生成更鲁棒的表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过词级嵌入处理关系文本，但存在词汇外（OOV）问题；字符级N-gram模型能生成更具表达力的OOV词表示，但未充分建模N-gram间的层次依赖关系。
AI.method: 构建关系表面名称的分层N-gram图，通过GramTransformer（基于Transformer架构）建模该图的层次结构，生成用于零样本链接预测的关系嵌入。
AI.result: 在两个零样本链接预测数据集上达到最先进的性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分层N-gram框架通过建模字符级层次依赖关系，有效解决了OOV问题，为零样本链接预测提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: E. Canessa
title: Wave-like behaviour in (0,1) binary sequences
title_zh: (0,1) 二进制序列中的类波行为
abstract: This work presents a comprehensive study of the properties of finite (0,1) binary systems from the mathematical viewpoint of quantum theory where a complex wavefunction $ψ_{n}$ is considered as an analogous probability measure. This is a quantum-inspired extension of the GenomeBits model to characterise observed genome sequences, where $ψ_{n}$ is related to an alternating (0,1) binary series having independent distributed terms. The real and imaginary spectrum of $ψ_{n}$ {\emph vs.} the nucleotide base positions display characteristic features of sound waves.
summary: This work presents a comprehensive study of the properties of finite (0,1) binary systems from the mathematical viewpoint of quantum theory where a complex wavefunction $ψ_{n}$ is considered as an analogous probability measure. This is a quantum-inspired extension of the GenomeBits model to characterise observed genome sequences, where $ψ_{n}$ is related to an alternating (0,1) binary series having independent distributed terms. The real and imaginary spectrum of $ψ_{n}$ {\emph vs.} the nucleotide base positions display characteristic features of sound waves.
abstract_zh: 这项工作从量子理论的数学角度对有限 (0,1) 二元系统的性质进行了全面研究，其中复波函数 $ψ_{n}$ 被视为类似的概率度量。这是 GenomeBits 模型的量子启发扩展，用于表征观察到的基因组序列，其中 $ψ_{n}$ 与具有独立分布项的交替 (0,1) 二进制序列相关。 $ψ_{n}$ {\emph vs.} 核苷酸碱基位置的实部和虚部频谱显示了声波的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文从量子理论角度研究(0,1)二进制序列的波状特性，将复数波函数作为概率度量，扩展GenomeBits模型以表征基因组序列。
AI.motivation: 通过量子理论视角扩展传统二进制序列分析方法，为基因组序列特征提取提供新工具。
AI.method: 构建复数波函数ψ_n作为概率测度，关联独立分布的二进制序列，分析其频谱与核苷酸位置的关系。
AI.result: 发现ψ_n的实部和虚部频谱呈现类似声波的特征模式，与核苷酸碱基位置存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了基因组序列中潜在的波动力学规律，为生物信息学分析提供新思路。

search_text: Wave-like behaviour in (0,1) binary sequences (0,1) 二进制序列中的类波行为 This work presents a comprehensive study of the properties of finite (0,1) binary systems from the mathematical viewpoint of quantum theory where a complex wavefunction $ψ_{n}$ is considered as an analogous probability measure. This is a quantum-inspired extension of the GenomeBits model to characterise observed genome sequences, where $ψ_{n}$ is related to an alternating (0,1) binary series having independent distributed terms. The real and imaginary spectrum of $ψ_{n}$ {\emph vs.} the nucleotide base positions display characteristic features of sound waves. 这项工作从量子理论的数学角度对有限 (0,1) 二元系统的性质进行了全面研究，其中复波函数 $ψ_{n}$ 被视为类似的概率度量。这是 GenomeBits 模型的量子启发扩展，用于表征观察到的基因组序列，其中 $ψ_{n}$ 与具有独立分布项的交替 (0,1) 二进制序列相关。 $ψ_{n}$ {\emph vs.} 核苷酸碱基位置的实部和虚部频谱显示了声波的特征。 本文从量子理论角度研究(0,1)二进制序列的波状特性，将复数波函数作为概率度量，扩展GenomeBits模型以表征基因组序列。 E. authors_text: Oriel Frigo,Lucien Martin-Gaffé,Catherine Wacongne
title: DooDLeNet: Double DeepLab Enhanced Feature Fusion for Thermal-color Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DooDLeNet：用于热色语义分割的双 DeepLab 增强特征融合
abstract: In this paper we present a new approach for feature fusion between RGB and LWIR Thermal images for the task of semantic segmentation for driving perception. We propose DooDLeNet, a double DeepLab architecture with specialized encoder-decoders for thermal and color modalities and a shared decoder for final segmentation. We combine two strategies for feature fusion: confidence weighting and correlation weighting. We report state-of-the-art mean IoU results on the MF dataset.
summary: In this paper we present a new approach for feature fusion between RGB and LWIR Thermal images for the task of semantic segmentation for driving perception. We propose DooDLeNet, a double DeepLab architecture with specialized encoder-decoders for thermal and color modalities and a shared decoder for final segmentation. We combine two strategies for feature fusion: confidence weighting and correlation weighting. We report state-of-the-art mean IoU results on the MF dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种 RGB 和 LWIR 热图像特征融合的新方法，用于驱动感知的语义分割任务。我们提出了 DooDLeNet，这是一种双 DeepLab 架构，具有用于热模态和颜色模态的专用编码器-解码器以及用于最终分割的共享解码器。我们结合了两种特征融合策略：置信度加权和相关性加权。我们报告了 MF 数据集上最先进的平均 IoU 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DooDLeNet，通过融合RGB和热成像特征提升驾驶场景语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 单一模态图像存在环境干扰限制，双模态融合可增强复杂场景下的感知鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建双DeepLab架构，包含独立编码器处理热/色图像，共享解码器输出分割结果，结合置信度加权与相关性加权实现特征融合。
AI.result: 在MF数据集上达到最先进的平均IoU指标，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双模态特征融合策略显著提升分割精度，为自动驾驶感知提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Hera Siddiqui,Ajita Rattani,Karl Ricanek,Twyla Hill
title: An Examination of Bias of Facial Analysis based BMI Prediction Models
title_zh: 基于 BMI 预测模型的面部分析偏差检验
abstract: Obesity is one of the most important public health problems that the world is facing today. A recent trend is in the development of intervention tools that predict BMI using facial images for weight monitoring and management to combat obesity. Most of these studies used BMI annotated facial image datasets that mainly consisted of Caucasian subjects. Research on bias evaluation of face-based gender-, age-classification, and face recognition systems suggest that these technologies perform poorly for women, dark-skinned people, and older adults. The bias of facial analysis-based BMI prediction tools has not been studied until now. This paper evaluates the bias of facial-analysis-based BMI prediction models across Caucasian and African-American Males and Females. Experimental investigations on the gender, race, and BMI balanced version of the modified MORPH-II dataset suggested that the error rate in BMI prediction was least for Black Males and highest for White Females. Further, the psychology-related facial features correlated with weight suggested that as the BMI increases, the changes in the facial region are more prominent for Black Males and the least for White Females. This is the reason for the least error rate of the facial analysis-based BMI prediction tool for Black Males and highest for White Females.
summary: Obesity is one of the most important public health problems that the world is facing today. A recent trend is in the development of intervention tools that predict BMI using facial images for weight monitoring and management to combat obesity. Most of these studies used BMI annotated facial image datasets that mainly consisted of Caucasian subjects. Research on bias evaluation of face-based gender-, age-classification, and face recognition systems suggest that these technologies perform poorly for women, dark-skinned people, and older adults. The bias of facial analysis-based BMI prediction tools has not been studied until now. This paper evaluates the bias of facial-analysis-based BMI prediction models across Caucasian and African-American Males and Females. Experimental investigations on the gender, race, and BMI balanced version of the modified MORPH-II dataset suggested that the error rate in BMI prediction was least for Black Males and highest for White Females. Further, the psychology-related facial features correlated with weight suggested that as the BMI increases, the changes in the facial region are more prominent for Black Males and the least for White Females. This is the reason for the least error rate of the facial analysis-based BMI prediction tool for Black Males and highest for White Females.
abstract_zh: 肥胖是当今世界面临的最重要的公共卫生问题之一。最近的趋势是开发干预工具，利用面部图像预测体重指数，进行体重监测和管理，以对抗肥胖。这些研究大多数使用 BMI 注释的面部图像数据集，主要由白人受试者组成。对基于面部的性别、年龄分类和面部识别系统的偏差评估的研究表明，这些技术对于女性、深色皮肤的人和老年人来说表现不佳。迄今为止，基于面部分析的 BMI 预测工具的偏差尚未得到研究。本文评估了基于面部分析的 BMI 预测模型在白人和非裔美国男性和女性中的偏差。对修改后的 MORPH-II 数据集的性别、种族和 BMI 平衡版本的实验调查表明，黑人男性的 BMI 预测错误率最小，白人女性的错误率最高。此外，与体重相关的心理相关面部特征表明，随着体重指数的增加，黑人男性面部区域的变化更为明显，白人女性最不明显。这就是基于面部分析的 BMI 预测工具对黑人男性的错误率最低、对白人女性的错误率最高的原因。

AI.tldr: 评估基于面部分析的BMI预测模型在不同种族和性别群体中的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有BMI预测模型主要基于高加索人数据，可能对其他种族和性别群体存在偏差，但相关研究尚未开展。
AI.method: 使用性别、种族和BMI平衡的修改版MORPH-II数据集，分析模型在不同群体中的预测误差及面部特征相关性。
AI.result: 黑人男性预测误差最低，白人女性最高；BMI增加时，黑人男性面部变化更显著，白人女性变化最不明显。
AI.conclusion: 面部分析BMI模型存在显著种族和性别偏差，需优化数据集以提高公平性。

authors_text: Bobak Shahriari,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Arunkumar Byravan,Abe Friesen,Siqi Liu,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Nicolas Heess,Matt Hoffman,Martin Riedmiller
title: Revisiting Gaussian mixture critics in off-policy reinforcement learning: a sample-based approach
title_zh: 重新审视非策略强化学习中的高斯混合批评：基于样本的方法
abstract: Actor-critic algorithms that make use of distributional policy evaluation have frequently been shown to outperform their non-distributional counterparts on many challenging control tasks. Examples of this behavior include the D4PG and DMPO algorithms as compared to DDPG and MPO, respectively [Barth-Maron et al., 2018; Hoffman et al., 2020]. However, both agents rely on the C51 critic for value estimation.One major drawback of the C51 approach is its requirement of prior knowledge about the minimum andmaximum values a policy can attain as well as the number of bins used, which fixes the resolution ofthe distributional estimate. While the DeepMind control suite of tasks utilizes standardized rewards and episode lengths, thus enabling the entire suite to be solved with a single setting of these hyperparameters, this is often not the case. This paper revisits a natural alternative that removes this requirement, namelya mixture of Gaussians, and a simple sample-based loss function to train it in an off-policy regime. We empirically evaluate its performance on a broad range of continuous control tasks and demonstrate that it eliminates the need for these distributional hyperparameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of challenging tasks (e.g. the humanoid, dog, quadruped, and manipulator domains). Finallywe provide an implementation in the Acme agent repository.
summary: Actor-critic algorithms that make use of distributional policy evaluation have frequently been shown to outperform their non-distributional counterparts on many challenging control tasks. Examples of this behavior include the D4PG and DMPO algorithms as compared to DDPG and MPO, respectively [Barth-Maron et al., 2018; Hoffman et al., 2020]. However, both agents rely on the C51 critic for value estimation.One major drawback of the C51 approach is its requirement of prior knowledge about the minimum andmaximum values a policy can attain as well as the number of bins used, which fixes the resolution ofthe distributional estimate. While the DeepMind control suite of tasks utilizes standardized rewards and episode lengths, thus enabling the entire suite to be solved with a single setting of these hyperparameters, this is often not the case. This paper revisits a natural alternative that removes this requirement, namelya mixture of Gaussians, and a simple sample-based loss function to train it in an off-policy regime. We empirically evaluate its performance on a broad range of continuous control tasks and demonstrate that it eliminates the need for these distributional hyperparameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of challenging tasks (e.g. the humanoid, dog, quadruped, and manipulator domains). Finallywe provide an implementation in the Acme agent repository.
abstract_zh: 利用分布式策略评估的演员批评算法经常被证明在许多具有挑战性的控制任务上优于非分布式算法。这种行为的示例包括分别与 DDPG 和 MPO 相比的 D4PG 和 DMPO 算法 [Barth-Maron 等人，2018 年；霍夫曼等人，2020]。然而，两个智能体都依赖 C51 批评家进行价值估计。C51 方法的一个主要缺点是它需要先验知识，了解策略可以达到的最小值和最大值以及所使用的箱数，这固定了分布估计的分辨率。虽然 DeepMind 任务控制套件利用标准化奖励和情节长度，从而使整个套件能够通过这些超参数的单一设置来解决，但情况通常并非如此。本文重新审视了一种消除这一要求的自然替代方案，即高斯的混合和一个简单的基于样本的损失函数，以在离策略状态下对其进行训练。我们根据经验评估了它在广泛的连续控制任务上的性能，并证明它消除了对这些分布超参数的需要，并在各种具有挑战性的任务（例如人形、狗、四足动物和机械臂领域）上实现了最先进的性能。最后我们在 Acme 代理存储库中提供了一个实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型和样本损失函数的离线策略强化学习方法，以替代传统C51批评者。
AI.motivation: C51方法需要预先设定值域范围和分箱数量，导致超参数依赖性强且难以适应不同任务。
AI.method: 采用高斯混合模型表示值分布，设计简单样本损失函数，在离线策略框架下进行训练。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务（如人形机器人、四足机器人等）中达到SOTA性能，无需设置分布超参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法消除了分布估计的超参数需求，提升了算法通用性并保持高性能，已开源实现。

search_text: Revisiting Gaussian mixture critics in off-policy reinforcement learning: a sample-based approach 重新审视非策略强化学习中的高斯混合批评：基于样本的方法 Actor-critic algorithms that make use of distributional policy evaluation have frequently been shown to outperform their non-distributional counterparts on many challenging control tasks. Examples of this behavior include the D4PG and DMPO algorithms as compared to DDPG and MPO, respectively [Barth-Maron et al., 2018; Hoffman et al., 2020]. However, both agents rely on the C51 critic for value estimation.One major drawback of the C51 approach is its requirement of prior knowledge about the minimum andmaximum values a policy can attain as well as the number of bins used, which fixes the resolution ofthe distributional estimate. While the DeepMind control suite of tasks utilizes standardized rewards and episode lengths, thus enabling the entire suite to be solved with a single setting of these hyperparameters, this is often not the case. This paper revisits a natural alternative that removes this requirement, namelya mixture of Gaussians, and a simple sample-based loss function to train it in an off-policy regime. We empirically evaluate its performance on a broad range of continuous control tasks and demonstrate that it eliminates the need for these distributional hyperparameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of challenging tasks (e.g. the humanoid, dog, quadruped, and manipulator domains). Finallywe provide an implementation in the Acme agent repository. 利用分布式策略评估的演员批评算法经常被证明在许多具有挑战性的控制任务上优于非分布式算法。这种行为的示例包括分别与 DDPG 和 MPO 相比的 D4PG 和 DMPO 算法 [Barth-Maron 等人，2018 年；霍夫曼等人，2020]。然而，两个智能体都依赖 C51 批评家进行价值估计。C51 方法的一个主要缺点是它需要先验知识，了解策略可以达到的最小值和最大值以及所使用的箱数，这固定了分布估计的分辨率。虽然 DeepMind 任务控制套件利用标准化奖励和情节长度，从而使整个套件能够通过这些超参数的单一设置来解决，但情况通常并非如此。本文重新审视了一种消除这一要求的自然替代方案，即高斯的混合和一个简单的基于样本的损失函数，以在离策略状态下对其进行训练。我们根据经验评估了它在广泛的连续控制任务上的性能，并证明它消除了对这些分布超参数的需要，并在各种具有挑战性的任务（例如人形、狗、四足动物和机械臂领域）上实现了最先进的性能。最后我们在 Acme 代理存储库中提供了一个实现。 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型和样本损失函数的离线策略强化学习方法，以替代传统C51批评者。 Bobak Shahriari,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Arunkumar Byravan,Abe Friesen,Siqi Liu,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Nicolas Heess,Matt Hoffman,Martin Riedmiller cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hyeonsu B. Kang,Rafal Kocielnik,Andrew Head,Jiangjiang Yang,Matt Latzke,Aniket Kittur,Daniel S. Weld,Doug Downey,Jonathan Bragg
title: From Who You Know to What You Read: Augmenting Scientific Recommendations with Implicit Social Networks
title_zh: 从你认识的人到你读到的内容：通过隐式社交网络增强科学建议
comment: to be published in ACM SIGCHI 2022
comments: to be published in ACM SIGCHI 2022
abstract: The ever-increasing pace of scientific publication necessitates methods for quickly identifying relevant papers. While neural recommenders trained on user interests can help, they still result in long, monotonous lists of suggested papers. To improve the discovery experience we introduce multiple new methods for \em augmenting recommendations with textual relevance messages that highlight knowledge-graph connections between recommended papers and a user's publication and interaction history. We explore associations mediated by author entities and those using citations alone. In a large-scale, real-world study, we show how our approach significantly increases engagement -- and future engagement when mediated by authors -- without introducing bias towards highly-cited authors. To expand message coverage for users with less publication or interaction history, we develop a novel method that highlights connections with proxy authors of interest to users and evaluate it in a controlled lab study. Finally, we synthesize design implications for future graph-based messages.
summary: The ever-increasing pace of scientific publication necessitates methods for quickly identifying relevant papers. While neural recommenders trained on user interests can help, they still result in long, monotonous lists of suggested papers. To improve the discovery experience we introduce multiple new methods for \em augmenting recommendations with textual relevance messages that highlight knowledge-graph connections between recommended papers and a user's publication and interaction history. We explore associations mediated by author entities and those using citations alone. In a large-scale, real-world study, we show how our approach significantly increases engagement -- and future engagement when mediated by authors -- without introducing bias towards highly-cited authors. To expand message coverage for users with less publication or interaction history, we develop a novel method that highlights connections with proxy authors of interest to users and evaluate it in a controlled lab study. Finally, we synthesize design implications for future graph-based messages.
abstract_zh: 科学出版的步伐不断加快，需要快速识别相关论文的方法。虽然根据用户兴趣训练的神经推荐器可以提供帮助，但它们仍然会产生冗长、单调的建议论文列表。为了改善发现体验，我们引入了多种新方法，通过文本相关消息来增强推荐，这些消息突出了推荐论文与用户的出版物和交互历史之间的知识图谱联系。我们探索由作者实体介导的关联和仅使用引用的关联。在一项大规模的真实世界研究中，我们展示了我们的方法如何显着提高参与度以及由作者介导的未来参与度，而不会引入对高被引作者的偏见。为了扩大出版或互动历史较少的用户的消息覆盖范围，我们开发了一种新颖的方法，突出显示与用户感兴趣的代理作者的联系，并在受控实验室研究中对其进行评估。最后，我们综合了未来基于图形的消息的设计含义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过隐式社交网络增强科学论文推荐系统，利用知识图谱连接推荐论文与用户历史数据，提升推荐相关性和用户参与度。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统生成的论文列表冗长单调，需通过社交网络关联信息提升推荐体验并避免偏向高被引作者。
AI.method: 基于作者实体和引用关系构建知识图谱连接，开发代理作者方法覆盖低历史用户，并通过真实世界和实验室实验验证效果。
AI.result: 方法显著提升用户参与度及未来互动率，无高被引作者偏好，代理作者方法有效扩展了推荐覆盖范围。
AI.conclusion: 社交网络关联信息可优化推荐系统，未来需进一步探索图消息设计与用户行为的深层关系。

authors_text: Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Craig Greenberg,Elliot Singer,Lisa Mason,Douglas Reynolds
title: The 2021 NIST Speaker Recognition Evaluation
title_zh: 2021 年 NIST 说话人识别评估
abstract: The 2021 Speaker Recognition Evaluation (SRE21) was the latest cycle of the ongoing evaluation series conducted by the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) since 1996. It was the second large-scale multimodal speaker/person recognition evaluation organized by NIST (the first one being SRE19). Similar to SRE19, it featured two core evaluation tracks, namely audio and audio-visual, as well as an optional visual track. In addition to offering fixed and open training conditions, it also introduced new challenges for the community, thanks to a new multimodal (i.e., audio, video, and selfie images) and multilingual (i.e., with multilingual speakers) corpus, termed WeCanTalk, collected outside North America by the Linguistic Data Consortium (LDC). These challenges included: 1) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments originating from different domains (i.e., telephony versus video), and 2) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments spoken in different languages (i.e., cross-lingual trials). This paper presents an overview of SRE21 including the tasks, performance metric, data, evaluation protocol, results and system performance analyses. A total of 23 organizations (forming 15 teams) from academia and industry participated in SRE21 and submitted 158 valid system outputs. Evaluation results indicate: audio-visual fusion produce substantial gains in performance over audio-only or visual-only systems; top performing speaker and face recognition systems exhibited comparable performance under the matched domain conditions present in this evaluation; and, the use of complex neural network architectures (e.g., ResNet) along with angular losses with margin, data augmentation, as well as long duration fine-tuning contributed to notable performance improvements for the audio-only speaker recognition task.
summary: The 2021 Speaker Recognition Evaluation (SRE21) was the latest cycle of the ongoing evaluation series conducted by the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) since 1996. It was the second large-scale multimodal speaker/person recognition evaluation organized by NIST (the first one being SRE19). Similar to SRE19, it featured two core evaluation tracks, namely audio and audio-visual, as well as an optional visual track. In addition to offering fixed and open training conditions, it also introduced new challenges for the community, thanks to a new multimodal (i.e., audio, video, and selfie images) and multilingual (i.e., with multilingual speakers) corpus, termed WeCanTalk, collected outside North America by the Linguistic Data Consortium (LDC). These challenges included: 1) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments originating from different domains (i.e., telephony versus video), and 2) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments spoken in different languages (i.e., cross-lingual trials). This paper presents an overview of SRE21 including the tasks, performance metric, data, evaluation protocol, results and system performance analyses. A total of 23 organizations (forming 15 teams) from academia and industry participated in SRE21 and submitted 158 valid system outputs. Evaluation results indicate: audio-visual fusion produce substantial gains in performance over audio-only or visual-only systems; top performing speaker and face recognition systems exhibited comparable performance under the matched domain conditions present in this evaluation; and, the use of complex neural network architectures (e.g., ResNet) along with angular losses with margin, data augmentation, as well as long duration fine-tuning contributed to notable performance improvements for the audio-only speaker recognition task.
abstract_zh: 2021年说话人识别评估（SRE21）是美国国家标准与技术研究院（NIST）自1996年以来正在进行的评估系列的最新一轮。这是NIST组织的第二次大规模多模态说话人/人识别评估（第一次是SRE19）。与SRE19类似，它具有两个核心评估轨道，即音频和视听轨道，以及可选的视觉轨道。除了提供固定和开放的培训条件外，它还给社区带来了新的挑战，这要归功于由语言数据联盟 (LDC) 在北美以外收集的新的多模式（即音频、视频和自拍图像）和多语言（即多语言发言者）语料库，称为 WeCanTalk。这些挑战包括：1）来自不同领域（即电话与视频）的注册和测试部分的试验（目标和非目标），以及 2）以不同语言进行的注册和测试部分的试验（目标和非目标）（即跨语言试验）。本文概述了 SRE21，包括任务、性能指标、数据、评估协议、结果和系统性能分析。共有来自学术界和工业界的 23 个组织（组成 15 个团队）参加了 SRE21，并提交了 158 个有效的系统输出。评估结果表明：与纯音频或纯视觉系统相比，视听融合在性能方面取得了显着的进步；性能最佳的说话人和人脸识别系统在本次评估中的匹配域条件下表现出可比的性能；并且，复杂的神经网络架构（例如 ResNet）的使用以及带有余量的角度损失、数据增强以及长时间的微调有助于显着提高纯音频说话人识别任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了2021年NIST说话人识别评估（SRE21）的总体情况，包括任务设计、性能指标、数据集、评估协议、结果及系统性能分析。
AI.motivation: 为应对说话人识别领域的新挑战，如多模态（音频、视频、自拍图像）和多语言数据，NIST组织了SRE21评估，以推动技术发展并测试系统在跨领域和跨语言场景下的表现。
AI.method: SRE21包含音频和音频-视觉两个核心评估轨道，引入多模态多语言数据集WeCanTalk，设置固定和开放训练条件，并通过跨领域（电话vs视频）和跨语言试验测试系统性能。23个机构的15支队伍提交了158个系统输出。
AI.result: 音频-视觉融合显著优于单一模态系统；顶级说话人和人脸识别系统在匹配条件下表现相当；复杂神经网络架构（如ResNet）、角损失、数据增强和长时微调提升了音频仅说话人识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 音频-视觉融合与先进神经网络技术有效提升性能，但跨领域和跨语言场景仍是挑战。WeCanTalk数据集为未来研究提供了重要资源。

search_text: The 2021 NIST Speaker Recognition Evaluation 2021 年 NIST 说话人识别评估 The 2021 Speaker Recognition Evaluation (SRE21) was the latest cycle of the ongoing evaluation series conducted by the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) since 1996. It was the second large-scale multimodal speaker/person recognition evaluation organized by NIST (the first one being SRE19). Similar to SRE19, it featured two core evaluation tracks, namely audio and audio-visual, as well as an optional visual track. In addition to offering fixed and open training conditions, it also introduced new challenges for the community, thanks to a new multimodal (i.e., audio, video, and selfie images) and multilingual (i.e., with multilingual speakers) corpus, termed WeCanTalk, collected outside North America by the Linguistic Data Consortium (LDC). These challenges included: 1) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments originating from different domains (i.e., telephony versus video), and 2) trials (target and non-target) with enrollment and test segments spoken in different languages (i.e., cross-lingual trials). This paper presents an overview of SRE21 including the tasks, performance metric, data, evaluation protocol, results and system performance analyses. A total of 23 organizations (forming 15 teams) from academia and industry participated in SRE21 and submitted 158 valid system outputs. Evaluation results indicate: audio-visual fusion produce substantial gains in performance over audio-only or visual-only systems; top performing speaker and face recognition systems exhibited comparable performance under the matched domain conditions present in this evaluation; and, the use of complex neural network architectures (e.g., ResNet) along with angular losses with margin, data augmentation, as well as long duration fine-tuning contributed to notable performance improvements for the audio-only speaker recognition task. 2021年说话人识别评估（SRE21）是美国国家标准与技术研究院（NIST）自1996年以来正在进行的评估系列的最新一轮。这是NIST组织的第二次大规模多模态说话人/人识别评估（第一次是SRE19）。与SRE19类似，它具有两个核心评估轨道，即音频和视听轨道，以及可选的视觉轨道。除了提供固定和开放的培训条件外，它还给社区带来了新的挑战，这要归功于由语言数据联盟 (LDC) 在北美以外收集的新的多模式（即音频、视频和自拍图像）和多语言（即多语言发言者）语料库，称为 WeCanTalk。这些挑战包括：1）来自不同领域（即电话与视频）的注册和测试部分的试验（目标和非目标），以及 2）以不同语言进行的注册和测试部分的试验（目标和非目标）（即跨语言试验）。本文概述了 SRE21，包括任务、性能指标、数据、评估协议、结果和系统性能分析。共有来自学术界和工业界的 23 个组织（组成 15 个团队）参加了 SRE21，并提交了 158 个有效的系统输出。评估结果表明：与纯音频或纯视觉系统相比，视听融合在性能方面取得了显着的进步；性能最佳的说话人和人脸识别系统在本次评估中的匹配域条件下表现出可比的性能；并且，复杂的神经网络架构（例如 ResNet）的使用以及带有余量的角度损失、数据增强以及长时间的微调有助于显着提高纯音频说话人识别任务的性能。 本文介绍了2021年NIST说话人识别评估（SRE21）的总体情况，包括任务设计、性能指标、数据集、评估协议、结果及系统性能分析。 Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Craig Greenberg,Elliot Singer,Lisa Mason,Douglas Reynolds eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.IV

authors_text: Md. Bakhtiar Hasan,Tasnim Ahmed,Md. Hasanul Kabir
title: HEATGait: Hop-Extracted Adjacency Technique in Graph Convolution based Gait Recognition
title_zh: HEATGait：基于图卷积的步态识别中的跳步提取邻接技术
comment: Accepted in 2022 4th International Conference on Advances in Computer Technology, Information Science and Communications (CTISC 2022). 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
comments: Accepted in 2022 4th International Conference on Advances in Computer Technology, Information Science and Communications (CTISC 2022). 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Biometric authentication using gait has become a promising field due to its unobtrusive nature. Recent approaches in model-based gait recognition techniques utilize spatio-temporal graphs for the elegant extraction of gait features. However, existing methods often rely on multi-scale operators for extracting long-range relationships among joints resulting in biased weighting. In this paper, we present HEATGait, a gait recognition system that improves the existing multi-scale graph convolution by efficient hop-extraction technique to alleviate the issue. Combined with preprocessing and augmentation techniques, we propose a powerful feature extractor that utilizes ResGCN to achieve state-of-the-art performance in model-based gait recognition on the CASIA-B gait dataset.
summary: Biometric authentication using gait has become a promising field due to its unobtrusive nature. Recent approaches in model-based gait recognition techniques utilize spatio-temporal graphs for the elegant extraction of gait features. However, existing methods often rely on multi-scale operators for extracting long-range relationships among joints resulting in biased weighting. In this paper, we present HEATGait, a gait recognition system that improves the existing multi-scale graph convolution by efficient hop-extraction technique to alleviate the issue. Combined with preprocessing and augmentation techniques, we propose a powerful feature extractor that utilizes ResGCN to achieve state-of-the-art performance in model-based gait recognition on the CASIA-B gait dataset.
abstract_zh: 由于其不引人注目的性质，使用步态的生物识别认证已成为一个有前途的领域。基于模型的步态识别技术的最新方法利用时空图来优雅地提取步态特征。然而，现有的方法通常依赖于多尺度算子来提取关节之间的远程关系，从而导致加权有偏差。在本文中，我们提出了 HEATGait，一种步态识别系统，它通过有效的跳跃提取技术改进了现有的多尺度图卷积，以缓解该问题。结合预处理和增强技术，我们提出了一种强大的特征提取器，利用 ResGCN 在 CASIA-B 步态数据集上基于模型的步态识别中实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HEATGait系统，通过改进图卷积中的多尺度方法，提升基于模型的步态识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法依赖多尺度算子提取关节长距离关系，但存在权重偏差问题，影响识别效果。
AI.method: 采用跳步提取邻接矩阵技术优化图卷积，结合ResGCN网络与预处理增强技术构建特征提取器。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上达到模型基于步态识别的最先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Hop-Extracted邻接技术有效缓解了多尺度图卷积的权重偏差问题，为步态识别提供新方法。

authors_text: Zixuan Huang,Stefan Stojanov,Anh Thai,Varun Jampani,James M. Rehg
title: Planes vs. Chairs: Category-guided 3D shape learning without any 3D cues
title_zh: 飞机与椅子：类别引导的 3D 形状学习，无需任何 3D 提示
abstract: We present a novel 3D shape reconstruction method which learns to predict an implicit 3D shape representation from a single RGB image. Our approach uses a set of single-view images of multiple object categories without viewpoint annotation, forcing the model to learn across multiple object categories without 3D supervision. To facilitate learning with such minimal supervision, we use category labels to guide shape learning with a novel categorical metric learning approach. We also utilize adversarial and viewpoint regularization techniques to further disentangle the effects of viewpoint and shape. We obtain the first results for large-scale (more than 50 categories) single-viewpoint shape prediction using a single model without any 3D cues. We are also the first to examine and quantify the benefit of class information in single-view supervised 3D shape reconstruction. Our method achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on ShapeNet-13, ShapeNet-55 and Pascal3D+.
summary: We present a novel 3D shape reconstruction method which learns to predict an implicit 3D shape representation from a single RGB image. Our approach uses a set of single-view images of multiple object categories without viewpoint annotation, forcing the model to learn across multiple object categories without 3D supervision. To facilitate learning with such minimal supervision, we use category labels to guide shape learning with a novel categorical metric learning approach. We also utilize adversarial and viewpoint regularization techniques to further disentangle the effects of viewpoint and shape. We obtain the first results for large-scale (more than 50 categories) single-viewpoint shape prediction using a single model without any 3D cues. We are also the first to examine and quantify the benefit of class information in single-view supervised 3D shape reconstruction. Our method achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on ShapeNet-13, ShapeNet-55 and Pascal3D+.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 形状重建方法，该方法学习从单个 RGB 图像预测隐式 3D 形状表示。我们的方法使用一组多个对象类别的单视图图像，没有视点注释，迫使模型在没有 3D 监督的情况下跨多个对象类别学习。为了以最小的监督促进学习，我们使用类别标签通过新颖的分类度量学习方法来指导形状学习。我们还利用对抗性和视点正则化技术来进一步消除视点和形状的影响。我们使用单个模型在没有任何 3D 线索的情况下获得了大规模（超过 50 个类别）单视点形状预测的第一个结果。我们也是第一个检查和量化单视图监督 3D 形状重建中类信息的好处的人。我们的方法在 ShapeNet-13、ShapeNet-55 和 Pascal3D+ 上实现了优于最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需任何3D线索的3D形状重建方法，通过单张RGB图像预测隐式3D形状表示，并利用类别标签指导跨多类别的学习。
AI.motivation: 传统3D重建依赖大量标注的3D数据，而本文旨在探索如何在无3D监督的情况下，仅通过单视图图像和类别信息实现大规模3D形状预测。
AI.method: 采用类别引导的度量学习方法，结合对抗训练和视角正则化技术，利用类别标签分离视角与形状的影响，实现跨多类别（超过50类）的单视图3D重建。
AI.result: 首次在无3D线索的单视图场景下实现大规模3D形状预测，在ShapeNet-13、ShapeNet-55和Pascal3D+数据集上优于现有方法，并量化了类别信息对重建的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了类别信息在单视图3D重建中的关键作用，为无3D监督的跨类别形状学习提供了有效框架，推动了少样本3D重建的发展。

motivation: 传统3D重建依赖大量标注的3D数据，而本文旨在探索如何在无3D监督的情况下，仅通过单视图图像和类别信息实现大规模3D形状预测。
method: 采用类别引导的度量学习方法，结合对抗训练和视角正则化技术，利用类别标签分离视角与形状的影响，实现跨多类别（超过50类）的单视图3D重建。
result: 首次在无3D线索的单视图场景下实现大规模3D形状预测，在ShapeNet-13、ShapeNet-55和Pascal3D+数据集上优于现有方法，并量化了类别信息对重建的提升效果。
conclusion: 本文证明了类别信息在单视图3D重建中的关键作用，为无3D监督的跨类别形状学习提供了有效框架，推动了少样本3D重建的发展。
search_text: Planes vs. Chairs: Category-guided 3D shape learning without any 3D cues 飞机与椅子：类别引导的 3D 形状学习，无需任何 3D 提示 We present a novel 3D shape reconstruction method which learns to predict an implicit 3D shape representation from a single RGB image. Our approach uses a set of single-view images of multiple object categories without viewpoint annotation, forcing the model to learn across multiple object categories without 3D supervision. To facilitate learning with such minimal supervision, we use category labels to guide shape learning with a novel categorical metric learning approach. We also utilize adversarial and viewpoint regularization techniques to further disentangle the effects of viewpoint and shape. We obtain the first results for large-scale (more than 50 categories) single-viewpoint shape prediction using a single model without any 3D cues. We are also the first to examine and quantify the benefit of class information in single-view supervised 3D shape reconstruction. Our method achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on ShapeNet-13, ShapeNet-55 and Pascal3D+. 我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 形状重建方法，该方法学习从单个 RGB 图像预测隐式 3D 形状表示。我们的方法使用一组多个对象类别的单视图图像，没有视点注释，迫使模型在没有 3D 监督的情况下跨多个对象类别学习。为了以最小的监督促进学习，我们使用类别标签通过新颖的分类度量学习方法来指导形状学习。我们还利用对抗性和视点正则化技术来进一步消除视点和形状的影响。我们使用单个模型在没有任何 3D 线索的情况下获得了大规模（超过 50 个类别）单视点形状预测的第一个结果。我们也是第一个检查和量化单视图监督 3D 形状重建中类信息的好处的人。我们的方法在 ShapeNet-13、ShapeNet-55 和 Pascal3D+ 上实现了优于最先进方法的性能。 本文提出一种无需任何3D线索的3D形状重建方法，通过单张RGB图像预测隐式3D形状表示，并利用类别标签指导跨多类别的学习。 Zixuan Huang,Stefan Stojanov,Anh Thai,Varun Jampani,James M. Rehg cs.CV

authors_text: Alejandro Rosales-Pérez,Salvador García,Francisco Herrera
title: Handling Imbalanced Classification Problems With Support Vector Machines via Evolutionary Bilevel Optimization
title_zh: 通过进化双层优化使用支持向量机处理不平衡分类问题

abstract: Support vector machines (SVMs) are popular learning algorithms to deal with binary classification problems. They traditionally assume equal misclassification costs for each class; however, real-world problems may have an uneven class distribution. This article introduces EBCS-SVM: evolutionary bilevel cost-sensitive SVMs. EBCS-SVM handles imbalanced classification problems by simultaneously learning the support vectors and optimizing the SVM hyperparameters, which comprise the kernel parameter and misclassification costs. The resulting optimization problem is a bilevel problem, where the lower level determines the support vectors and the upper level the hyperparameters. This optimization problem is solved using an evolutionary algorithm (EA) at the upper level and sequential minimal optimization (SMO) at the lower level. These two methods work in a nested fashion, that is, the optimal support vectors help guide the search of the hyperparameters, and the lower level is initialized based on previous successful solutions. The proposed method is assessed using 70 datasets of imbalanced classification and compared with several state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results, supported by a Bayesian test, provided evidence of the effectiveness of EBCS-SVM when working with highly imbalanced datasets.

They traditionally assume equal misclassification costs for each class; however, real-world problems may have an uneven class distribution. This article introduces EBCS-SVM: evolutionary bilevel cost-sensitive SVMs. EBCS-SVM handles imbalanced classification problems by simultaneously learning the support vectors and optimizing the SVM hyperparameters, which comprise the kernel parameter and misclassification costs. The resulting optimization problem is a bilevel problem, where the lower level determines the support vectors and the upper level the hyperparameters. This optimization problem is solved using an evolutionary algorithm (EA) at the upper level and sequential minimal optimization (SMO) at the lower level. These two methods work in a nested fashion, that is, the optimal support vectors help guide the search of the hyperparameters, and the lower level is initialized based on previous successful solutions. The proposed method is assessed using 70 datasets of imbalanced classification and compared with several state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results, supported by a Bayesian test, provided evidence of the effectiveness of EBCS-SVM when working with highly imbalanced datasets.
abstract_zh: 支持向量机 (SVM) 是处理二元分类问题的流行学习算法。传统上，他们假设每个类别的误分类成本相等；然而，现实世界的问题可能存在不均匀的类别分布。本文介绍 EBCS-SVM：进化双层成本敏感 SVM。 EBCS-SVM 通过同时学习支持向量和优化 SVM 超参数（包括核参数和误分类成本）来处理不平衡分类问题。由此产生的优化问题是一个双层问题，其中较低层确定支持向量，较高层确定超参数。该优化问题是使用上层的进化算法（EA）和下层的顺序最小优化（SMO）来解决的。这两种方法以嵌套的方式工作，即最优支持向量帮助指导超参数的搜索，而较低级别则基于先前成功的解决方案进行初始化。使用 70 个不平衡分类数据集对所提出的方法进行评估，并与几种最先进的方法进行比较。得到贝叶斯测试支持的实验结果提供了 EBCS-SVM 在处理高度不平衡数据集时的有效性的证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于进化双层优化的代价敏感支持向量机（EBCS-SVM），用于解决分类不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统支持向量机（SVM）假设各类别误分类成本相等，但实际问题中类别分布可能极不平衡，需调整误分类代价以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过进化算法（EA）优化上层超参数（核参数和误分类代价），结合序列最小优化（SMO）求解下层支持向量，形成嵌套双层优化框架。
AI.result: 在70个不平衡数据集上的实验表明，EBCS-SVM相较现有方法在高度不平衡数据中表现更优，贝叶斯检验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: EBCS-SVM通过双层优化同步学习支持向量与超参数，有效解决了分类不平衡问题，验证了该方法在实际应用中的优势。

authors_text: Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Craig Greenberg,Elliot Singer,Lisa Mason,Douglas Reynolds
title: The NIST CTS Speaker Recognition Challenge
title_zh: NIST CTS 说话人识别挑战赛
abstract: The US National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) has been conducting a second iteration of the CTS challenge since August 2020. The current iteration of the CTS Challenge is a leaderboard-style speaker recognition evaluation using telephony data extracted from the unexposed portions of the Call My Net 2 (CMN2) and Multi-Language Speech (MLS) corpora collected by the LDC. The CTS Challenge is currently organized in a similar manner to the SRE19 CTS Challenge, offering only an open training condition using two evaluation subsets, namely Progress and Test. Unlike in the SRE19 Challenge, no training or development set was initially released, and NIST has publicly released the leaderboards on both subsets for the CTS Challenge. Which subset (i.e., Progress or Test) a trial belongs to is unknown to challenge participants, and each system submission needs to contain outputs for all of the trials. The CTS Challenge has also served, and will continue to do so, as a prerequisite for entrance to the regular SREs (such as SRE21). Since August 2020, a total of 53 organizations (forming 33 teams) from academia and industry have participated in the CTS Challenge and submitted more than 4400 valid system outputs. This paper presents an overview of the evaluation and several analyses of system performance for some primary conditions in the CTS Challenge. The CTS Challenge results thus far indicate remarkable improvements in performance due to 1) speaker embeddings extracted using large-scale and complex neural network architectures such as ResNets along with angular margin losses for speaker embedding extraction, 2) extensive data augmentation, 3) the use of large amounts of in-house proprietary data from a large number of labeled speakers, 4) long-duration fine-tuning.

The current iteration of the CTS Challenge is a leaderboard-style speaker recognition evaluation using telephony data extracted from the unexposed portions of the Call My Net 2 (CMN2) and Multi-Language Speech (MLS) corpora collected by the LDC. The CTS Challenge is currently organized in a similar manner to the SRE19 CTS Challenge, offering only an open training condition using two evaluation subsets, namely Progress and Test. Unlike in the SRE19 Challenge, no training or development set was initially released, and NIST has publicly released the leaderboards on both subsets for the CTS Challenge. Which subset (i.e., Progress or Test) a trial belongs to is unknown to challenge participants, and each system submission needs to contain outputs for all of the trials. The CTS Challenge has also served, and will continue to do so, as a prerequisite for entrance to the regular SREs (such as SRE21). Since August 2020, a total of 53 organizations (forming 33 teams) from academia and industry have participated in the CTS Challenge and submitted more than 4400 valid system outputs. This paper presents an overview of the evaluation and several analyses of system performance for some primary conditions in the CTS Challenge. The CTS Challenge results thus far indicate remarkable improvements in performance due to 1) speaker embeddings extracted using large-scale and complex neural network architectures such as ResNets along with angular margin losses for speaker embedding extraction, 2) extensive data augmentation, 3) the use of large amounts of in-house proprietary data from a large number of labeled speakers, 4) long-duration fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 美国国家标准与技术研究院 (NIST) 自 2020 年 8 月以来一直在进行第二次 CTS 挑战赛。当前的 CTS 挑战赛是一种排行榜式的说话人识别评估，使用从 LDC 收集的 Call My Net 2 (CMN2) 和多语言语音 (MLS) 语料库的未公开部分中提取的电话数据。 CTS 挑战赛目前的组织方式与 SRE19 CTS 挑战赛类似，仅提供使用两个评估子集（即进度和测试）的开放训练条件。与 SRE19 挑战赛不同，最初没有发布任何训练或开发集，NIST 公开发布了 CTS 挑战赛两个子集的排行榜。对于挑战参与者来说，试验属于哪个子集（即进度或测试）是未知的，并且每个系统提交都需要包含所有试验的输出。 CTS 挑战赛已经并将继续作为进入常规 SRE（例如 SRE21）的先决条件。自2020年8月以来，共有来自学术界和工业界的53个组织（组成33个团队）参加了CTS挑战赛，并提交了超过4400个有效的系统输出。本文概述了 CTS 挑战赛中一些主要条件下的系统性能评估和几种分析。迄今为止，CTS 挑战赛的结果表明性能显着提高，原因如下：1) 使用大规模且复杂的神经网络架构（例如 ResNet）提取说话人嵌入，以及说话人嵌入提取的角度裕度损失；2) 广泛的数据增强；3) 使用来自大量标记说话人的大量内部专有数据；4) 长时间微调。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了NIST CTS说话人识别挑战赛的评估情况，并分析了部分主要条件下的系统性能。
AI.motivation: 通过 leaderboard 式挑战赛推动说话人识别技术进步，利用电话数据评估系统性能，并为后续SRE赛事筛选参赛队伍。
AI.method: 使用CMN2和MLS语料库中的未曝光数据，设置Progress和Test两个评估子集，参赛者需提交所有试验的输出结果，且不透露试验所属子集。
AI.result: 系统性能显著提升，主要得益于ResNet等复杂网络结构、数据增强、大量内部数据及长时微调等技术。
AI.conclusion: CTS挑战赛验证了前沿技术的有效性，并为SRE赛事提供了高质量参赛队伍，未来将继续推动说话人识别技术发展。

The CTS Challenge results thus far indicate remarkable improvements in performance due to 1) speaker embeddings extracted using large-scale and complex neural network architectures such as ResNets along with angular margin losses for speaker embedding extraction, 2) extensive data augmentation, 3) the use of large amounts of in-house proprietary data from a large number of labeled speakers, 4) long-duration fine-tuning. 美国国家标准与技术研究院 (NIST) 自 2020 年 8 月以来一直在进行第二次 CTS 挑战赛。当前的 CTS 挑战赛是一种排行榜式的说话人识别评估，使用从 LDC 收集的 Call My Net 2 (CMN2) 和多语言语音 (MLS) 语料库的未公开部分中提取的电话数据。 CTS 挑战赛目前的组织方式与 SRE19 CTS 挑战赛类似，仅提供使用两个评估子集（即进度和测试）的开放训练条件。与 SRE19 挑战赛不同，最初没有发布任何训练或开发集，NIST 公开发布了 CTS 挑战赛两个子集的排行榜。对于挑战参与者来说，试验属于哪个子集（即进度或测试）是未知的，并且每个系统提交都需要包含所有试验的输出。 CTS 挑战赛已经并将继续作为进入常规 SRE（例如 SRE21）的先决条件。自2020年8月以来，共有来自学术界和工业界的53个组织（组成33个团队）参加了CTS挑战赛，并提交了超过4400个有效的系统输出。本文概述了 CTS 挑战赛中一些主要条件下的系统性能评估和几种分析。迄今为止，CTS 挑战赛的结果表明性能显着提高，原因如下：1) 使用大规模且复杂的神经网络架构（例如 ResNet）提取说话人嵌入，以及说话人嵌入提取的角度裕度损失；2) 广泛的数据增强；3) 使用来自大量标记说话人的大量内部专有数据；4) 长时间微调。 本文概述了NIST CTS说话人识别挑战赛的评估情况，并分析了部分主要条件下的系统性能。 Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Craig Greenberg,Elliot Singer,Lisa Mason,Douglas Reynolds eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,stat.ML

authors_text: Mehdi Mehdipour Ghazi,Amin Ramezani,Mehdi Siahi,Mostafa Mehdipour Ghazi
title: Learning spatiotemporal features from incomplete data for traffic flow prediction using hybrid deep neural networks
title_zh: 使用混合深度神经网络从不完整数据中学习时空特征以进行交通流预测
abstract: Urban traffic flow prediction using data-driven models can play an important role in route planning and preventing congestion on highways. These methods utilize data collected from traffic recording stations at different timestamps to predict the future status of traffic. Hence, data collection, transmission, storage, and extraction techniques can have a significant impact on the performance of the traffic flow model. On the other hand, a comprehensive database can provide the opportunity for using complex, yet reliable predictive models such as deep learning methods. However, most of these methods have difficulties in handling missing values and outliers. This study focuses on hybrid deep neural networks to predict traffic flow in the California Freeway Performance Measurement System (PeMS) with missing values. The proposed networks are based on a combination of recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to consider the temporal dependencies in the data recorded in each station and convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to take the spatial correlations in the adjacent stations into account. Various architecture configurations with series and parallel connections are considered based on RNNs and CNNs, and several prevalent data imputation techniques are used to examine the robustness of the hybrid networks to missing values. A comprehensive analysis performed on two different datasets from PeMS indicates that the proposed series-parallel hybrid network with the mean imputation technique achieves the lowest error in predicting the traffic flow and is robust to missing values up until 21% missing ratio in both complete and incomplete training data scenarios when applied to an incomplete test data.
summary: Urban traffic flow prediction using data-driven models can play an important role in route planning and preventing congestion on highways. These methods utilize data collected from traffic recording stations at different timestamps to predict the future status of traffic. Hence, data collection, transmission, storage, and extraction techniques can have a significant impact on the performance of the traffic flow model. On the other hand, a comprehensive database can provide the opportunity for using complex, yet reliable predictive models such as deep learning methods. However, most of these methods have difficulties in handling missing values and outliers. This study focuses on hybrid deep neural networks to predict traffic flow in the California Freeway Performance Measurement System (PeMS) with missing values. The proposed networks are based on a combination of recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to consider the temporal dependencies in the data recorded in each station and convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to take the spatial correlations in the adjacent stations into account. Various architecture configurations with series and parallel connections are considered based on RNNs and CNNs, and several prevalent data imputation techniques are used to examine the robustness of the hybrid networks to missing values. A comprehensive analysis performed on two different datasets from PeMS indicates that the proposed series-parallel hybrid network with the mean imputation technique achieves the lowest error in predicting the traffic flow and is robust to missing values up until 21% missing ratio in both complete and incomplete training data scenarios when applied to an incomplete test data.
abstract_zh: 使用数据驱动模型的城市交通流量预测可以在路线规划和防止高速公路拥堵方面发挥重要作用。这些方法利用在不同时间戳从交通记录站收集的数据来预测交通的未来状态。因此，数据收集、传输、存储和提取技术会对交通流模型的性能产生重大影响。另一方面，综合数据库可以提供使用复杂但可靠的预测模型（例如深度学习方法）的机会。然而，大多数这些方法在处理缺失值和异常值方面都存在困难。本研究重点关注混合深度神经网络，以预测具有缺失值的加州高速公路性能测量系统 (PeMS) 中的交通流量。所提出的网络基于循环神经网络（RNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的组合，以考虑每个站记录的数据的时间依赖性，并考虑相邻站的空间相关性。基于 RNN 和 CNN，考虑了具有串联和并行连接的各种架构配置，并使用几种流行的数据插补技术来检查混合网络对缺失值的鲁棒性。对 PeMS 的两个不同数据集进行的综合分析表明，所提出的采用均值插补技术的串并联混合网络在预测交通流方面实现了最低的误差，并且当应用于不完整的测试数据时，在完整和不完整的训练数据场景中，对于缺失值高达 21% 的缺失率具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合循环神经网络（RNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的混合深度神经网络，用于处理不完整数据的交通流量预测。
AI.motivation: 现有交通流量预测方法在处理缺失值和异常值时存在困难，而可靠的数据驱动模型对城市交通规划和拥堵预防至关重要。
AI.method: 采用RNN捕捉时间依赖性，CNN提取空间相关性，设计串行和并行混合架构，并结合多种数据填补技术（如均值填补）验证模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在PeMS数据集上，串行-并行混合网络结合均值填补技术，在训练数据和测试数据缺失率高达21%时仍保持最低预测误差。
AI.conclusion: 混合网络架构与均值填补技术结合，能有效应对不完整数据的交通流量预测，为实际应用提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Chunggi Lee,Juyoung Oh,Seungmin Jin,Isaac Cho,Sungahn Ko
title: A Graphical Workflow Exploration Environment For Visual Analytics
title_zh: 用于视觉分析的图形工作流程探索环境
abstract: Graphical history mechanisms have been widely utilized in many domains to support humans' limited working memory, error recovery, collaboration, and presentation in visual analysis. Yet, there are aspects that remain under-explored in designing graphical history systems for visual analytics systems to help analysts who have complicated workflows. In this paper we report on our design study performed with domain experts, where we characterize domain tasks and designed a visual graphical workflow management environment. Our environment allows analysts to efficiently review, edit, navigate, and explore their complex workflows with their colleagues. In order to evaluate the environment, we present a case study and user study. In the case study, we explore how two domain experts perform collaborative review, communication, and training with our environment; while in the user study with the car data, we reveal that how our environment helps users and how the history mechanism affects users' visual problem-solving behaviors.
summary: Graphical history mechanisms have been widely utilized in many domains to support humans' limited working memory, error recovery, collaboration, and presentation in visual analysis. Yet, there are aspects that remain under-explored in designing graphical history systems for visual analytics systems to help analysts who have complicated workflows. In this paper we report on our design study performed with domain experts, where we characterize domain tasks and designed a visual graphical workflow management environment. Our environment allows analysts to efficiently review, edit, navigate, and explore their complex workflows with their colleagues. In order to evaluate the environment, we present a case study and user study. In the case study, we explore how two domain experts perform collaborative review, communication, and training with our environment; while in the user study with the car data, we reveal that how our environment helps users and how the history mechanism affects users' visual problem-solving behaviors.
abstract_zh: 图形历史机制已广泛应用于许多领域，以支持人类有限的工作记忆、错误恢复、协作和视觉分析中的呈现。然而，在为可视化分析系统设计图形历史系统以帮助具有复杂工作流程的分析师时，仍有一些方面尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们报告了与领域专家一起进行的设计研究，其中我们描述了领域任务并设计了可视化图形工作流程管理环境。我们的环境允许分析师与同事一起高效地审查、编辑、导航和探索复杂的工作流程。为了评估环境，我们提出了案例研究和用户研究。在案例研究中，我们探讨了两位领域专家如何在我们的环境中进行协作审查、沟通和培训；而在汽车数据的用户研究中，我们揭示了我们的环境如何帮助用户以及历史机制如何影响用户的视觉问题解决行为。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种图形化的工作流探索环境，用于支持可视化分析中的复杂工作流管理。
AI.motivation: 图形历史机制在许多领域被广泛使用，但针对复杂工作流的可视化分析系统中，图形历史系统的某些方面仍需进一步探索。
AI.method: 通过与领域专家的合作设计研究，本文对领域任务进行了特征化，并设计了一个可视化图形工作流管理环境，然后通过案例研究和用户研究进行了评估。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，该环境支持专家之间的协作审查、沟通和培训；用户研究显示该环境有助于用户的可视化问题解决行为，并揭示了历史机制对用户行为的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该图形化工作流管理环境能够有效帮助用户回顾、编辑、导航和探索复杂的工作流，并促进协作和问题解决。

In the case study, we explore how two domain experts perform collaborative review, communication, and training with our environment; while in the user study with the car data, we reveal that how our environment helps users and how the history mechanism affects users' visual problem-solving behaviors. 图形历史机制已广泛应用于许多领域，以支持人类有限的工作记忆、错误恢复、协作和视觉分析中的呈现。然而，在为可视化分析系统设计图形历史系统以帮助具有复杂工作流程的分析师时，仍有一些方面尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们报告了与领域专家一起进行的设计研究，其中我们描述了领域任务并设计了可视化图形工作流程管理环境。我们的环境允许分析师与同事一起高效地审查、编辑、导航和探索复杂的工作流程。为了评估环境，我们提出了案例研究和用户研究。在案例研究中，我们探讨了两位领域专家如何在我们的环境中进行协作审查、沟通和培训；而在汽车数据的用户研究中，我们揭示了我们的环境如何帮助用户以及历史机制如何影响用户的视觉问题解决行为。 本文介绍了一种图形化的工作流探索环境，用于支持可视化分析中的复杂工作流管理。 Chunggi Lee,Juyoung Oh,Seungmin Jin,Isaac Cho,Sungahn Ko cs.HC

authors_text: Juhwan Lee,Justin N. Kim,Yazan Gharaibeh,Vladislav N. Zimin,Luis A. P. Dallan,Gabriel T. R. Pereira,Armando Vergara-Martel,Chaitanya Kolluru,Ammar Hoori,Hiram G. Bezerra,David L. Wilson
title: OCTOPUS -- optical coherence tomography plaque and stent analysis software
title_zh: OCTOPUS——光学相干断层扫描斑块和支架分析软件
abstract: Compared with other imaging modalities, intravascular optical coherence tomography (IVOCT) has significant advantages for guiding percutaneous coronary interventions. To aid IVOCT research studies, we developed the Optical Coherence TOmography PlaqUe and Stent (OCTOPUS) analysis software. To automate image analysis results, the software includes several important algorithmic steps: pre-processing, deep learning plaque segmentation, machine learning identification of stent struts, and registration of pullbacks. Interactive visualization and manual editing of segmentations were included in the software. Quantifications include stent deployment characteristics (e.g., stent strut malapposition), strut level analysis, calcium angle, and calcium thickness measurements. Interactive visualizations include (x,y) anatomical, en face, and longitudinal views with optional overlays. Underlying plaque segmentation algorithm yielded excellent pixel-wise results (86.2% sensitivity and 0.781 F1 score). Using OCTOPUS on 34 new pullbacks, we determined that following automated segmentation, only 13% and 23% of frames needed any manual touch up for detailed lumen and calcification labeling, respectively. Only up to 3.8% of plaque pixels were modified, leading to an average editing time of only 7.5 seconds/frame, an approximately 80% reduction compared to manual analysis. Regarding stent analysis, sensitivity and precision were both greater than 90%, and each strut was successfully classified as either covered or uncovered with high sensitivity (94%) and specificity (90%). We introduced and evaluated the clinical application of a highly automated software package, OCTOPUS, for quantitative plaque and stent analysis in IVOCT images. The software is currently used as an offline tool for research purposes; however, the software's embedded algorithms may also be useful for real-time treatment planning.

To aid IVOCT research studies, we developed the Optical Coherence TOmography PlaqUe and Stent (OCTOPUS) analysis software. To automate image analysis results, the software includes several important algorithmic steps: pre-processing, deep learning plaque segmentation, machine learning identification of stent struts, and registration of pullbacks. Interactive visualization and manual editing of segmentations were included in the software. Quantifications include stent deployment characteristics (e.g., stent strut malapposition), strut level analysis, calcium angle, and calcium thickness measurements. Interactive visualizations include (x,y) anatomical, en face, and longitudinal views with optional overlays. Underlying plaque segmentation algorithm yielded excellent pixel-wise results (86.2% sensitivity and 0.781 F1 score). Using OCTOPUS on 34 new pullbacks, we determined that following automated segmentation, only 13% and 23% of frames needed any manual touch up for detailed lumen and calcification labeling, respectively. Only up to 3.8% of plaque pixels were modified, leading to an average editing time of only 7.5 seconds/frame, an approximately 80% reduction compared to manual analysis. Regarding stent analysis, sensitivity and precision were both greater than 90%, and each strut was successfully classified as either covered or uncovered with high sensitivity (94%) and specificity (90%). We introduced and evaluated the clinical application of a highly automated software package, OCTOPUS, for quantitative plaque and stent analysis in IVOCT images. The software is currently used as an offline tool for research purposes; however, the software's embedded algorithms may also be useful for real-time treatment planning.
abstract_zh: 与其他成像方式相比，血管内光学相干断层扫描（IVOCT）在指导经皮冠状动脉介入治疗方面具有显着优势。为了帮助 IVOCT 研究，我们开发了光学相干断层扫描斑块和支架 (OCTOPUS) 分析软件。为了自动化图像分析结果，该软件包括几个重要的算法步骤：预处理、深度学习斑块分割、支架支柱的机器学习识别以及回拉注册。软件中包含分段的交互式可视化和手动编辑。量化包括支架展开特性（例如支架支柱贴壁不良）、支柱水平分析、钙角度和钙厚度测量。交互式可视化包括 (x,y) 解剖视图、正面视图和纵向视图以及可选的叠加。底层斑块分割算法产生了出色的像素级结果（86.2% 的灵敏度和 0.781 F1 分数）。在 34 个新的回调上使用 OCTOPUS，我们确定在自动分割后，只有 13% 和 23% 的帧分别需要手动修饰以进行详细的管腔和钙化标记。仅修改了高达 3.8% 的斑块像素，平均编辑时间仅为 7.5 秒/帧，与手动分析相比减少了约 80%。关于支架分析，灵敏度和精确度均大于 90%，并且每个支架都成功分类为覆盖或未覆盖，具有高灵敏度 (94%) 和特异性 (90%)。我们介绍并评估了高度自动化的软件包 OCTOPUS 的临床应用，用于 IVOCT 图像中的定量斑块和支架分析。该软件目前用作研究目的的离线工具；然而，该软件的嵌入式算法也可能对实时治疗计划有用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为OCTOPUS的光学相干断层扫描（IVOCT）图像分析软件，用于自动化分析血管内斑块和支架。
AI.motivation: IVOCT在冠状动脉介入治疗中具有显著优势，但传统手动分析效率低且耗时，需开发自动化工具提升研究和临床效率。
AI.method: 软件包含预处理、深度学习斑块分割、机器学习支架识别及回撤注册算法，并提供交互式可视化与手动编辑功能。
AI.result: 斑块分割算法像素级敏感度达86.2%，F1得分为0.781；仅13%和23%的帧需手动修正，编辑时间减少80%；支架分析灵敏度和精确度均超90%。
AI.conclusion: OCTOPUS显著提升了IVOCT图像分析的自动化水平，可作为研究工具并有望应用于实时治疗规划。

authors_text: Anastasiia Kornilova,Marsel Faizullin,Konstantin Pakulev,Andrey Sadkov,Denis Kukushkin,Azat Akhmetyanov,Timur Akhtyamov,Hekmat Taherinejad,Gonzalo Ferrer
title: SmartPortraits: Depth Powered Handheld Smartphone Dataset of Human Portraits for State Estimation, Reconstruction and Synthesis
title_zh: SmartPortraits：深度驱动的手持智能手机人体肖像数据集，用于状态估计、重建和合成
abstract: We present a dataset of 1000 video sequences of human portraits recorded in real and uncontrolled conditions by using a handheld smartphone accompanied by an external high-quality depth camera. The collected dataset contains 200 people captured in different poses and locations and its main purpose is to bridge the gap between raw measurements obtained from a smartphone and downstream applications, such as state estimation, 3D reconstruction, view synthesis, etc. The sensors employed in data collection are the smartphone's camera and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and an external Azure Kinect DK depth camera software synchronized with sub-millisecond precision to the smartphone system. During the recording, the smartphone flash is used to provide a periodic secondary source of lightning. Accurate mask of the foremost person is provided as well as its impact on the camera alignment accuracy. For evaluation purposes, we compare multiple state-of-the-art camera alignment methods by using a Motion Capture system. We provide a smartphone visual-inertial benchmark for portrait capturing, where we report results for multiple methods and motivate further use of the provided trajectories, available in the dataset, in view synthesis and 3D reconstruction tasks.
summary: We present a dataset of 1000 video sequences of human portraits recorded in real and uncontrolled conditions by using a handheld smartphone accompanied by an external high-quality depth camera. The collected dataset contains 200 people captured in different poses and locations and its main purpose is to bridge the gap between raw measurements obtained from a smartphone and downstream applications, such as state estimation, 3D reconstruction, view synthesis, etc. The sensors employed in data collection are the smartphone's camera and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and an external Azure Kinect DK depth camera software synchronized with sub-millisecond precision to the smartphone system. During the recording, the smartphone flash is used to provide a periodic secondary source of lightning. Accurate mask of the foremost person is provided as well as its impact on the camera alignment accuracy. For evaluation purposes, we compare multiple state-of-the-art camera alignment methods by using a Motion Capture system. We provide a smartphone visual-inertial benchmark for portrait capturing, where we report results for multiple methods and motivate further use of the provided trajectories, available in the dataset, in view synthesis and 3D reconstruction tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一个包含 1000 个人类肖像视频序列的数据集，这些视频序列是使用手持智能手机和外部高质量深度相机在真实且不受控制的条件下录制的。收集的数据集包含以不同姿势和位置捕获的 200 个人，其主要目的是弥合从智能手机获得的原始测量值与下游应用程序（例如状态估计、3D 重建、视图合成等）之间的差距。数据收集中使用的传感器是智能手机的摄像头和惯性测量单元 (IMU)，以及与智能手机系统以亚毫秒精度同步的外部 Azure Kinect DK 深度摄像头软件。在录制过程中，智能手机闪光灯用于提供周期性的二次闪电源。提供了最前面的人的准确掩模及其对相机对准精度的影响。出于评估目的，我们使用运动捕捉系统比较了多种最先进的相机对齐方法。我们提供了用于肖像捕捉的智能手机视觉惯性基准，其中报告了多种方法的结果，并激励在数据集中、视图合成和 3D 重建任务中进一步使用所提供的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为SmartPortraits的数据集，包含1000个在真实和非控制条件下使用手持智能手机和外部高质量深度相机记录的人像视频序列，用于状态估计、重建和合成等任务。
AI.motivation: 为了弥补智能手机原始测量数据与下游应用（如状态估计、3D重建、视图合成等）之间的差距，需要一个高质量的人像数据集。
AI.method: 使用智能手机的摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）以及外部Azure Kinect DK深度相机进行数据采集，同时使用智能手机闪光灯作为辅助光源，并提供前景人物的精确掩码。
AI.result: 提供了用于人像捕捉的智能手机视觉惯性基准，并比较了多种最先进的相机对齐方法，结果可用于视图合成和3D重建任务。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为状态估计、3D重建和视图合成等任务提供了重要的资源，并推动了相关研究的进一步发展。
