authors_text: Georg Bökman,Fredrik Kahl
title: A case for using rotation invariant features in state of the art feature matchers
title_zh: 在最先进的特征匹配器中使用旋转不变特征的案例
abstract: The aim of this paper is to demonstrate that a state of the art feature matcher (LoFTR) can be made more robust to rotations by simply replacing the backbone CNN with a steerable CNN which is equivariant to translations and image rotations. It is experimentally shown that this boost is obtained without reducing performance on ordinary illumination and viewpoint matching sequences.
summary: The aim of this paper is to demonstrate that a state of the art feature matcher (LoFTR) can be made more robust to rotations by simply replacing the backbone CNN with a steerable CNN which is equivariant to translations and image rotations. It is experimentally shown that this boost is obtained without reducing performance on ordinary illumination and viewpoint matching sequences.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是证明通过简单地用与平移和图像旋转等价的可操纵 CNN 替换主干 CNN，可以使最先进的特征匹配器 (LoFTR) 对旋转更加鲁棒。实验表明，这种提升是在不降低普通照明和视点匹配序列性能的情况下获得的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过替换骨干CNN为可旋转CNN，提升先进特征匹配器LoFTR对旋转的鲁棒性，同时保持原有性能。
AI.motivation: 现有特征匹配器在旋转场景下表现不足，需提升其鲁棒性而不牺牲其他条件下的性能。
AI.method: 采用可旋转CNN替换LoFTR的骨干CNN，该网络对平移和图像旋转具有等变性。
AI.result: 实验显示，该方法在增强旋转鲁棒性的同时，未影响普通光照和视角匹配的性能。
AI.conclusion: 替换为可旋转CNN是提升特征匹配器旋转鲁棒性的有效方法，且保持原有性能。

authors_text: Jiaqi Xue,Chentian Ma,Li Li,Xuan Wen
title: Multiple EffNet/ResNet Architectures for Melanoma Classification
title_zh: 用于黑色素瘤分类的多个 EffNet/ResNet 架构
abstract: Melanoma is the most malignant skin tumor and usually cancerates from normal moles, which is difficult to distinguish benign from malignant in the early stage. Therefore, many machine learning methods are trying to make auxiliary prediction. However, these methods attach more attention to the image data of suspected tumor, and focus on improving the accuracy of image classification, but ignore the significance of patient-level contextual information for disease diagnosis in actual clinical diagnosis. To make more use of patient information and improve the accuracy of diagnosis, we propose a new melanoma classification model based on EffNet and Resnet. Our model not only uses images within the same patient but also consider patient-level contextual information for better cancer prediction. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed model achieved 0.981 ACC. Furthermore, we note that the overall ROC value of the model is 0.976 which is better than the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Melanoma is the most malignant skin tumor and usually cancerates from normal moles, which is difficult to distinguish benign from malignant in the early stage. Therefore, many machine learning methods are trying to make auxiliary prediction. However, these methods attach more attention to the image data of suspected tumor, and focus on improving the accuracy of image classification, but ignore the significance of patient-level contextual information for disease diagnosis in actual clinical diagnosis. To make more use of patient information and improve the accuracy of diagnosis, we propose a new melanoma classification model based on EffNet and Resnet. Our model not only uses images within the same patient but also consider patient-level contextual information for better cancer prediction. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed model achieved 0.981 ACC. Furthermore, we note that the overall ROC value of the model is 0.976 which is better than the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤是恶性程度最高的皮肤肿瘤，通常由正常痣癌变而来，早期很难区分良恶性。因此，很多机器学习方法都在尝试进行辅助预测。然而，这些方法更多地关注疑似肿瘤的图像数据，并专注于提高图像分类的准确性，而忽视了患者层面的背景信息在实际临床诊断中对于疾病诊断的意义。为了更多地利用患者信息并提高诊断的准确性，我们提出了一种基于 EffNet 和 Resnet 的新黑色素瘤分类模型。我们的模型不仅使用同一患者的图像，还考虑患者级别的上下文信息，以更好地预测癌症。实验结果表明，所提出的模型达到了 0.981 ACC。此外，我们注意到该模型的总体 ROC 值为 0.976，这优于之前的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于EffNet和ResNet的多架构模型，结合患者层面的上下文信息进行黑色素瘤分类，以提高诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注图像数据分类，忽视患者临床信息对疾病诊断的重要性，导致早期良恶性区分困难。
AI.method: 融合EffNet与ResNet架构，整合同一患者的多图像数据及患者级临床背景信息进行联合建模。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到0.981的准确率和0.976的ROC值，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入患者级上下文信息可有效提升黑色素瘤分类性能，为临床辅助诊断提供新思路。

search_text: Multiple EffNet/ResNet Architectures for Melanoma Classification 用于黑色素瘤分类的多个 EffNet/ResNet 架构 Melanoma is the most malignant skin tumor and usually cancerates from normal moles, which is difficult to distinguish benign from malignant in the early stage. Therefore, many machine learning methods are trying to make auxiliary prediction. However, these methods attach more attention to the image data of suspected tumor, and focus on improving the accuracy of image classification, but ignore the significance of patient-level contextual information for disease diagnosis in actual clinical diagnosis. To make more use of patient information and improve the accuracy of diagnosis, we propose a new melanoma classification model based on EffNet and Resnet. Our model not only uses images within the same patient but also consider patient-level contextual information for better cancer prediction. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed model achieved 0.981 ACC. Furthermore, we note that the overall ROC value of the model is 0.976 which is better than the previous state-of-the-art approaches. 黑色素瘤是恶性程度最高的皮肤肿瘤，通常由正常痣癌变而来，早期很难区分良恶性。因此，很多机器学习方法都在尝试进行辅助预测。然而，这些方法更多地关注疑似肿瘤的图像数据，并专注于提高图像分类的准确性，而忽视了患者层面的背景信息在实际临床诊断中对于疾病诊断的意义。为了更多地利用患者信息并提高诊断的准确性，我们提出了一种基于 EffNet 和 Resnet 的新黑色素瘤分类模型。我们的模型不仅使用同一患者的图像，还考虑患者级别的上下文信息，以更好地预测癌症。实验结果表明，所提出的模型达到了 0.981 ACC。此外，我们注意到该模型的总体 ROC 值为 0.976，这优于之前的最先进方法。 本文提出基于EffNet和ResNet的多架构模型，结合患者层面的上下文信息进行黑色素瘤分类，以提高诊断准确性。 Jiaqi Xue,Chentian Ma,Li Li,Xuan Wen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Long Ma,Tengyu Ma,Risheng Liu,Xin Fan,Zhongxuan Luo
title: Toward Fast, Flexible, and Robust Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 迈向快速、灵活、鲁棒的低光图像增强
abstract: Existing low-light image enhancement techniques are mostly not only difficult to deal with both visual quality and computational efficiency but also commonly invalid in unknown complex scenarios. In this paper, we develop a new Self-Calibrated Illumination (SCI) learning framework for fast, flexible, and robust brightening images in real-world low-light scenarios. To be specific, we establish a cascaded illumination learning process with weight sharing to handle this task. Considering the computational burden of the cascaded pattern, we construct the self-calibrated module which realizes the convergence between results of each stage, producing the gains that only use the single basic block for inference (yet has not been exploited in previous works), which drastically diminishes computation cost. We then define the unsupervised training loss to elevate the model capability that can adapt to general scenes. Further, we make comprehensive explorations to excavate SCI's inherent properties (lacking in existing works) including operation-insensitive adaptability (acquiring stable performance under the settings of different simple operations) and model-irrelevant generality (can be applied to illumination-based existing works to improve performance). Finally, plenty of experiments and ablation studies fully indicate our superiority in both quality and efficiency. Applications on low-light face detection and nighttime semantic segmentation fully reveal the latent practical values for SCI. The source code is available at https://github.com/vis-opt-group/SCI.
summary: Existing low-light image enhancement techniques are mostly not only difficult to deal with both visual quality and computational efficiency but also commonly invalid in unknown complex scenarios. In this paper, we develop a new Self-Calibrated Illumination (SCI) learning framework for fast, flexible, and robust brightening images in real-world low-light scenarios. To be specific, we establish a cascaded illumination learning process with weight sharing to handle this task. Considering the computational burden of the cascaded pattern, we construct the self-calibrated module which realizes the convergence between results of each stage, producing the gains that only use the single basic block for inference (yet has not been exploited in previous works), which drastically diminishes computation cost. We then define the unsupervised training loss to elevate the model capability that can adapt to general scenes. Further, we make comprehensive explorations to excavate SCI's inherent properties (lacking in existing works) including operation-insensitive adaptability (acquiring stable performance under the settings of different simple operations) and model-irrelevant generality (can be applied to illumination-based existing works to improve performance). Finally, plenty of experiments and ablation studies fully indicate our superiority in both quality and efficiency. Applications on low-light face detection and nighttime semantic segmentation fully reveal the latent practical values for SCI. The source code is available at https://github.com/vis-opt-group/SCI.
abstract_zh: 现有的微光图像增强技术大多不仅难以兼顾视觉质量和计算效率，而且在未知的复杂场景下通常无效。在本文中，我们开发了一种新的自校准照明（SCI）学习框架，可在现实世界的低光场景中快速、灵活且强大的增亮图像。具体来说，我们建立了一个具有权重共享的级联照明学习过程来处理此任务。考虑到级联模式的计算负担，我们构建了自校准模块，该模块实现了每个阶段结果之间的收敛，产生仅使用单个基本块进行推理的增益（在以前的工作中尚未利用），这大大降低了计算成本。然后，我们定义无监督训练损失，以提升模型适应一般场景的能力。进一步，我们进行了全面的探索，挖掘SCI的固有属性（现有作品中所缺乏的），包括操作不敏感的适应性（在不同简单操作的设置下获得稳定的性能）和与模型无关的通用性（可以应用于基于光照的现有作品以提高性能）。最后，大量的实验和消融研究充分表明了我们在质量和效率上的优势。低光人脸检测和夜间语义分割的应用充分揭示了 SCI 的潜在实用价值。源代码可在 https://github.com/vis-opt-group/SCI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCI的自校准照明学习框架，用于在真实世界低光场景中实现快速、灵活且鲁棒的图像增强。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强技术难以同时兼顾视觉质量与计算效率，且在复杂未知场景中效果不佳，亟需更高效且通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建级联照明学习过程与自校准模块，通过权重共享和阶段结果收敛降低计算成本，并定义无监督训练损失以提升模型泛化能力，同时挖掘SCI的运算无关适应性与模型无关通用性。
AI.result: 实验和消融研究证明SCI在质量与效率上优于现有方法，应用于低光人脸检测和夜间语义分割验证了其实际价值。
AI.conclusion: SCI框架通过创新结构设计和理论探索，为低光图像增强提供了高效且通用的解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Marilyn Keller,Silvia Zuffi,Michael J. Black,Sergi Pujades
title: OSSO: Obtaining Skeletal Shape from Outside
title_zh: OSSO：从外部获取骨骼形状
comment: Project page: https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/. Accepted in CVPR 2022
comments: Project page: https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/. Accepted in CVPR 2022
abstract: We address the problem of inferring the anatomic skeleton of a person, in an arbitrary pose, from the 3D surface of the body; i.e. we predict the inside (bones) from the outside (skin). This has many applications in medicine and biomechanics. Existing state-of-the-art biomechanical skeletons are detailed but do not easily generalize to new subjects. Additionally, computer vision and graphics methods that predict skeletons are typically heuristic, not learned from data, do not leverage the full 3D body surface, and are not validated against ground truth. To our knowledge, our system, called OSSO (Obtaining Skeletal Shape from Outside), is the first to learn the mapping from the 3D body surface to the internal skeleton from real data. We do so using 1000 male and 1000 female dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) scans. To these, we fit a parametric 3D body shape model (STAR) to capture the body surface and a novel part-based 3D skeleton model to capture the bones. This provides inside/outside training pairs. We model the statistical variation of full skeletons using PCA in a pose-normalized space. We then train a regressor from body shape parameters to skeleton shape parameters and refine the skeleton to satisfy constraints on physical plausibility. Given an arbitrary 3D body shape and pose, OSSO predicts a realistic skeleton inside. In contrast to previous work, we evaluate the accuracy of the skeleton shape quantitatively on held-out DXA scans, outperforming the state-of-the-art. We also show 3D skeleton prediction from varied and challenging 3D bodies. The code to infer a skeleton from a body shape is available for research at https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/, and the dataset of paired outer surface (skin) and skeleton (bone) meshes is available as a Biobank Returned Dataset. This research has been conducted using the UK Biobank Resource.

abstract_zh: 我们解决了从身体的 3D 表面推断任意姿势的人的解剖骨骼的问题；即我们从外部（皮肤）预测内部（骨骼）。这在医学和生物力学中有许多应用。现有最先进的生物力学骨架很详细，但不容易推广到新学科。此外，预测骨骼的计算机视觉和图形方法通常是启发式的，不是从数据中学习的，没有利用完整的 3D 身体表面，也没有根据地面事实进行验证。据我们所知，我们的系统称为 OSSO（从外部获取骨骼形状），是第一个从真实数据中学习从 3D 身体表面到内部骨骼的映射的系统。我们使用 1000 名男性和 1000 名女性双能 X 射线吸收测定法 (DXA) 扫描来进行此研究。为此，我们采用参数化 3D 体型模型 (STAR) 来捕获身体表面，并采用新颖的基于部件的 3D 骨架模型来捕获骨骼。这提供了内部/外部训练对。我们在姿势归一化空间中使用 PCA 对完整骨骼的统计变化进行建模。然后，我们训练从身体形状参数到骨骼形状参数的回归器，并细化骨骼以满足物理合理性的约束。给定任意 3D 身体形状和姿势，OSSO 可以预测内部的真实骨骼。与之前的工作相比，我们在 DXA 扫描上定量评估了骨架形状的准确性，优于最先进的技术。我们还展示了来自不同且具有挑战性的 3D 身体的 3D 骨骼预测。从身体形状推断骨骼的代码可在 https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/ 上进行研究，并且成对的外表面（皮肤）和骨骼（骨骼）网格的数据集可作为生物银行返回数据集提供。这项研究是利用英国生物银行资源进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSSO方法，通过3D体表数据预测人体内部骨骼结构。
AI.motivation: 现有骨骼预测方法存在泛化性差、依赖启发式规则且未充分利用3D数据等问题，需建立基于真实数据的学习模型。
AI.method: 使用1000名男女的DXA扫描数据，结合STAR体表模型与新型部件骨骼模型生成内外配对数据，通过PCA建模骨骼统计变化并训练形状参数回归器。
AI.result: 在独立DXA数据集上量化验证优于现有方法，实现复杂姿态下3D骨骼预测，公开代码与骨骼-体表配对数据集。
AI.conclusion: OSSO是首个从真实数据学习体表到骨骼映射的系统，为医学与生物力学提供新工具。

search_text: OSSO: Obtaining Skeletal Shape from Outside OSSO：从外部获取骨骼形状 We address the problem of inferring the anatomic skeleton of a person, in an arbitrary pose, from the 3D surface of the body; i.e. we predict the inside (bones) from the outside (skin). This has many applications in medicine and biomechanics. Existing state-of-the-art biomechanical skeletons are detailed but do not easily generalize to new subjects. Additionally, computer vision and graphics methods that predict skeletons are typically heuristic, not learned from data, do not leverage the full 3D body surface, and are not validated against ground truth. To our knowledge, our system, called OSSO (Obtaining Skeletal Shape from Outside), is the first to learn the mapping from the 3D body surface to the internal skeleton from real data. We do so using 1000 male and 1000 female dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) scans. To these, we fit a parametric 3D body shape model (STAR) to capture the body surface and a novel part-based 3D skeleton model to capture the bones. This provides inside/outside training pairs. We model the statistical variation of full skeletons using PCA in a pose-normalized space. We then train a regressor from body shape parameters to skeleton shape parameters and refine the skeleton to satisfy constraints on physical plausibility. Given an arbitrary 3D body shape and pose, OSSO predicts a realistic skeleton inside. In contrast to previous work, we evaluate the accuracy of the skeleton shape quantitatively on held-out DXA scans, outperforming the state-of-the-art. We also show 3D skeleton prediction from varied and challenging 3D bodies. The code to infer a skeleton from a body shape is available for research at https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/, and the dataset of paired outer surface (skin) and skeleton (bone) meshes is available as a Biobank Returned Dataset. This research has been conducted using the UK Biobank Resource. 我们解决了从身体的 3D 表面推断任意姿势的人的解剖骨骼的问题；即我们从外部（皮肤）预测内部（骨骼）。这在医学和生物力学中有许多应用。现有最先进的生物力学骨架很详细，但不容易推广到新学科。此外，预测骨骼的计算机视觉和图形方法通常是启发式的，不是从数据中学习的，没有利用完整的 3D 身体表面，也没有根据地面事实进行验证。据我们所知，我们的系统称为 OSSO（从外部获取骨骼形状），是第一个从真实数据中学习从 3D 身体表面到内部骨骼的映射的系统。我们使用 1000 名男性和 1000 名女性双能 X 射线吸收测定法 (DXA) 扫描来进行此研究。为此，我们采用参数化 3D 体型模型 (STAR) 来捕获身体表面，并采用新颖的基于部件的 3D 骨架模型来捕获骨骼。这提供了内部/外部训练对。我们在姿势归一化空间中使用 PCA 对完整骨骼的统计变化进行建模。然后，我们训练从身体形状参数到骨骼形状参数的回归器，并细化骨骼以满足物理合理性的约束。给定任意 3D 身体形状和姿势，OSSO 可以预测内部的真实骨骼。与之前的工作相比，我们在 DXA 扫描上定量评估了骨架形状的准确性，优于最先进的技术。我们还展示了来自不同且具有挑战性的 3D 身体的 3D 骨骼预测。从身体形状推断骨骼的代码可在 https://osso.is.tue.mpg.de/ 上进行研究，并且成对的外表面（皮肤）和骨骼（骨骼）网格的数据集可作为生物银行返回数据集提供。这项研究是利用英国生物银行资源进行的。 本文提出OSSO方法，通过3D体表数据预测人体内部骨骼结构。 Marilyn Keller,Silvia Zuffi,Michael J. authors_text: Julian D. Parker,Sebastian J. Schlecht,Rudolf Rabenstein,Maximilian Schäfer
title: Physical Modeling using Recurrent Neural Networks with Fast Convolutional Layers
title_zh: 使用具有快速卷积层的循环神经网络进行物理建模
abstract: Discrete-time modeling of acoustic, mechanical and electrical systems is a prominent topic in the musical signal processing literature. Such models are mostly derived by discretizing a mathematical model, given in terms of ordinary or partial differential equations, using established techniques. Recent work has applied the techniques of machine-learning to construct such models automatically from data for the case of systems which have lumped states described by scalar values, such as electrical circuits. In this work, we examine how similar techniques are able to construct models of systems which have spatially distributed rather than lumped states. We describe several novel recurrent neural network structures, and show how they can be thought of as an extension of modal techniques. As a proof of concept, we generate synthetic data for three physical systems and show that the proposed network structures can be trained with this data to reproduce the behavior of these systems.
summary: Discrete-time modeling of acoustic, mechanical and electrical systems is a prominent topic in the musical signal processing literature. Such models are mostly derived by discretizing a mathematical model, given in terms of ordinary or partial differential equations, using established techniques. Recent work has applied the techniques of machine-learning to construct such models automatically from data for the case of systems which have lumped states described by scalar values, such as electrical circuits. In this work, we examine how similar techniques are able to construct models of systems which have spatially distributed rather than lumped states. We describe several novel recurrent neural network structures, and show how they can be thought of as an extension of modal techniques. As a proof of concept, we generate synthetic data for three physical systems and show that the proposed network structures can be trained with this data to reproduce the behavior of these systems.
abstract_zh: 声学、机械和电气系统的离散时间建模是音乐信号处理文献中的一个突出主题。此类模型大多是通过使用现有技术对以常微分方程或偏微分方程给出的数学模型进行离散化而得出的。最近的工作已经应用机器学习技术，针对具有由标量值描述的集总状态的系统（例如电路）的情况，根据数据自动构建此类模型。在这项工作中，我们研究了类似的技术如何能够构建具有空间分布而不是集总状态的系统模型。我们描述了几种新颖的循环神经网络结构，并展示了如何将它们视为模态技术的扩展。作为概念证明，我们为三个物理系统生成合成数据，并表明可以使用这些数据来训练所提出的网络结构以重现这些系统的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用带有快速卷积层的循环神经网络（RNN）对具有空间分布状态的物理系统进行建模。
AI.motivation: 传统物理系统建模依赖于微分方程离散化，难以处理空间分布状态；现有机器学习方法多针对集中参数系统，缺乏对分布参数系统的有效建模方案。
AI.method: 设计新型RNN结构，结合快速卷积层模拟空间分布特性，并将其视为模态分析技术的扩展，通过合成数据训练验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 在三个物理系统的合成数据集上验证了所提网络结构能够准确复现系统行为，证明方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RNN框架为分布参数物理系统的数据驱动建模提供了新思路，具有潜在的跨领域应用价值。

authors_text: Charles Laroche,Andrés Almansa,Matias Tassano
title: Deep Model-Based Super-Resolution with Non-uniform Blur
title_zh: 基于深度模型的非均匀模糊超分辨率
comment: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), Waikoloa, HI, USA, 2023, pp. 1797-1808
comments: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), Waikoloa, HI, USA, 2023, pp. 1797-1808
abstract: We propose a state-of-the-art method for super-resolution with non-uniform blur. Single-image super-resolution methods seek to restore a high-resolution image from blurred, subsampled, and noisy measurements. Despite their impressive performance, existing techniques usually assume a uniform blur kernel. Hence, these techniques do not generalize well to the more general case of non-uniform blur. Instead, in this paper, we address the more realistic and computationally challenging case of spatially-varying blur. To this end, we first propose a fast deep plug-and-play algorithm, based on linearized ADMM splitting techniques, which can solve the super-resolution problem with spatially-varying blur. Second, we unfold our iterative algorithm into a single network and train it end-to-end. In this way, we overcome the intricacy of manually tuning the parameters involved in the optimization scheme. Our algorithm presents remarkable performance and generalizes well after a single training to a large family of spatially-varying blur kernels, noise levels and scale factors.
summary: We propose a state-of-the-art method for super-resolution with non-uniform blur. Single-image super-resolution methods seek to restore a high-resolution image from blurred, subsampled, and noisy measurements. Despite their impressive performance, existing techniques usually assume a uniform blur kernel. Hence, these techniques do not generalize well to the more general case of non-uniform blur. Instead, in this paper, we address the more realistic and computationally challenging case of spatially-varying blur. To this end, we first propose a fast deep plug-and-play algorithm, based on linearized ADMM splitting techniques, which can solve the super-resolution problem with spatially-varying blur. Second, we unfold our iterative algorithm into a single network and train it end-to-end. In this way, we overcome the intricacy of manually tuning the parameters involved in the optimization scheme. Our algorithm presents remarkable performance and generalizes well after a single training to a large family of spatially-varying blur kernels, noise levels and scale factors.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种最先进的非均匀模糊超分辨率方法。单图像超分辨率方法寻求从模糊、二次采样和噪声测量中恢复高分辨率图像。尽管性能令人印象深刻，但现有技术通常采用统一的模糊内核。因此，这些技术不能很好地推广到更一般的非均匀模糊情况。相反，在本文中，我们解决了更现实且计算上更具挑战性的空间变化模糊的情况。为此，我们首先提出了一种基于线性化 ADMM 分割技术的快速深度即插即用算法，可以解决空间变化模糊的超分辨率问题。其次，我们将迭代算法展开到单个网络中并进行端到端训练。通过这种方式，我们克服了手动调整优化方案中涉及的参数的复杂性。我们的算法表现出卓越的性能，并且在一次训练后可以很好地推广到一系列空间变化的模糊内核、噪声水平和比例因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种处理非均匀模糊的超分辨率方法，解决现有技术无法推广到空间变化模糊的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法假设均匀模糊核，难以处理更普遍的非均匀模糊情况，需开发更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于线性化ADMM分裂技术设计快速深度插件算法，并将迭代过程展开为单网络进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 算法在多种空间变化模糊核、噪声水平和缩放因子下表现优异，泛化能力突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习克服了传统优化参数调优的复杂性，在非均匀模糊超分辨率任务中具有显著优势。

search_text: Deep Model-Based Super-Resolution with Non-uniform Blur 基于深度模型的非均匀模糊超分辨率 We propose a state-of-the-art method for super-resolution with non-uniform blur. Single-image super-resolution methods seek to restore a high-resolution image from blurred, subsampled, and noisy measurements. Despite their impressive performance, existing techniques usually assume a uniform blur kernel. Hence, these techniques do not generalize well to the more general case of non-uniform blur. Instead, in this paper, we address the more realistic and computationally challenging case of spatially-varying blur. To this end, we first propose a fast deep plug-and-play algorithm, based on linearized ADMM splitting techniques, which can solve the super-resolution problem with spatially-varying blur. Second, we unfold our iterative algorithm into a single network and train it end-to-end. In this way, we overcome the intricacy of manually tuning the parameters involved in the optimization scheme. Our algorithm presents remarkable performance and generalizes well after a single training to a large family of spatially-varying blur kernels, noise levels and scale factors. 我们提出了一种最先进的非均匀模糊超分辨率方法。单图像超分辨率方法寻求从模糊、二次采样和噪声测量中恢复高分辨率图像。尽管性能令人印象深刻，但现有技术通常采用统一的模糊内核。因此，这些技术不能很好地推广到更一般的非均匀模糊情况。相反，在本文中，我们解决了更现实且计算上更具挑战性的空间变化模糊的情况。为此，我们首先提出了一种基于线性化 ADMM 分割技术的快速深度即插即用算法，可以解决空间变化模糊的超分辨率问题。其次，我们将迭代算法展开到单个网络中并进行端到端训练。通过这种方式，我们克服了手动调整优化方案中涉及的参数的复杂性。我们的算法表现出卓越的性能，并且在一次训练后可以很好地推广到一系列空间变化的模糊内核、噪声水平和比例因子。 本文提出一种处理非均匀模糊的超分辨率方法，解决现有技术无法推广到空间变化模糊的问题。 Charles Laroche,Andrés Almansa,Matias Tassano cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Binjie Qin,Haohao Mao,Ruipeng Zhang,Yueqi Zhu,Song Ding,Xu Chen
title: Working memory inspired hierarchical video decomposition with transformative representations
title_zh: 工作记忆启发了具有变革性表示的分层视频分解
abstract: Video decomposition is very important to extract moving foreground objects from complex backgrounds in computer vision, machine learning, and medical imaging, e.g., extracting moving contrast-filled vessels from the complex and noisy backgrounds of X-ray coronary angiography (XCA). However, the challenges caused by dynamic backgrounds, overlapping heterogeneous environments and complex noises still exist in video decomposition. To solve these problems, this study is the first to introduce a flexible visual working memory model in video decomposition tasks to provide interpretable and high-performance hierarchical deep architecture, integrating the transformative representations between sensory and control layers from the perspective of visual and cognitive neuroscience. Specifically, robust PCA unrolling networks acting as a structure-regularized sensor layer decompose XCA into sparse/low-rank structured representations to separate moving contrast-filled vessels from noisy and complex backgrounds. Then, patch recurrent convolutional LSTM networks with a backprojection module embody unstructured random representations of the control layer in working memory, recurrently projecting spatiotemporally decomposed nonlocal patches into orthogonal subspaces for heterogeneous vessel retrieval and interference suppression. This video decomposition deep architecture effectively restores the heterogeneous profiles of intensity and the geometries of moving objects against the complex background interferences. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accurate moving contrast-filled vessel extraction with excellent flexibility and computational efficiency.
summary: Video decomposition is very important to extract moving foreground objects from complex backgrounds in computer vision, machine learning, and medical imaging, e.g., extracting moving contrast-filled vessels from the complex and noisy backgrounds of X-ray coronary angiography (XCA). However, the challenges caused by dynamic backgrounds, overlapping heterogeneous environments and complex noises still exist in video decomposition. To solve these problems, this study is the first to introduce a flexible visual working memory model in video decomposition tasks to provide interpretable and high-performance hierarchical deep architecture, integrating the transformative representations between sensory and control layers from the perspective of visual and cognitive neuroscience. Specifically, robust PCA unrolling networks acting as a structure-regularized sensor layer decompose XCA into sparse/low-rank structured representations to separate moving contrast-filled vessels from noisy and complex backgrounds. Then, patch recurrent convolutional LSTM networks with a backprojection module embody unstructured random representations of the control layer in working memory, recurrently projecting spatiotemporally decomposed nonlocal patches into orthogonal subspaces for heterogeneous vessel retrieval and interference suppression. This video decomposition deep architecture effectively restores the heterogeneous profiles of intensity and the geometries of moving objects against the complex background interferences. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accurate moving contrast-filled vessel extraction with excellent flexibility and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 视频分解对于从计算机视觉、机器学习和医学成像的复杂背景中提取移动前景对象非常重要，例如，从 X 射线冠状动脉造影 (XCA) 的复杂且嘈杂的背景中提取移动的充满造影剂的血管。然而，动态背景、重叠异构环境和复杂噪声带来的挑战在视频分解中仍然存在。为了解决这些问题，本研究首次在视频分解任务中引入灵活的视觉工作记忆模型，以提供可解释的高性能分层深层架构，从视觉和认知神经科学的角度整合感觉层和控制层之间的转换表示。具体来说，强大的 PCA 展开网络充当结构正则化传感器层，将 XCA 分解为稀疏/低秩结构化表示，以将移动的充满对比度的血管与嘈杂和复杂的背景分开。然后，带有反投影模块的补丁循环卷积 LSTM 网络体现了工作记忆中控制层的非结构化随机表示，将时空分解的非局部补丁循环投影到正交子空间中，以实现异构血管检索和干扰抑制。这种视频分解深层架构有效地恢复了复杂背景干扰下运动物体的强度异质分布和几何形状。实验表明，所提出的方法在精确移动对比填充血管提取方面显着优于最先进的方法，具有出色的灵活性和计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受视觉工作记忆启发的分层视频分解方法，用于从复杂背景中提取动态前景对象，如X射线冠状动脉造影中的运动造影血管。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分解方法在处理动态背景、异质环境重叠及复杂噪声时存在挑战，需开发更高效且可解释的深度架构以提升分解性能。
AI.method: 结合神经科学视角，设计包含结构化感知层（鲁棒PCA展开网络）与非结构化控制层（带反投影模块的补丁递归LSTM）的分层架构，实现异质血管的鲁棒提取与干扰抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在运动造影血管提取任务中显著优于现有技术，兼具灵活性与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合感知与控制层的转化表征，所提方法有效恢复了复杂背景下动态对象的强度分布与几何特征。

authors_text: Sidike Paheding,Abel A. Reyes,Anush Kasaragod,Thomas Oommen
title: GAF-NAU: Gramian Angular Field encoded Neighborhood Attention U-Net for Pixel-Wise Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: GAF-NAU：用于像素级高光谱图像分类的格拉米安角场编码邻域注意 U-Net
abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is the most vibrant area of research in the hyperspectral community due to the rich spectral information contained in HSI can greatly aid in identifying objects of interest. However, inherent non-linearity between materials and the corresponding spectral profiles brings two major challenges in HSI classification: interclass similarity and intraclass variability. Many advanced deep learning methods have attempted to address these issues from the perspective of a region/patch-based approach, instead of a pixel-based alternate. However, the patch-based approaches hypothesize that neighborhood pixels of a target pixel in a fixed spatial window belong to the same class. And this assumption is not always true. To address this problem, we herein propose a new deep learning architecture, namely Gramian Angular Field encoded Neighborhood Attention U-Net (GAF-NAU), for pixel-based HSI classification. The proposed method does not require regions or patches centered around a raw target pixel to perform 2D-CNN based classification, instead, our approach transforms 1D pixel vector in HSI into 2D angular feature space using Gramian Angular Field (GAF) and then embed it to a new neighborhood attention network to suppress irrelevant angular feature while emphasizing on pertinent features useful for HSI classification task. Evaluation results on three publicly available HSI datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed model.
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is the most vibrant area of research in the hyperspectral community due to the rich spectral information contained in HSI can greatly aid in identifying objects of interest. However, inherent non-linearity between materials and the corresponding spectral profiles brings two major challenges in HSI classification: interclass similarity and intraclass variability. Many advanced deep learning methods have attempted to address these issues from the perspective of a region/patch-based approach, instead of a pixel-based alternate. However, the patch-based approaches hypothesize that neighborhood pixels of a target pixel in a fixed spatial window belong to the same class. And this assumption is not always true. To address this problem, we herein propose a new deep learning architecture, namely Gramian Angular Field encoded Neighborhood Attention U-Net (GAF-NAU), for pixel-based HSI classification. The proposed method does not require regions or patches centered around a raw target pixel to perform 2D-CNN based classification, instead, our approach transforms 1D pixel vector in HSI into 2D angular feature space using Gramian Angular Field (GAF) and then embed it to a new neighborhood attention network to suppress irrelevant angular feature while emphasizing on pertinent features useful for HSI classification task. Evaluation results on three publicly available HSI datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像 (HSI) 分类是高光谱界最活跃的研究领域，因为 HSI 中包含的丰富光谱信息可以极大地帮助识别感兴趣的物体。然而，材料和相应光谱曲线之间固有的非线性给 HSI 分类带来了两个主要挑战：类间相似性和类内变异性。许多先进的深度学习方法试图从基于区域/补丁的方法而不是基于像素的替代方法的角度来解决这些问题。然而，基于补丁的方法假设固定空间窗口中目标像素的邻域像素属于同一类。而且这个假设并不总是正确的。为了解决这个问题，我们在此提出了一种新的深度学习架构，即 Gramian Angular Field 编码的 Neighborhood Attention U-Net (GAF-NAU)，用于基于像素的 HSI 分类。所提出的方法不需要以原始目标像素为中心的区域或补丁来执行基于 2D-CNN 的分类，相反，我们的方法使用格拉米安角场（GAF）将 HSI 中的 1D 像素向量转换为 2D 角度特征空间，然后将其嵌入到新的邻域注意网络中以抑制不相关的角度特征，同时强调对 HSI 分类任务有用的相关特征。对三个公开可用的 HSI 数据集的评估结果证明了所提出模型的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Gramian Angular Field编码的邻域注意力U-Net（GAF-NAU）模型，用于像素级高光谱图像分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临类间相似性和类内变化性两大挑战，现有基于区域/块的方法假设目标像素的邻域像素属于同一类，但这一假设并不总是成立。
AI.method: 该方法将高光谱图像的1D像素向量转换为2D角度特征空间，利用Gramian Angular Field（GAF）进行编码，并嵌入到新的邻域注意力网络中，以抑制无关角度特征并强调对分类任务有用的特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开的高光谱数据集上评估结果表明，所提出模型在分类性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GAF-NAU模型通过引入GAF编码和邻域注意力机制，有效解决了高光谱图像分类中的类间相似性和类内变化性问题，取得了良好的分类效果。

result: 在三个公开的高光谱数据集上评估结果表明，所提出模型在分类性能上优于现有方法。
conclusion: GAF-NAU模型通过引入GAF编码和邻域注意力机制，有效解决了高光谱图像分类中的类间相似性和类内变化性问题，取得了良好的分类效果。
search_text: GAF-NAU: Gramian Angular Field encoded Neighborhood Attention U-Net for Pixel-Wise Hyperspectral Image Classification GAF-NAU：用于像素级高光谱图像分类的格拉米安角场编码邻域注意 U-Net Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is the most vibrant area of research in the hyperspectral community due to the rich spectral information contained in HSI can greatly aid in identifying objects of interest. However, inherent non-linearity between materials and the corresponding spectral profiles brings two major challenges in HSI classification: interclass similarity and intraclass variability. Many advanced deep learning methods have attempted to address these issues from the perspective of a region/patch-based approach, instead of a pixel-based alternate. However, the patch-based approaches hypothesize that neighborhood pixels of a target pixel in a fixed spatial window belong to the same class. And this assumption is not always true. To address this problem, we herein propose a new deep learning architecture, namely Gramian Angular Field encoded Neighborhood Attention U-Net (GAF-NAU), for pixel-based HSI classification. The proposed method does not require regions or patches centered around a raw target pixel to perform 2D-CNN based classification, instead, our approach transforms 1D pixel vector in HSI into 2D angular feature space using Gramian Angular Field (GAF) and then embed it to a new neighborhood attention network to suppress irrelevant angular feature while emphasizing on pertinent features useful for HSI classification task. Evaluation results on three publicly available HSI datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed model. 高光谱图像 (HSI) 分类是高光谱界最活跃的研究领域，因为 HSI 中包含的丰富光谱信息可以极大地帮助识别感兴趣的物体。然而，材料和相应光谱曲线之间固有的非线性给 HSI 分类带来了两个主要挑战：类间相似性和类内变异性。许多先进的深度学习方法试图从基于区域/补丁的方法而不是基于像素的替代方法的角度来解决这些问题。然而，基于补丁的方法假设固定空间窗口中目标像素的邻域像素属于同一类。而且这个假设并不总是正确的。为了解决这个问题，我们在此提出了一种新的深度学习架构，即 Gramian Angular Field 编码的 Neighborhood Attention U-Net (GAF-NAU)，用于基于像素的 HSI 分类。所提出的方法不需要以原始目标像素为中心的区域或补丁来执行基于 2D-CNN 的分类，相反，我们的方法使用格拉米安角场（GAF）将 HSI 中的 1D 像素向量转换为 2D 角度特征空间，然后将其嵌入到新的邻域注意网络中以抑制不相关的角度特征，同时强调对 HSI 分类任务有用的相关特征。对三个公开可用的 HSI 数据集的评估结果证明了所提出模型的优越性能。 本文提出了一种基于Gramian Angular Field编码的邻域注意力U-Net（GAF-NAU）模型，用于像素级高光谱图像分类。 Sidike Paheding,Abel A. Reyes,Anush Kasaragod,Thomas Oommen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yu Wang,Shuo Ye,Shujian Yu,Xinge You
title: R2-Trans:Fine-Grained Visual Categorization with Redundancy Reduction
title_zh: R2-Trans：具有减少冗余的细粒度视觉分类
abstract: Fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) aims to discriminate similar subcategories, whose main challenge is the large intraclass diversities and subtle inter-class differences. Existing FGVC methods usually select discriminant regions found by a trained model, which is prone to neglect other potential discriminant information. On the other hand, the massive interactions between the sequence of image patches in ViT make the resulting class-token contain lots of redundant information, which may also impacts FGVC performance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for FGVC, which can simultaneously make use of partial yet sufficient discriminative information in environmental cues and also compress the redundant information in class-token with respect to the target. Specifically, our model calculates the ratio of high-weight regions in a batch, adaptively adjusts the masking threshold and achieves moderate extraction of background information in the input space. Moreover, we also use the Information Bottleneck~(IB) approach to guide our network to learn a minimum sufficient representations in the feature space. Experimental results on three widely-used benchmark datasets verify that our approach can achieve outperforming performance than other state-of-the-art approaches and baseline models.
summary: Fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) aims to discriminate similar subcategories, whose main challenge is the large intraclass diversities and subtle inter-class differences. Existing FGVC methods usually select discriminant regions found by a trained model, which is prone to neglect other potential discriminant information. On the other hand, the massive interactions between the sequence of image patches in ViT make the resulting class-token contain lots of redundant information, which may also impacts FGVC performance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for FGVC, which can simultaneously make use of partial yet sufficient discriminative information in environmental cues and also compress the redundant information in class-token with respect to the target. Specifically, our model calculates the ratio of high-weight regions in a batch, adaptively adjusts the masking threshold and achieves moderate extraction of background information in the input space. Moreover, we also use the Information Bottleneck~(IB) approach to guide our network to learn a minimum sufficient representations in the feature space. Experimental results on three widely-used benchmark datasets verify that our approach can achieve outperforming performance than other state-of-the-art approaches and baseline models.
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）旨在区分相似的子类别，其主要挑战是较大的类内多样性和微妙的类间差异。现有的FGVC方法通常选择训练模型找到的判别区域，这很容易忽略其他潜在的判别信息。另一方面，ViT 中图像块序列之间的大量交互使得生成的类标记包含大量冗余信息，这也可能影响 FGVC 性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 FGVC 方法，它可以同时利用环境线索中部分但足够的判别信息，并压缩类令牌中相对于目标的冗余信息。具体来说，我们的模型计算批次中高权重区域的比例，自适应调整掩蔽阈值并实现输入空间中背景信息的适度提取。此外，我们还使用信息瓶颈（IB）方法来指导我们的网络学习特征空间中的最小足够表示。三个广泛使用的基准数据集的实验结果证明，我们的方法可以实现比其他最先进的方法和基线模型更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出R2-Trans方法，通过减少冗余信息提升细粒度视觉分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有FGVC方法易忽略潜在判别信息，且ViT的class-token存在冗余信息，影响分类效果。
AI.method: 自适应调整掩码阈值提取背景信息，并结合信息瓶颈理论压缩特征空间冗余。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有先进方法和基线模型。
AI.conclusion: R2-Trans通过冗余信息压缩和判别信息提取，有效提升了细粒度分类性能。

authors_text: Dihan Zheng,Xiaowen Zhang,Kaisheng Ma,Chenglong Bao
title: Learn from Unpaired Data for Image Restoration: A Variational Bayes Approach
title_zh: 从不成对的数据中学习进行图像恢复：变分贝叶斯方法
abstract: Collecting paired training data is difficult in practice, but the unpaired samples broadly exist. Current approaches aim at generating synthesized training data from unpaired samples by exploring the relationship between the corrupted and clean data. This work proposes LUD-VAE, a deep generative method to learn the joint probability density function from data sampled from marginal distributions. Our approach is based on a carefully designed probabilistic graphical model in which the clean and corrupted data domains are conditionally independent. Using variational inference, we maximize the evidence lower bound (ELBO) to estimate the joint probability density function. Furthermore, we show that the ELBO is computable without paired samples under the inference invariant assumption. This property provides the mathematical rationale of our approach in the unpaired setting. Finally, we apply our method to real-world image denoising, super-resolution, and low-light image enhancement tasks and train the models using the synthetic data generated by the LUD-VAE. Experimental results validate the advantages of our method over other approaches.
summary: Collecting paired training data is difficult in practice, but the unpaired samples broadly exist. Current approaches aim at generating synthesized training data from unpaired samples by exploring the relationship between the corrupted and clean data. This work proposes LUD-VAE, a deep generative method to learn the joint probability density function from data sampled from marginal distributions. Our approach is based on a carefully designed probabilistic graphical model in which the clean and corrupted data domains are conditionally independent. Using variational inference, we maximize the evidence lower bound (ELBO) to estimate the joint probability density function. Furthermore, we show that the ELBO is computable without paired samples under the inference invariant assumption. This property provides the mathematical rationale of our approach in the unpaired setting. Finally, we apply our method to real-world image denoising, super-resolution, and low-light image enhancement tasks and train the models using the synthetic data generated by the LUD-VAE. Experimental results validate the advantages of our method over other approaches.
abstract_zh: 收集配对训练数据在实践中很困难，但不配对样本广泛存在。当前的方法旨在通过探索损坏数据和干净数据之间的关系，从不配对的样本生成合成训练数据。这项工作提出了 LUD-VAE，这是一种从边缘分布采样的数据中学习联合概率密度函数的深度生成方法。我们的方法基于精心设计的概率图形模型，其中干净的数据域和损坏的数据域是有条件独立的。使用变分推理，我们最大化证据下界（ELBO）来估计联合概率密度函数。此外，我们表明，在推理不变假设下，ELBO 无需配对样本即可计算。这个属性提供了我们在未配对设置中的方法的数学原理。最后，我们将我们的方法应用于现实世界的图像去噪、超分辨率和低光图像增强任务，并使用 LUD-VAE 生成的合成数据训练模型。实验结果验证了我们的方法相对于其他方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分贝叶斯方法的深度生成模型LUD-VAE，用于在无配对数据的情况下进行图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 实际中获取配对的训练数据（干净图像与退化图像）难度较大，而无配对数据广泛存在。现有方法依赖合成配对数据，但缺乏对无配对数据的直接建模方法。
AI.method: 构建条件独立的联合概率密度模型，通过变分推断最大化证据下界（ELBO），在无需配对样本的假设下估计联合分布，并生成合成数据用于训练。
AI.result: 在真实场景的去噪、超分辨率和低光增强任务中，LUD-VAE生成的模型优于其他方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: LUD-VAE通过数学推导证明了无配对数据建模的可行性，为图像修复任务提供了新的生成式方法框架。

authors_text: Chohei Pang,Qicheng Wang,Kinwing Mak,Hongyu Yu,Michael Yu Wang
title: Viko 2.0: A Hierarchical Gecko-inspired Adhesive Gripper with Visuotactile Sensor
title_zh: Viko 2.0：带有视觉触觉传感器的分层壁虎式粘性抓手
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Robotic grippers with visuotactile sensors have access to rich tactile information for grasping tasks but encounter difficulty in partially encompassing large objects with sufficient grip force. While hierarchical gecko-inspired adhesives are a potential technique for bridging performance gaps, they require a large contact area for efficient usage. In this work, we present a new version of an adaptive gecko gripper called Viko 2.0 that effectively combines the advantage of adhesives and visuotactile sensors. Compared with a non-hierarchical structure, a hierarchical structure with a multimaterial design achieves approximately a 1.5 times increase in normal adhesion and double in contact area. The integrated visuotactile sensor captures a deformation image of the hierarchical structure and provides a real-time measurement of contact area, shear force, and incipient slip detection at 24 Hz. The gripper is implemented on a robotic arm to demonstrate an adaptive grasping pose based on contact area, and grasps objects with a wide range of geometries and textures.
summary: Robotic grippers with visuotactile sensors have access to rich tactile information for grasping tasks but encounter difficulty in partially encompassing large objects with sufficient grip force. While hierarchical gecko-inspired adhesives are a potential technique for bridging performance gaps, they require a large contact area for efficient usage. In this work, we present a new version of an adaptive gecko gripper called Viko 2.0 that effectively combines the advantage of adhesives and visuotactile sensors. Compared with a non-hierarchical structure, a hierarchical structure with a multimaterial design achieves approximately a 1.5 times increase in normal adhesion and double in contact area. The integrated visuotactile sensor captures a deformation image of the hierarchical structure and provides a real-time measurement of contact area, shear force, and incipient slip detection at 24 Hz. The gripper is implemented on a robotic arm to demonstrate an adaptive grasping pose based on contact area, and grasps objects with a wide range of geometries and textures.
abstract_zh: 带有视觉触觉传感器的机器人抓取器可以获取丰富的触觉信息来执行抓取任务，但在以足够的抓取力部分包围大型物体时遇到困难。虽然受壁虎启发的分层粘合剂是弥合性能差距的潜在技术，但它们需要较大的接触面积才能有效使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 Viko 2.0 的新版本自适应壁虎抓手，它有效地结合了粘合剂和视觉触觉传感器的优势。与非分层结构相比，采用多材料设计的分层结构的正常附着力增加了约1.5倍，接触面积增加了一倍。集成视觉触觉传感器捕获分层结构的变形图像，并提供接触面积、剪切力和 24 Hz 初始滑动检测的实时测量。该夹具在机械臂上实现，以演示基于接触面积的自适应抓取姿势，并抓取具有各种几何形状和纹理的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合分层壁虎仿生粘附结构和视觉触觉传感器的自适应抓取器Viko 2.0，用于解决大尺寸物体抓取时的接触面积与抓取力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉触觉传感器抓取大物体时难以兼顾足够抓取力与接触面积，而分层壁虎仿生粘附结构需较大接触面积才能发挥性能，亟需融合两者优势的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多材料分层壁虎仿生粘附结构以提升粘附力与接触面积，集成视觉触觉传感器实时监测接触面积、剪切力及滑动检测，通过机械臂实现自适应抓取姿态调整。
AI.result: 分层结构使正粘附力提升1.5倍，接触面积翻倍；传感器以24Hz频率实时反馈数据，成功抓取多种几何形状与纹理的物体。
AI.conclusion: Viko 2.0通过融合分层仿生粘附与视觉触觉传感，有效提升了复杂物体的自适应抓取能力，为机器人抓取技术提供了新思路。

search_text: Viko 2.0: A Hierarchical Gecko-inspired Adhesive Gripper with Visuotactile Sensor Viko 2.0：带有视觉触觉传感器的分层壁虎式粘性抓手 Robotic grippers with visuotactile sensors have access to rich tactile information for grasping tasks but encounter difficulty in partially encompassing large objects with sufficient grip force. While hierarchical gecko-inspired adhesives are a potential technique for bridging performance gaps, they require a large contact area for efficient usage. In this work, we present a new version of an adaptive gecko gripper called Viko 2.0 that effectively combines the advantage of adhesives and visuotactile sensors. Compared with a non-hierarchical structure, a hierarchical structure with a multimaterial design achieves approximately a 1.5 times increase in normal adhesion and double in contact area. The integrated visuotactile sensor captures a deformation image of the hierarchical structure and provides a real-time measurement of contact area, shear force, and incipient slip detection at 24 Hz. The gripper is implemented on a robotic arm to demonstrate an adaptive grasping pose based on contact area, and grasps objects with a wide range of geometries and textures. 带有视觉触觉传感器的机器人抓取器可以获取丰富的触觉信息来执行抓取任务，但在以足够的抓取力部分包围大型物体时遇到困难。虽然受壁虎启发的分层粘合剂是弥合性能差距的潜在技术，但它们需要较大的接触面积才能有效使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 Viko 2.0 的新版本自适应壁虎抓手，它有效地结合了粘合剂和视觉触觉传感器的优势。与非分层结构相比，采用多材料设计的分层结构的正常附着力增加了约1.5倍，接触面积增加了一倍。集成视觉触觉传感器捕获分层结构的变形图像，并提供接触面积、剪切力和 24 Hz 初始滑动检测的实时测量。该夹具在机械臂上实现，以演示基于接触面积的自适应抓取姿势，并抓取具有各种几何形状和纹理的物体。 本文提出了一种结合分层壁虎仿生粘附结构和视觉触觉传感器的自适应抓取器Viko 2.0，用于解决大尺寸物体抓取时的接触面积与抓取力不足问题。 Chohei Pang,Qicheng Wang,Kinwing Mak,Hongyu Yu,Michael Yu Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Stefan Ivić,Bojan Crnković,Luka Grbčić,Lea Matleković
title: Multi-UAV trajectory planning for 3D visual inspection of complex structures
title_zh: 用于复杂结构 3D 视觉检测的多无人机轨迹规划
comment: Revised abstract, references and captions, 17 pages
comments: Revised abstract, references and captions, 17 pages
abstract: The application of autonomous UAVs to infrastructure inspection tasks provides benefits in terms of operation time reduction, safety, and cost-effectiveness. This paper presents trajectory planning for three-dimensional autonomous multi-UAV volume coverage and visual inspection of infrastructure based on the Heat Equation Driven Area Coverage (HEDAC) algorithm. The method generates trajectories using a potential field and implements distance fields to prevent collisions and to determine UAVs' camera orientation. It successfully achieves coverage during the visual inspection of complex structures such as a wind turbine and a bridge, outperforming a state-of-the-art method by allowing more surface area to be inspected under the same conditions. The presented trajectory planning method offers flexibility in various setup parameters and is applicable to real-world inspection tasks. Conclusively, the proposed methodology could potentially be applied to different autonomous UAV tasks, or even utilized as a UAV motion control method if its computational efficiency is improved.
summary: The application of autonomous UAVs to infrastructure inspection tasks provides benefits in terms of operation time reduction, safety, and cost-effectiveness. This paper presents trajectory planning for three-dimensional autonomous multi-UAV volume coverage and visual inspection of infrastructure based on the Heat Equation Driven Area Coverage (HEDAC) algorithm. The method generates trajectories using a potential field and implements distance fields to prevent collisions and to determine UAVs' camera orientation. It successfully achieves coverage during the visual inspection of complex structures such as a wind turbine and a bridge, outperforming a state-of-the-art method by allowing more surface area to be inspected under the same conditions. The presented trajectory planning method offers flexibility in various setup parameters and is applicable to real-world inspection tasks. Conclusively, the proposed methodology could potentially be applied to different autonomous UAV tasks, or even utilized as a UAV motion control method if its computational efficiency is improved.
abstract_zh: 将自主无人机应用于基础设施检查任务可以在减少操作时间、安全性和成本效益方面带来好处。本文提出了基于热方程驱动区域覆盖（HEDAC）算法的三维自主多无人机体积覆盖和基础设施视觉检查的轨迹规划。该方法使用势场生成轨迹并实现距离场以防止碰撞并确定无人机的相机方向。它在风力涡轮机和桥梁等复杂结构的目视检查过程中成功实现了覆盖，通过允许在相同条件下检查更多的表面积，优于最先进的方法。所提出的轨迹规划方法提供了各种设置参数的灵活性，并且适用于实际检查任务。总之，所提出的方法有可能应用于不同的自主无人机任务，如果计算效率得到提高，甚至可以用作无人机运动控制方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于热方程驱动区域覆盖（HEDAC）算法的三维多无人机轨迹规划方法，用于复杂结构的自主视觉检测。
AI.motivation: 自主无人机在基础设施检测中能提升效率、安全性和经济性，但现有方法在复杂结构覆盖范围和避障能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合势场法与距离场技术，通过HEDAC算法生成无人机轨迹，实现碰撞规避和相机朝向优化。
AI.result: 在风力涡轮机和桥梁等复杂结构检测中，该方法相比现有技术能覆盖更大表面积，且参数设置灵活。
AI.conclusion: 该轨迹规划方法可拓展至其他无人机自主任务，若提升计算效率，有望成为无人机运动控制方案。

authors_text: Guanchun Wang,Xiangrong Zhang,Zelin Peng,Xu Tang,Huiyu Zhou,Licheng Jiao
title: Absolute Wrong Makes Better: Boosting Weakly Supervised Object Detection via Negative Deterministic Information
title_zh: 绝对错误会更好：通过负确定性信息促进弱监督目标检测
abstract: Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) is a challenging task, in which image-level labels (e.g., categories of the instances in the whole image) are used to train an object detector. Many existing methods follow the standard multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm and have achieved promising performance. However, the lack of deterministic information leads to part domination and missing instances. To address these issues, this paper focuses on identifying and fully exploiting the deterministic information in WSOD. We discover that negative instances (i.e. absolutely wrong instances), ignored in most of the previous studies, normally contain valuable deterministic information. Based on this observation, we here propose a negative deterministic information (NDI) based method for improving WSOD, namely NDI-WSOD. Specifically, our method consists of two stages: NDI collecting and exploiting. In the collecting stage, we design several processes to identify and distill the NDI from negative instances online. In the exploiting stage, we utilize the extracted NDI to construct a novel negative contrastive learning mechanism and a negative guided instance selection strategy for dealing with the issues of part domination and missing instances, respectively. Experimental results on several public benchmarks including VOC 2007, VOC 2012 and MS COCO show that our method achieves satisfactory performance.
summary: Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) is a challenging task, in which image-level labels (e.g., categories of the instances in the whole image) are used to train an object detector. Many existing methods follow the standard multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm and have achieved promising performance. However, the lack of deterministic information leads to part domination and missing instances. To address these issues, this paper focuses on identifying and fully exploiting the deterministic information in WSOD. We discover that negative instances (i.e. absolutely wrong instances), ignored in most of the previous studies, normally contain valuable deterministic information. Based on this observation, we here propose a negative deterministic information (NDI) based method for improving WSOD, namely NDI-WSOD. Specifically, our method consists of two stages: NDI collecting and exploiting. In the collecting stage, we design several processes to identify and distill the NDI from negative instances online. In the exploiting stage, we utilize the extracted NDI to construct a novel negative contrastive learning mechanism and a negative guided instance selection strategy for dealing with the issues of part domination and missing instances, respectively. Experimental results on several public benchmarks including VOC 2007, VOC 2012 and MS COCO show that our method achieves satisfactory performance.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）是一项具有挑战性的任务，其中图像级标签（例如整个图像中实例的类别）用于训练对象检测器。许多现有方法遵循标准的多实例学习（MIL）范式，并取得了可喜的性能。然而，缺乏确定性信息会导致部分支配和缺失实例。为了解决这些问题，本文重点关注识别并充分利用 WSOD 中的确定性信息。我们发现，在之前的大多数研究中被忽略的负面实例（即绝对错误的实例）通常包含有价值的确定性信息。基于这一观察，我们在此提出一种基于负确定性信息（NDI）的改进 WSOD 的方法，即 NDI-WSOD。具体来说，我们的方法包括两个阶段：NDI 收集和利用。在收集阶段，我们设计了几个流程来从在线负面实例中识别和提取 NDI。在开发阶段，我们利用提取的 NDI 构建了一种新颖的负对比学习机制和负指导实例选择策略，分别用于处理部分支配和缺失实例的问题。在VOC 2007、VOC 2012和MS COCO等多个公共基准上的实验结果表明，我们的方法取得了令人满意的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于负确定性信息（NDI）的方法NDI-WSOD，通过利用负样本中的确定性信息提升弱监督目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法因缺乏确定性信息导致部分区域主导和实例缺失问题，而负样本（绝对错误实例）中蕴含的确定性信息未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 方法分为两个阶段：在线收集NDI（通过设计过程识别并蒸馏负样本中的确定性信息）和利用NDI（构建负对比学习机制及负引导实例选择策略分别解决部分主导和实例缺失问题）。
AI.result: 在VOC 2007/2012和MS COCO等基准数据集上实验表明，该方法取得令人满意的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用负样本中的确定性信息，NDI-WSOD能够缓解弱监督目标检测中的部分主导和实例缺失问题，提升检测性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于负确定性信息（NDI）的方法NDI-WSOD，通过利用负样本中的确定性信息提升弱监督目标检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法因缺乏确定性信息导致部分区域主导和实例缺失问题，而负样本（绝对错误实例）中蕴含的确定性信息未被充分挖掘。
ai_content.method: 方法分为两个阶段：在线收集NDI（通过设计过程识别并蒸馏负样本中的确定性信息）和利用NDI（构建负对比学习机制及负引导实例选择策略分别解决部分主导和实例缺失问题）。
ai_content.result: 在VOC 2007/2012和MS COCO等基准数据集上实验表明，该方法取得令人满意的效果。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过有效利用负样本中的确定性信息，NDI-WSOD能够缓解弱监督目标检测中的部分主导和实例缺失问题，提升检测性能。

search_text: Absolute Wrong Makes Better: Boosting Weakly Supervised Object Detection via Negative Deterministic Information 绝对错误会更好：通过负确定性信息促进弱监督目标检测 Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) is a challenging task, in which image-level labels (e.g., categories of the instances in the whole image) are used to train an object detector. Many existing methods follow the standard multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm and have achieved promising performance. However, the lack of deterministic information leads to part domination and missing instances. To address these issues, this paper focuses on identifying and fully exploiting the deterministic information in WSOD. We discover that negative instances (i.e. absolutely wrong instances), ignored in most of the previous studies, normally contain valuable deterministic information. Based on this observation, we here propose a negative deterministic information (NDI) based method for improving WSOD, namely NDI-WSOD. Specifically, our method consists of two stages: NDI collecting and exploiting. In the collecting stage, we design several processes to identify and distill the NDI from negative instances online. In the exploiting stage, we utilize the extracted NDI to construct a novel negative contrastive learning mechanism and a negative guided instance selection strategy for dealing with the issues of part domination and missing instances, respectively. Experimental results on several public benchmarks including VOC 2007, VOC 2012 and MS COCO show that our method achieves satisfactory performance. 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）是一项具有挑战性的任务，其中图像级标签（例如整个图像中实例的类别）用于训练对象检测器。许多现有方法遵循标准的多实例学习（MIL）范式，并取得了可喜的性能。然而，缺乏确定性信息会导致部分支配和缺失实例。为了解决这些问题，本文重点关注识别并充分利用 WSOD 中的确定性信息。我们发现，在之前的大多数研究中被忽略的负面实例（即绝对错误的实例）通常包含有价值的确定性信息。基于这一观察，我们在此提出一种基于负确定性信息（NDI）的改进 WSOD 的方法，即 NDI-WSOD。具体来说，我们的方法包括两个阶段：NDI 收集和利用。在收集阶段，我们设计了几个流程来从在线负面实例中识别和提取 NDI。在开发阶段，我们利用提取的 NDI 构建了一种新颖的负对比学习机制和负指导实例选择策略，分别用于处理部分支配和缺失实例的问题。在VOC 2007、VOC 2012和MS COCO等多个公共基准上的实验结果表明，我们的方法取得了令人满意的性能。 本文提出一种基于负确定性信息（NDI）的方法NDI-WSOD，通过利用负样本中的确定性信息提升弱监督目标检测性能。 Guanchun Wang,Xiangrong Zhang,Zelin Peng,Xu Tang,Huiyu Zhou,Licheng Jiao cs.CV

authors_text: David M. Bossens,Sarvapali Ramchurn,Danesh Tarapore
title: Resilient robot teams: a review integrating decentralised control, change-detection, and learning
title_zh: 弹性机器人团队：整合分散控制、变化检测和学习的综述
abstract: Purpose of review: This paper reviews opportunities and challenges for decentralised control, change-detection, and learning in the context of resilient robot teams. Recent findings: Exogenous fault detection methods can provide a generic detection or a specific diagnosis with a recovery solution. Robot teams can perform active and distributed sensing for detecting changes in the environment, including identifying and tracking dynamic anomalies, as well as collaboratively mapping dynamic environments. Resilient methods for decentralised control have been developed in learning perception-action-communication loops, multi-agent reinforcement learning, embodied evolution, offline evolution with online adaptation, explicit task allocation, and stigmergy in swarm robotics. Summary: Remaining challenges for resilient robot teams are integrating change-detection and trial-and-error learning methods, obtaining reliable performance evaluations under constrained evaluation time, improving the safety of resilient robot teams, theoretical results demonstrating rapid adaptation to given environmental perturbations, and designing realistic and compelling case studies.
summary: Purpose of review: This paper reviews opportunities and challenges for decentralised control, change-detection, and learning in the context of resilient robot teams. Recent findings: Exogenous fault detection methods can provide a generic detection or a specific diagnosis with a recovery solution. Robot teams can perform active and distributed sensing for detecting changes in the environment, including identifying and tracking dynamic anomalies, as well as collaboratively mapping dynamic environments. Resilient methods for decentralised control have been developed in learning perception-action-communication loops, multi-agent reinforcement learning, embodied evolution, offline evolution with online adaptation, explicit task allocation, and stigmergy in swarm robotics. Summary: Remaining challenges for resilient robot teams are integrating change-detection and trial-and-error learning methods, obtaining reliable performance evaluations under constrained evaluation time, improving the safety of resilient robot teams, theoretical results demonstrating rapid adaptation to given environmental perturbations, and designing realistic and compelling case studies.
abstract_zh: 综述目的：本文回顾了弹性机器人团队背景下分散控制、变化检测和学习的机遇和挑战。最新发现：外源故障检测方法可以提供通用检测或具有恢复解决方案的特定诊断。机器人团队可以执行主动和分布式传感来检测环境的变化，包括识别和跟踪动态异常，以及协作绘制动态环境图。分散控制的弹性方法已经在学习感知-行动-通信循环、多智能体强化学习、具身进化、在线适应的离线进化、显式任务分配和群体机器人中的 stigmergy 等方面得到了发展。摘要：弹性机器人团队面临的剩余挑战是集成变化检测和试错学习方法，在有限的评估时间下获得可靠的性能评估，提高弹性机器人团队的安全性，理论结果证明对给定环境扰动的快速适应，以及设计现实且令人信服的案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了弹性机器人团队中去中心化控制、变化检测与学习的整合机会与挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人团队在动态环境和故障场景下鲁棒性不足，需整合多技术提升适应性与协作能力。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析去中心化控制方法（如多智能体强化学习、群体机器人stigmergy）及变化检测技术，并总结其在弹性系统中的应用。
AI.result: 发现外源性故障检测可实现通用诊断，机器人团队可协作感知动态环境，但整合学习与检测、安全评估等仍存挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来需解决跨技术整合、受限条件下的性能评估、安全性提升及理论验证等关键问题以推动弹性机器人团队发展。

authors_text: Abhishek Saroha,Marvin Eisenberger,Tarun Yenamandra,Daniel Cremers
title: Implicit Shape Completion via Adversarial Shape Priors
title_zh: 通过对抗性形状先验隐式形状完成
abstract: We present a novel neural implicit shape method for partial point cloud completion. To that end, we combine a conditional Deep-SDF architecture with learned, adversarial shape priors. More specifically, our network converts partial inputs into a global latent code and then recovers the full geometry via an implicit, signed distance generator. Additionally, we train a PointNet++ discriminator that impels the generator to produce plausible, globally consistent reconstructions. In that way, we effectively decouple the challenges of predicting shapes that are both realistic, i.e. imitate the training set's pose distribution, and accurate in the sense that they replicate the partial input observations. In our experiments, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for completing partial shapes, considering both man-made objects (e.g. airplanes, chairs, ...) and deformable shape categories (human bodies). Finally, we show that our adversarial training approach leads to visually plausible reconstructions that are highly consistent in recovering missing parts of a given object.
summary: We present a novel neural implicit shape method for partial point cloud completion. To that end, we combine a conditional Deep-SDF architecture with learned, adversarial shape priors. More specifically, our network converts partial inputs into a global latent code and then recovers the full geometry via an implicit, signed distance generator. Additionally, we train a PointNet++ discriminator that impels the generator to produce plausible, globally consistent reconstructions. In that way, we effectively decouple the challenges of predicting shapes that are both realistic, i.e. imitate the training set's pose distribution, and accurate in the sense that they replicate the partial input observations. In our experiments, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for completing partial shapes, considering both man-made objects (e.g. airplanes, chairs, ...) and deformable shape categories (human bodies). Finally, we show that our adversarial training approach leads to visually plausible reconstructions that are highly consistent in recovering missing parts of a given object.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的神经隐式形状方法来完成部分点云。为此，我们将条件 Deep-SDF 架构与学习的对抗性形状先验相结合。更具体地说，我们的网络将部分输入转换为全局潜在代码，然后通过隐式有符号距离生成器恢复完整的几何形状。此外，我们训练了一个 PointNet++ 判别器，促使生成器产生合理的、全局一致的重建。通过这种方式，我们有效地解耦了预测形状的挑战，这些形状既现实，即模仿训练集的姿势分布，又准确，因为它们复制了部分输入观察结果。在我们的实验中，我们展示了完成部分形状的最先进的性能，同时考虑了人造物体（例如飞机、椅子等）和可变形形状类别（人体）。最后，我们表明，我们的对抗性训练方法可以实现视觉上合理的重建，在恢复给定对象的缺失部分方面高度一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗性形状先验的隐式形状补全方法，用于完成部分点云数据的完整几何重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时保证形状补全的现实性（符合训练集分布）与输入准确性，需解耦二者挑战。
AI.method: 结合条件Deep-SDF架构与对抗性形状先验，利用生成器将部分点云转换为全局潜在代码并生成完整几何，同时训练PointNet++判别器以增强重建的全局一致性与真实性。
AI.result: 在多个形状类别（如人造物体和人体）的点云补全任务中达到SOTA性能，生成的重建结果在视觉上合理且缺失部分高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练策略有效解耦了形状真实性与输入准确性，生成高质量且全局一致的补全结果。

In that way, we effectively decouple the challenges of predicting shapes that are both realistic, i.e. imitate the training set's pose distribution, and accurate in the sense that they replicate the partial input observations. In our experiments, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for completing partial shapes, considering both man-made objects (e.g. airplanes, chairs, ...) and deformable shape categories (human bodies). Finally, we show that our adversarial training approach leads to visually plausible reconstructions that are highly consistent in recovering missing parts of a given object. 我们提出了一种新颖的神经隐式形状方法来完成部分点云。为此，我们将条件 Deep-SDF 架构与学习的对抗性形状先验相结合。更具体地说，我们的网络将部分输入转换为全局潜在代码，然后通过隐式有符号距离生成器恢复完整的几何形状。此外，我们训练了一个 PointNet++ 判别器，促使生成器产生合理的、全局一致的重建。通过这种方式，我们有效地解耦了预测形状的挑战，这些形状既现实，即模仿训练集的姿势分布，又准确，因为它们复制了部分输入观察结果。在我们的实验中，我们展示了完成部分形状的最先进的性能，同时考虑了人造物体（例如飞机、椅子等）和可变形形状类别（人体）。最后，我们表明，我们的对抗性训练方法可以实现视觉上合理的重建，在恢复给定对象的缺失部分方面高度一致。 本文提出一种基于对抗性形状先验的隐式形状补全方法，用于完成部分点云数据的完整几何重建。 Abhishek Saroha,Marvin Eisenberger,Tarun Yenamandra,Daniel Cremers cs.CV

authors_text: William Seymour,Mark Cote,Jose Such
title: Consent on the Fly: Developing Ethical Verbal Consent for Voice Assistants
title_zh: 即时同意：为语音助手制定道德口头同意
comment: Accepted to the CHI'22 Workshop on the Ethics of Conversational User Interfaces
comments: Accepted to the CHI'22 Workshop on the Ethics of Conversational User Interfaces
abstract: Determining how voice assistants should broker consent to share data with third party software has proven to be a complex problem. Devices often require users to switch to companion smartphone apps in order to navigate permissions menus for their otherwise hands-free voice assistant. More in line with smartphone app stores, Alexa now offers "voice-forward consent", allowing users to grant skills access to personal data mid-conversation using speech. While more usable and convenient than opening a companion app, asking for consent 'on the fly' can undermine several concepts core to the informed consent process. The intangible nature of voice interfaces further blurs the boundary between parts of an interaction controlled by third-party developers from the underlying platforms. We outline a research agenda towards usable and effective voice-based consent to address the problems with brokering consent verbally, including our own work drawing on the GDPR and work on consent in Ubicomp.
summary: Determining how voice assistants should broker consent to share data with third party software has proven to be a complex problem. Devices often require users to switch to companion smartphone apps in order to navigate permissions menus for their otherwise hands-free voice assistant. More in line with smartphone app stores, Alexa now offers "voice-forward consent", allowing users to grant skills access to personal data mid-conversation using speech. While more usable and convenient than opening a companion app, asking for consent 'on the fly' can undermine several concepts core to the informed consent process. The intangible nature of voice interfaces further blurs the boundary between parts of an interaction controlled by third-party developers from the underlying platforms. We outline a research agenda towards usable and effective voice-based consent to address the problems with brokering consent verbally, including our own work drawing on the GDPR and work on consent in Ubicomp.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，确定语音助手应如何征求同意与第三方软件共享数据是一个复杂的问题。设备通常要求用户切换到配套的智能手机应用程序，以便导航免提语音助手的权限菜单。与智能手机应用商店更一致的是，Alexa 现在提供“语音转发同意”功能，允许用户在对话中使用语音授予技能访问个人数据的权限。虽然比打开配套应用程序更有用、更方便，但“即时”请求同意可能会破坏知情同意流程的几个核心概念。语音界面的无形本质进一步模糊了由底层平台的第三方开发人员控制的交互部分之间的界限。我们概述了一个研究议程，旨在实现可用且有效的基于语音的同意，以解决口头代理同意的问题，包括我们自己借鉴 GDPR 的工作以及 Ubicomp 中的同意工作。

AI.tldr: 探讨语音助手中实时口头同意机制的设计与伦理挑战
AI.motivation: 现有语音助手在数据共享同意流程中存在用户体验与伦理问题，需平衡便捷性与用户知情权
AI.method: 通过分析GDPR法规及Ubicomp领域现有研究，提出针对语音接口的伦理同意机制设计框架
AI.result: 明确了语音同意中的关键挑战，并提出了基于伦理框架的改进方向
AI.conclusion: 需持续优化语音助手的同意机制，确保用户在便捷性与数据隐私间的平衡

authors_text: Niclas Boehmer,Klaus Heeger
title: Adapting Stable Matchings to Forced and Forbidden Pairs
title_zh: 使稳定匹配适应强制和禁止对
abstract: We introduce the problem of adapting a stable matching to forced and forbidden pairs. Specifically, given a stable matching $M_1$, a set $Q$ of forced pairs, and a set $P$ of forbidden pairs, we want to find a stable matching that includes all pairs from $Q$, no pair from $P$, and that is as close as possible to $M_1$. We study this problem in four classical stable matching settings: Stable Roommates (with Ties) and Stable Marriage (with Ties). As our main contribution, we employ the theory of rotations for Stable Roommates to develop a polynomial-time algorithm for adapting Stable Roommates matchings to forced pairs. In contrast to this, we show that the same problem for forbidden pairs is NP-hard. However, our polynomial-time algorithm for the case of only forced pairs can be extended to a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm with respect to the number of forbidden pairs when both forced and forbidden pairs are present. Moreover, we also study the setting where preferences contain ties. Here, depending on the chosen stability criterion, we show either that our algorithmic results can be extended or that formerly tractable problems become intractable.
summary: We introduce the problem of adapting a stable matching to forced and forbidden pairs. Specifically, given a stable matching $M_1$, a set $Q$ of forced pairs, and a set $P$ of forbidden pairs, we want to find a stable matching that includes all pairs from $Q$, no pair from $P$, and that is as close as possible to $M_1$. We study this problem in four classical stable matching settings: Stable Roommates (with Ties) and Stable Marriage (with Ties). As our main contribution, we employ the theory of rotations for Stable Roommates to develop a polynomial-time algorithm for adapting Stable Roommates matchings to forced pairs. In contrast to this, we show that the same problem for forbidden pairs is NP-hard. However, our polynomial-time algorithm for the case of only forced pairs can be extended to a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm with respect to the number of forbidden pairs when both forced and forbidden pairs are present. Moreover, we also study the setting where preferences contain ties. Here, depending on the chosen stability criterion, we show either that our algorithmic results can be extended or that formerly tractable problems become intractable.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了使稳定匹配适应强制和禁止对的问题。具体来说，给定一个稳定匹配 $M_1$、一组强制对 $Q$ 和一组禁止对 $P$，我们希望找到一个稳定匹配，其中包含 $Q$ 中的所有对，不包含来自 $P$ 的对，并且尽可能接近 $M_1$。我们在四种经典的稳定匹配环境中研究这个问题：稳定室友（有领带）和稳定婚姻（有领带）。作为我们的主要贡献，我们采用稳定室友的轮换理论来开发一种多项式时间算法，用于使稳定室友匹配适应强制配对。与此相反，我们证明了禁止对的相同问题是 NP 困难的。然而，当强制对和禁止对同时存在时，我们针对仅强制对情况的多项式时间算法可以扩展到关于禁止对数量的固定参数易处理算法。此外，我们还研究偏好包含联系的环境。在这里，根据所选的稳定性标准，我们表明我们的算法结果可以扩展，或者以前易于处理的问题变得棘手。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在强制配对和禁止配对的情况下，如何调整稳定匹配以尽可能接近初始匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 在实际匹配场景中，可能存在必须满足的强制配对和禁止配对，因此需要调整现有稳定匹配以满足这些约束。
AI.method: 采用稳定室友的旋转理论设计多项式时间算法处理强制配对，证明禁止配对问题的NP难性，并提出固定参数可解算法；同时分析有时态偏好的情况。
AI.result: 提出了适应强制配对的多项式时间算法，证明禁止配对问题的NP难性，开发固定参数可解算法，并分析有时态偏好的影响。
AI.conclusion: 论文展示了在强制和禁止配对约束下调整稳定匹配的算法有效性，揭示了不同约束条件下的计算复杂性差异，并为实际应用提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Hassan Imani,Md Baharul Islam,Lai-Kuan Wong
title: A New Dataset and Transformer for Stereoscopic Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于立体视频超分辨率的新数据集和转换器
comment: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
comments: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
abstract: Stereo video super-resolution (SVSR) aims to enhance the spatial resolution of the low-resolution video by reconstructing the high-resolution video. The key challenges in SVSR are preserving the stereo-consistency and temporal-consistency, without which viewers may experience 3D fatigue. There are several notable works on stereoscopic image super-resolution, but there is little research on stereo video super-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Transformer-based model for SVSR, namely Trans-SVSR. Trans-SVSR comprises two key novel components: a spatio-temporal convolutional self-attention layer and an optical flow-based feed-forward layer that discovers the correlation across different video frames and aligns the features. The parallax attention mechanism (PAM) that uses the cross-view information to consider the significant disparities is used to fuse the stereo views. Due to the lack of a benchmark dataset suitable for the SVSR task, we collected a new stereoscopic video dataset, SVSR-Set, containing 71 full high-definition (HD) stereo videos captured using a professional stereo camera. Extensive experiments on the collected dataset, along with two other datasets, demonstrate that the Trans-SVSR can achieve competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Project code and additional results are available at https://github.com/H-deep/Trans-SVSR/
summary: Stereo video super-resolution (SVSR) aims to enhance the spatial resolution of the low-resolution video by reconstructing the high-resolution video. The key challenges in SVSR are preserving the stereo-consistency and temporal-consistency, without which viewers may experience 3D fatigue. There are several notable works on stereoscopic image super-resolution, but there is little research on stereo video super-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Transformer-based model for SVSR, namely Trans-SVSR. Trans-SVSR comprises two key novel components: a spatio-temporal convolutional self-attention layer and an optical flow-based feed-forward layer that discovers the correlation across different video frames and aligns the features. The parallax attention mechanism (PAM) that uses the cross-view information to consider the significant disparities is used to fuse the stereo views. Due to the lack of a benchmark dataset suitable for the SVSR task, we collected a new stereoscopic video dataset, SVSR-Set, containing 71 full high-definition (HD) stereo videos captured using a professional stereo camera. Extensive experiments on the collected dataset, along with two other datasets, demonstrate that the Trans-SVSR can achieve competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Project code and additional results are available at https://github.com/H-deep/Trans-SVSR/
abstract_zh: 立体视频超分辨率（SVSR）旨在通过重建高分辨率视频来增强低分辨率视频的空间分辨率。 SVSR 的主要挑战是保持立体一致性和时间一致性，否则观众可能会感到 3D 疲劳。关于立体图像超分辨率有几项著名的工作，但关于立体视频超分辨率的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新型 SVSR 模型，即 Trans-SVSR。 Trans-SVSR 包含两个关键的新颖组件：时空卷积自注意力层和基于光流的前馈层，用于发现不同视频帧之间的相关性并对齐特征。使用交叉视图信息来考虑显着差异的视差注意机制（PAM）用于融合立体视图。由于缺乏适合 SVSR 任务的基准数据集，我们收集了一个新的立体视频数据集 SVSR-Set，其中包含使用专业立体相机捕获的 71 个全高清 (HD) 立体视频。对收集的数据集以及其他两个数据集进行的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Trans-SVSR 可以实现具有竞争力的性能。项目代码和其他结果可在 https://github.com/H-deep/Trans-SVSR/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的立体视频超分辨率模型Trans-SVSR，并构建了新的立体视频数据集SVSR-Set以解决立体视频超分辨率任务中的时空一致性与视差对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于立体图像超分辨率，缺乏针对立体视频的系统性研究，且缺少适用于立体视频超分辨率的基准数据集。
AI.method: 设计包含时空卷积自注意力层和光流引导前馈层的Transformer架构，结合视差注意力机制（PAM）实现双目视图特征融合，并构建包含71段专业设备拍摄的HD立体视频的SVSR-Set数据集。
AI.result: 在SVSR-Set及两个其他数据集上的实验表明，Trans-SVSR在立体视频超分辨率任务中较现有方法具有竞争力，代码与补充结果已开源。
AI.conclusion: Trans-SVSR通过时空特征建模与视差对齐机制有效提升了立体视频超分辨率质量，新数据集为后续研究提供了基准支持。

search_text: A New Dataset and Transformer for Stereoscopic Video Super-Resolution 用于立体视频超分辨率的新数据集和转换器 Stereo video super-resolution (SVSR) aims to enhance the spatial resolution of the low-resolution video by reconstructing the high-resolution video. The key challenges in SVSR are preserving the stereo-consistency and temporal-consistency, without which viewers may experience 3D fatigue. There are several notable works on stereoscopic image super-resolution, but there is little research on stereo video super-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Transformer-based model for SVSR, namely Trans-SVSR. Trans-SVSR comprises two key novel components: a spatio-temporal convolutional self-attention layer and an optical flow-based feed-forward layer that discovers the correlation across different video frames and aligns the features. The parallax attention mechanism (PAM) that uses the cross-view information to consider the significant disparities is used to fuse the stereo views. Due to the lack of a benchmark dataset suitable for the SVSR task, we collected a new stereoscopic video dataset, SVSR-Set, containing 71 full high-definition (HD) stereo videos captured using a professional stereo camera. Extensive experiments on the collected dataset, along with two other datasets, demonstrate that the Trans-SVSR can achieve competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Project code and additional results are available at https://github.com/H-deep/Trans-SVSR/ 立体视频超分辨率（SVSR）旨在通过重建高分辨率视频来增强低分辨率视频的空间分辨率。 SVSR 的主要挑战是保持立体一致性和时间一致性，否则观众可能会感到 3D 疲劳。关于立体图像超分辨率有几项著名的工作，但关于立体视频超分辨率的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新型 SVSR 模型，即 Trans-SVSR。 Trans-SVSR 包含两个关键的新颖组件：时空卷积自注意力层和基于光流的前馈层，用于发现不同视频帧之间的相关性并对齐特征。使用交叉视图信息来考虑显着差异的视差注意机制（PAM）用于融合立体视图。由于缺乏适合 SVSR 任务的基准数据集，我们收集了一个新的立体视频数据集 SVSR-Set，其中包含使用专业立体相机捕获的 71 个全高清 (HD) 立体视频。对收集的数据集以及其他两个数据集进行的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Trans-SVSR 可以实现具有竞争力的性能。项目代码和其他结果可在 https://github.com/H-deep/Trans-SVSR/ 获取 本文提出一种基于Transformer的立体视频超分辨率模型Trans-SVSR，并构建了新的立体视频数据集SVSR-Set以解决立体视频超分辨率任务中的时空一致性与视差对齐问题。 Hassan Imani,Md Baharul Islam,Lai-Kuan Wong cs.CV

authors_text: Taoran Fang,Zhiqing Xiao,Chunping Wang,Jiarong Xu,Xuan Yang,Yang Yang
title: DropMessage: Unifying Random Dropping for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: DropMessage：统一图神经网络的随机丢弃
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are powerful tools for graph representation learning. Despite their rapid development, GNNs also face some challenges, such as over-fitting, over-smoothing, and non-robustness. Previous works indicate that these problems can be alleviated by random dropping methods, which integrate augmented data into models by randomly masking parts of the input. However, some open problems of random dropping on GNNs remain to be solved. First, it is challenging to find a universal method that are suitable for all cases considering the divergence of different datasets and models. Second, augmented data introduced to GNNs causes the incomplete coverage of parameters and unstable training process. Third, there is no theoretical analysis on the effectiveness of random dropping methods on GNNs. In this paper, we propose a novel random dropping method called DropMessage, which performs dropping operations directly on the propagated messages during the message-passing process. More importantly, we find that DropMessage provides a unified framework for most existing random dropping methods, based on which we give theoretical analysis of their effectiveness. Furthermore, we elaborate the superiority of DropMessage: it stabilizes the training process by reducing sample variance; it keeps information diversity from the perspective of information theory, enabling it become a theoretical upper bound of other methods. To evaluate our proposed method, we conduct experiments that aims for multiple tasks on five public datasets and two industrial datasets with various backbone models. The experimental results show that DropMessage has the advantages of both effectiveness and generalization, and can significantly alleviate the problems mentioned above.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are powerful tools for graph representation learning. Despite their rapid development, GNNs also face some challenges, such as over-fitting, over-smoothing, and non-robustness. Previous works indicate that these problems can be alleviated by random dropping methods, which integrate augmented data into models by randomly masking parts of the input. However, some open problems of random dropping on GNNs remain to be solved. First, it is challenging to find a universal method that are suitable for all cases considering the divergence of different datasets and models. Second, augmented data introduced to GNNs causes the incomplete coverage of parameters and unstable training process. Third, there is no theoretical analysis on the effectiveness of random dropping methods on GNNs. In this paper, we propose a novel random dropping method called DropMessage, which performs dropping operations directly on the propagated messages during the message-passing process. More importantly, we find that DropMessage provides a unified framework for most existing random dropping methods, based on which we give theoretical analysis of their effectiveness. Furthermore, we elaborate the superiority of DropMessage: it stabilizes the training process by reducing sample variance; it keeps information diversity from the perspective of information theory, enabling it become a theoretical upper bound of other methods. To evaluate our proposed method, we conduct experiments that aims for multiple tasks on five public datasets and two industrial datasets with various backbone models. The experimental results show that DropMessage has the advantages of both effectiveness and generalization, and can significantly alleviate the problems mentioned above.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是图表示学习的强大工具。尽管发展迅速，GNN 也面临着一些挑战，例如过度拟合、过度平滑和不鲁棒性。先前的工作表明，这些问题可以通过随机丢弃方法来缓解，随机丢弃方法通过随机屏蔽部分输入将增强数据集成到模型中。然而，GNN 上随机丢弃的一些开放问题仍有待解决。首先，考虑到不同数据集和模型的差异，找到适合所有情况的通用方法具有挑战性。其次，GNN 中引入的增强数据导致参数覆盖不完全和训练过程不稳定。第三，没有关于随机丢弃方法在 GNN 上的有效性的理论分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 DropMessage 的新颖的随机丢弃方法，该方法在消息传递过程中直接对传播的消息执行丢弃操作。更重要的是，我们发现DropMessage为大多数现有的随机丢弃方法提供了一个统一的框架，在此基础上我们对其有效性进行了理论分析。此外，我们阐述了DropMessage的优越性：它通过减少样本方差来稳定训练过程；它从信息论的角度保持了信息的多样性，使其成为其他方法的理论上限。为了评估我们提出的方法，我们在五个公共数据集和两个具有各种骨干模型的工业数据集上进行了针对多个任务的实验。实验结果表明，DropMessage兼具有效性和泛化性的优点，能够显着缓解上述问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DropMessage的新方法，通过在图神经网络的消息传递过程中直接进行随机丢弃操作，以解决GNN中的过拟合、过平滑和非鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有随机丢弃方法在处理GNN时存在普适性不足、参数覆盖不完整、训练不稳定及缺乏理论分析等问题，需一种统一框架提升效果并提供理论支持。
AI.method: DropMessage在消息传递阶段直接对传播的消息进行随机丢弃，构建统一框架兼容现有方法，并从信息论角度分析其保持信息多样性及降低样本方差的理论优势。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集和两个工业数据集上进行多任务实验，结果表明DropMessage在有效性与泛化能力上表现优异，显著缓解了GNN的过拟合、过平滑等问题。
AI.conclusion: DropMessage通过统一框架和理论分析为GNN的随机丢弃方法提供了新视角，实验验证其在多种场景下的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。
