The proposed SNN model achieves competitive performances on neuromorphic datasets: N-MNIST and SHD. Furthermore, experimental results demonstrate that the proposed three aspects are significant to iterative robustness, spike efficiency, and temporal feature extraction capability of spike activities. authors_text: Xun Gong,Yizhou Lu,Zhikai Zhou,Yanmin Qian
title: Layer-wise Fast Adaptation for End-to-End Multi-Accent Speech Recognition
title_zh: 端到端多口音语音识别的分层快速适应
abstract: Accent variability has posed a huge challenge to automatic speech recognition~(ASR) modeling. Although one-hot accent vector based adaptation systems are commonly used, they require prior knowledge about the target accent and cannot handle unseen accents. Furthermore, simply concatenating accent embeddings does not make good use of accent knowledge, which has limited improvements. In this work, we aim to tackle these problems with a novel layer-wise adaptation structure injected into the E2E ASR model encoder. The adapter layer encodes an arbitrary accent in the accent space and assists the ASR model in recognizing accented speech. Given an utterance, the adaptation structure extracts the corresponding accent information and transforms the input acoustic feature into an accent-related feature through the linear combination of all accent bases. We further explore the injection position of the adaptation layer, the number of accent bases, and different types of accent bases to achieve better accent adaptation. Experimental results show that the proposed adaptation structure brings 12\% and 10\% relative word error rate~(WER) reduction on the AESRC2020 accent dataset and the Librispeech dataset, respectively, compared to the baseline.
summary: Accent variability has posed a huge challenge to automatic speech recognition~(ASR) modeling. Although one-hot accent vector based adaptation systems are commonly used, they require prior knowledge about the target accent and cannot handle unseen accents. Furthermore, simply concatenating accent embeddings does not make good use of accent knowledge, which has limited improvements. In this work, we aim to tackle these problems with a novel layer-wise adaptation structure injected into the E2E ASR model encoder. The adapter layer encodes an arbitrary accent in the accent space and assists the ASR model in recognizing accented speech. Given an utterance, the adaptation structure extracts the corresponding accent information and transforms the input acoustic feature into an accent-related feature through the linear combination of all accent bases. We further explore the injection position of the adaptation layer, the number of accent bases, and different types of accent bases to achieve better accent adaptation. Experimental results show that the proposed adaptation structure brings 12\% and 10\% relative word error rate~(WER) reduction on the AESRC2020 accent dataset and the Librispeech dataset, respectively, compared to the baseline.
abstract_zh: 口音变异对自动语音识别（ASR）建模提出了巨大的挑战。尽管基于单热口音向量的适应系统很常用，但它们需要有关目标口音的先验知识，并且无法处理看不见的口音。此外，简单地连接重音嵌入并不能很好地利用重音知识，其改进有限。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过注入 E2E ASR 模型编码器中的新型分层自适应结构来解决这些问题。适配器层对口音空间中的任意口音进行编码，并协助 ASR 模型识别口音语音。给定一个话语，自适应结构提取相应的口音信息，并通过所有口音基础的线性组合将输入声学特征转换为口音相关特征。我们进一步探讨了适应层的注入位置、重音碱基的数量以及不同类型的重音碱基，以实现更好的重音适应。实验结果表明，与基线相比，所提出的适应结构在 AESRC2020 口音数据集和 Librispeech 数据集上分别带来 12% 和 10% 的相对单词错误率 (WER) 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层快速适应结构，用于端到端多口音语音识别，以解决口音变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于one-hot向量的适应系统需要目标口音的先验知识且无法处理未见过的口音，简单拼接口音嵌入未能有效利用口音信息。
AI.method: 在端到端ASR模型编码器中注入分层适应结构，通过线性组合所有口音基向量将输入声学特征转换为口音相关特征，并探索适应层位置、基数量及类型。
AI.result: 在AESRC2020和Librispeech数据集上分别实现12%和10%的相对词错误率(WER)降低。
AI.conclusion: 该适应结构无需先验口音知识即可有效利用口音信息，显著提升多口音语音识别性能。

authors_text: Han Xu,Abhijit Sarkar,A. Lynn Abbott
title: Color Invariant Skin Segmentation
title_zh: 颜色不变的皮肤分割
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of automatically detecting human skin in images without reliance on color information. A primary motivation of the work has been to achieve results that are consistent across the full range of skin tones, even while using a training dataset that is significantly biased toward lighter skin tones. Previous skin-detection methods have used color cues almost exclusively, and we present a new approach that performs well in the absence of such information. A key aspect of the work is dataset repair through augmentation that is applied strategically during training, with the goal of color invariant feature learning to enhance generalization. We have demonstrated the concept using two architectures, and experimental results show improvements in both precision and recall for most Fitzpatrick skin tones in the benchmark ECU dataset. We further tested the system with the RFW dataset to show that the proposed method performs much more consistently across different ethnicities, thereby reducing the chance of bias based on skin color. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our work, extensive experiments were performed on grayscale images as well as images obtained under unconstrained illumination and with artificial filters. Source code: https://github.com/HanXuMartin/Color-Invariant-Skin-Segmentation
summary: This paper addresses the problem of automatically detecting human skin in images without reliance on color information. A primary motivation of the work has been to achieve results that are consistent across the full range of skin tones, even while using a training dataset that is significantly biased toward lighter skin tones. Previous skin-detection methods have used color cues almost exclusively, and we present a new approach that performs well in the absence of such information. A key aspect of the work is dataset repair through augmentation that is applied strategically during training, with the goal of color invariant feature learning to enhance generalization. We have demonstrated the concept using two architectures, and experimental results show improvements in both precision and recall for most Fitzpatrick skin tones in the benchmark ECU dataset. We further tested the system with the RFW dataset to show that the proposed method performs much more consistently across different ethnicities, thereby reducing the chance of bias based on skin color. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our work, extensive experiments were performed on grayscale images as well as images obtained under unconstrained illumination and with artificial filters. Source code: https://github.com/HanXuMartin/Color-Invariant-Skin-Segmentation
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在不依赖颜色信息的情况下自动检测图像中的人体皮肤的问题。这项工作的主要动机是即使使用明显偏向浅肤色的训练数据集，也能获得在整个肤色范围内一致的结果。以前的皮肤检测方法几乎只使用颜色提示，我们提出了一种新方法，在缺乏此类信息的情况下表现良好。这项工作的一个关键方面是通过在训练期间战略性地应用增强来修复数据集，其目标是通过颜色不变特征学习来增强泛化。我们使用两种架构演示了这一概念，实验结果显示基准 ECU 数据集中大多数 Fitzpatrick 肤色的精确度和召回率均有所提高。我们使用 RFW 数据集进一步测试了该系统，以表明所提出的方法在不同种族之间的表现更加一致，从而减少了基于肤色的偏差的可能性。为了证明我们工作的有效性，对灰度图像以及在无约束照明和人工滤镜下获得的图像进行了广泛的实验。源代码：https://github.com/HanXuMartin/Color-Invariant-Skin-Segmentation

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖颜色信息的人体皮肤检测方法，旨在提高跨肤色的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖颜色线索导致对深色皮肤检测效果差，且训练数据集存在肤色偏倚，需开发更公平的检测模型。
AI.method: 通过战略性的数据增强修复数据集，在训练中学习颜色不变特征，并在灰度图及复杂光照条件下验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在ECU数据集上多数菲茨帕特里克肤色类型实现精度和召回率提升，在RFW数据集上跨种族表现更一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低肤色偏倚，提升皮肤检测在不同光照和滤镜下的鲁棒性与公平性。

search_text: Color Invariant Skin Segmentation 颜色不变的皮肤分割 This paper addresses the problem of automatically detecting human skin in images without reliance on color information. A primary motivation of the work has been to achieve results that are consistent across the full range of skin tones, even while using a training dataset that is significantly biased toward lighter skin tones. Previous skin-detection methods have used color cues almost exclusively, and we present a new approach that performs well in the absence of such information. A key aspect of the work is dataset repair through augmentation that is applied strategically during training, with the goal of color invariant feature learning to enhance generalization. We have demonstrated the concept using two architectures, and experimental results show improvements in both precision and recall for most Fitzpatrick skin tones in the benchmark ECU dataset. We further tested the system with the RFW dataset to show that the proposed method performs much more consistently across different ethnicities, thereby reducing the chance of bias based on skin color. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our work, extensive experiments were performed on grayscale images as well as images obtained under unconstrained illumination and with artificial filters. authors_text: Nazmul Karim,Umar Khalid,Ashkan Esmaeili,Nazanin Rahnavard
title: CNLL: A Semi-supervised Approach For Continual Noisy Label Learning
title_zh: CNLL：一种持续噪声标签学习的半监督方法
comment: To Appear in IEEE CVPR 2022 Workshop on Continual Learning in Vision. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.07735 by other authors
comments: To Appear in IEEE CVPR 2022 Workshop on Continual Learning in Vision. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.07735 by other authors
abstract: The task of continual learning requires careful design of algorithms that can tackle catastrophic forgetting. However, the noisy label, which is inevitable in a real-world scenario, seems to exacerbate the situation. While very few studies have addressed the issue of continual learning under noisy labels, long training time and complicated training schemes limit their applications in most cases. In contrast, we propose a simple purification technique to effectively cleanse the online data stream that is both cost-effective and more accurate. After purification, we perform fine-tuning in a semi-supervised fashion that ensures the participation of all available samples. Training in this fashion helps us learn a better representation that results in state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. Through extensive experimentation on 3 benchmark datasets, MNIST, CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, we show the effectiveness of our proposed approach. We achieve a 24.8% performance gain for CIFAR10 with 20% noise over previous SOTA methods. Our code is publicly available.
summary: The task of continual learning requires careful design of algorithms that can tackle catastrophic forgetting. However, the noisy label, which is inevitable in a real-world scenario, seems to exacerbate the situation. While very few studies have addressed the issue of continual learning under noisy labels, long training time and complicated training schemes limit their applications in most cases. In contrast, we propose a simple purification technique to effectively cleanse the online data stream that is both cost-effective and more accurate. After purification, we perform fine-tuning in a semi-supervised fashion that ensures the participation of all available samples. Training in this fashion helps us learn a better representation that results in state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. Through extensive experimentation on 3 benchmark datasets, MNIST, CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, we show the effectiveness of our proposed approach. We achieve a 24.8% performance gain for CIFAR10 with 20% noise over previous SOTA methods. Our code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 持续学习的任务需要仔细设计能够解决灾难性遗忘的算法。然而，在现实场景中不可避免的嘈杂标签似乎加剧了这种情况。虽然很少有研究解决噪声标签下持续学习的问题，但较长的训练时间和复杂的训练方案在大多数情况下限制了它们的应用。相比之下，我们提出了一种简单的净化技术来有效净化在线数据流，既经济高效又更准确。纯化后，我们以半监督的方式进行微调，以确保所有可用样本的参与。以这种方式进行训练可以帮助我们学习更好的表示，从而获得最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。通过对 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 3 个基准数据集的广泛实验，我们展示了我们提出的方法的有效性。与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，我们的 CIFAR10 性能提升了 24.8%，噪声降低了 20%。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法CNLL，用于解决持续学习中的噪声标签问题，通过净化数据流和半监督微调实现更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在处理噪声标签时存在训练时间长、方案复杂且效果不佳的问题，需更高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出简单净化技术清理在线数据流，结合半监督微调利用所有样本，学习更优表示以缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10和CIFAR100三个数据集上实验，CIFAR10在20%噪声下相较先前SOTA方法提升24.8%。
AI.conclusion: CNLL通过数据净化与半监督微调有效解决持续噪声标签学习问题，代码开源验证方法有效性。

authors_text: Hung Tran,Vuong Le,Svetha Venkatesh,Truyen Tran
title: Persistent-Transient Duality in Human Behavior Modeling
title_zh: 人类行为建模中的持续-瞬态二元性
abstract: We propose to model the persistent-transient duality in human behavior using a parent-child multi-channel neural network, which features a parent persistent channel that manages the global dynamics and children transient channels that are initiated and terminated on-demand to handle detailed interactive actions. The short-lived transient sessions are managed by a proposed Transient Switch. The neural framework is trained to discover the structure of the duality automatically. Our model shows superior performances in human-object interaction motion prediction.
summary: We propose to model the persistent-transient duality in human behavior using a parent-child multi-channel neural network, which features a parent persistent channel that manages the global dynamics and children transient channels that are initiated and terminated on-demand to handle detailed interactive actions. The short-lived transient sessions are managed by a proposed Transient Switch. The neural framework is trained to discover the structure of the duality automatically. Our model shows superior performances in human-object interaction motion prediction.
abstract_zh: 我们建议使用父子多通道神经网络对人类行为中的持久-瞬态二元性进行建模，该神经网络具有管理全局动态的父持久通道和按需启动和终止以处理详细交互动作的子瞬态通道。短暂的瞬态会话由建议的瞬态交换机管理。神经框架经过训练可以自动发现二元性的结构。我们的模型在人与物体交互运动预测方面表现出卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于父-子多通道神经网络的人类行为建模方法，用于捕捉持久与短暂行为的二元性。
AI.motivation: 人类行为包含长期持续的全局动态和短期的交互动作，传统模型难以同时有效建模这两种特性。
AI.method: 设计包含父级持久通道和子级短暂通道的多通道网络，通过提出的短暂切换机制动态管理短期行为会话，并自动学习二元结构。
AI.result: 在人类-物体交互运动预测任务中，该模型表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效揭示了人类行为的持久-短暂二元特性，为复杂行为建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tzofi Klinghoffer,Siddharth Somasundaram,Kushagra Tiwary,Ramesh Raskar
title: Physics vs. Learned Priors: Rethinking Camera and Algorithm Design for Task-Specific Imaging
title_zh: 物理与学习先验：重新思考特定任务成像的相机和算法设计
comment: Published at the International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP), 2022
comments: Published at the International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP), 2022
abstract: Cameras were originally designed using physics-based heuristics to capture aesthetic images. In recent years, there has been a transformation in camera design from being purely physics-driven to increasingly data-driven and task-specific. In this paper, we present a framework to understand the building blocks of this nascent field of end-to-end design of camera hardware and algorithms. As part of this framework, we show how methods that exploit both physics and data have become prevalent in imaging and computer vision, underscoring a key trend that will continue to dominate the future of task-specific camera design. Finally, we share current barriers to progress in end-to-end design, and hypothesize how these barriers can be overcome.
summary: Cameras were originally designed using physics-based heuristics to capture aesthetic images. In recent years, there has been a transformation in camera design from being purely physics-driven to increasingly data-driven and task-specific. In this paper, we present a framework to understand the building blocks of this nascent field of end-to-end design of camera hardware and algorithms. As part of this framework, we show how methods that exploit both physics and data have become prevalent in imaging and computer vision, underscoring a key trend that will continue to dominate the future of task-specific camera design. Finally, we share current barriers to progress in end-to-end design, and hypothesize how these barriers can be overcome.
abstract_zh: 相机最初设计时使用基于物理的启发法来捕捉美观的图像。近年来，相机设计发生了转变，从纯粹的物理驱动转向越来越数据驱动和特定于任务的设计。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架来理解相机硬件和算法端到端设计这一新兴领域的构建模块。作为该框架的一部分，我们展示了利用物理和数据的方法如何在成像和计算机视觉中变得普遍，强调了将继续主导特定任务相机设计未来的关键趋势。最后，我们分享了当前端到端设计进展的障碍，并假设如何克服这些障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架以理解端到端相机硬件与算法设计的构建块，并探讨物理与数据驱动方法在特定任务成像中的结合趋势。
AI.motivation: 传统相机设计依赖物理启发式方法，但近年转向数据驱动和任务特定设计，需重新思考如何融合物理原理与数据驱动方法以优化成像系统。
AI.method: 构建分析框架，研究结合物理模型与数据驱动技术的方法在成像和计算机视觉中的应用，并识别端到端设计中的关键挑战。
AI.result: 发现融合物理与数据的方法已成为主流趋势，同时指出当前在硬件-算法协同设计、数据效率及跨任务泛化能力方面的技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 未来任务特定相机设计将持续依赖物理与数据的协同，需通过新型硬件架构、自监督学习及跨域迁移策略突破现有局限。

In recent years, there has been a transformation in camera design from being purely physics-driven to increasingly data-driven and task-specific.
